skill_benevolence.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以将任意张手牌交给其他角色，然后你本阶段以此法给出第二张牌或更多时，你回复1点体力。
skill_benevolence.description_en: During your Action Phase, you may give any number of hand cards to other characters (distributed however you like, one card at a time to each target). When you give out your second card this way during this phase, recover 1 HP.

skill_rally_the_vanguard.description_cn: 主公技，当你需要使用或打出【杀】时，你可以令其他蜀势力角色选择是否打出一张【杀】（视为由你使用或打出）。
skill_rally_the_vanguard.description_en: Lord Skill: When you need to use or play out a [Kill], you may have other Shu faction characters each choose whether to play out a [Kill] on your behalf (treated as used or played out by you).

skill_saint_of_war.description_cn: 你可以将一张红色牌当【杀】使用或打出。
skill_saint_of_war.description_en: You may use or play out any red card as a [Kill].

skill_roar.description_cn: 锁定技，你使用【杀】无次数限制。
skill_roar.description_en: Locked: You may use [Kill] any number of times per turn.

skill_read_the_stars.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以观看牌堆顶的X张牌（X为存活角色数且至多为5），然后以任意顺序置于牌堆顶或牌堆底。
skill_read_the_stars.description_en: During your Starting Phase, you may look at the top X cards of the Draw Pile (X = number of surviving characters, max 5), then place them back on the top or bottom of the Draw Pile in any order.

skill_empty_fort.description_cn: 锁定技，若你没有手牌，你不能成为【杀】或【决斗】的目标。
skill_empty_fort.description_en: Locked: If you have no hand cards, you cannot be targeted by [Kill] or [Duel].

skill_dragons_courage.description_cn: 你可以将一张【杀】当【闪】、【闪】当【杀】使用或打出。
skill_dragons_courage.description_en: You may use or play out [Kill] as [Dodge], or [Dodge] as [Kill].

skill_repair_armor.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以摸三张牌，然后弃置X张牌（X为3减去你于本局游戏内失去过的装备区里的牌数，至少为0）。若你未以此法弃置：基本牌，你本阶段使用【杀】的次数上限+1；锦囊牌，你本阶段使用牌无距离限制；非装备牌，你可以视为使用一张不计入次数限制的【杀】。
skill_repair_armor.description_en: At the start of your Action Phase, you may draw 3 cards, then discard X cards (X = 3 minus the number of Equipment Cards you have lost from your Equipment Zone this game, minimum 0). If you did not discard by this method: a Basic Card — your [Kill] limit increases by 1 this phase; a Tool Card — you may use cards without distance restrictions this phase; a non-Equipment Card — you may treat this as using one [Kill] that does not count toward your usage limit.

skill_iron_cavalry.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定目标后，你可以判定，若为红色，其不能使用【闪】响应此【杀】。
skill_iron_cavalry.description_en: When you use [Kill] and designate a target, you may make a judgment. If the result is red, that character cannot use [Dodge] to respond to this [Kill].

skill_horsemanship.description_cn: 锁定技，你计算与其他角色的距离-1。
skill_horsemanship.description_en: Locked: When you calculate the distance to another character, subtract 1.

skill_gathered_wisdom.description_cn: 当你使用普通锦囊牌时，你可以摸一张牌。
skill_gathered_wisdom.description_en: When you use a Non Time-Delay Tool card, you may draw 1 card.

skill_extraordinary_talent.description_cn: 锁定技，你使用锦囊牌无距离限制。
skill_extraordinary_talent.description_en: Locked: You may use Tool cards without distance restrictions.

skill_balance_of_power.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置任意张牌，然后摸等量张牌。
skill_balance_of_power.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard any number of cards, then draw the same number.

skill_rescue.description_cn: 主公技，锁定技，其他吴势力角色对你使用【桃】的回复值+1。
skill_rescue.description_en: Lord Skill: Locked: When another Wu faction character uses [Peach] to recover HP for you, the HP recovered is increased by 1.

skill_surprise_raid.description_cn: 你可以将一张黑色牌当【过河拆桥】使用。
skill_surprise_raid.description_en: You may play any black card as [Dismantle].

skill_self_discipline.description_cn: 若你未于本回合出牌阶段使用或打出过【杀】，你可以跳过弃牌阶段。
skill_self_discipline.description_en: If you did not use or play out [Kill] during your Action Phase this turn, you may skip your Discard Phase.

skill_self_harm.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以失去1点体力，然后摸两张牌。
skill_self_harm.description_en: During your Action Phase, you may lose 1 HP, then draw 2 cards.

skill_heroic_bearing.description_cn: 摸牌阶段，你可以多摸一张牌。
skill_heroic_bearing.description_en: Draw Phase: You may draw 1 extra card.

skill_counter_spy.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以令一名其他角色选择一种花色，令其获得并展示你的一张手牌，若此牌花色与其选择的花色不同，你对其造成1点伤害。
skill_counter_spy.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose another character. They declare a suit, then gain and reveal 1 of your hand cards. If the card's suit does not match what they declared, you deal 1 damage to them.

skill_peerless_beauty.description_cn: 你可以将一张方片牌当【乐不思蜀】使用。
skill_peerless_beauty.description_en: You may play any Diamonds card as [Acedia].

skill_displaced.description_cn: 当你成为【杀】的目标时，你可以弃置一张牌并将此【杀】转移给你攻击范围内的一名其他角色。
skill_displaced.description_en: When you are targeted by [Kill], you may discard 1 card and redirect that [Kill] to another character within your Attack Range.

skill_humility.description_cn: 锁定技，你不能成为【顺手牵羊】和【乐不思蜀】的目标。
skill_humility.description_en: Locked: You cannot be targeted by [Steal] or [Acedia].

skill_linked_camps.description_cn: 当你失去最后的手牌后，你可以摸一张牌。
skill_linked_camps.description_en: When you lose your last hand card, you may draw 1 card.

skill_treacherous_hero.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以获得造成此伤害的牌。
skill_treacherous_hero.description_en: When you take damage, you may gain the card that caused the damage.

skill_imperial_guard.description_cn: 主公技，其他魏势力角色可以在你需要时代替你使用或打出【闪】（视为由你使用或打出）。
skill_imperial_guard.description_en: Lord Skill: When you need to use or play out a [Dodge], other Wei faction characters may choose to play out a [Dodge] on your behalf (treated as used or played out by you).

skill_retribution.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以获得伤害来源的一张牌。
skill_retribution.description_en: When you take damage, you may take 1 card from the damage source.

skill_demonic_wit.description_cn: 当一张判定牌生效前，你可以用一张手牌代替之。
skill_demonic_wit.description_en: When a Judgment Card is about to take effect, you may substitute it with a hand card.

skill_unyielding.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以判定，若结果不为红桃，伤害来源选择弃置两张手牌或受到1点伤害。
skill_unyielding.description_en: When you receive damage, you may perform a Judgment. If the result is not Hearts, the damage source chooses to discard 2 hand cards or take 1 damage.

skill_sudden_raid.description_cn: 摸牌阶段，你可以少摸任意张牌并获得等量的其他角色各一张手牌。
skill_sudden_raid.description_en: Draw Phase: You can draw fewer cards and instead take the same number of cards from other characters' hands.

skill_bare_chested.description_cn: 摸牌阶段，你可以少摸一张牌，然后你本回合使用【杀】或【决斗】造成的伤害+1。
skill_bare_chested.description_en: Draw Phase: You may draw 1 fewer card. If you do, your [Kill] and [Duel] deal +1 damage this turn.

skill_heavens_envy.description_cn: 当你的判定牌生效后，你可以获得此牌。
skill_heavens_envy.description_en: When your Judgment Card takes effect, you may keep it.

skill_posthumous_plan.description_cn: 当你受到1点伤害后，你可以观看牌堆顶的两张牌，然后将这些牌交给任意角色。
skill_posthumous_plan.description_en: When you receive 1 damage, you may look at the top 2 cards of the Draw Pile, then give them to any characters.

skill_goddess_of_the_luo.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以判定，若结果为黑色，你获得此牌，然后你可以重复此流程。
skill_goddess_of_the_luo.description_en: During your Starting Phase, you may perform a Judgment. If the result is Black, gain that card, then you may repeat this process.

skill_fell_a_kingdom.description_cn: 你可以将一张黑色手牌当【闪】使用或打出。
skill_fell_a_kingdom.description_en: You may play any black hand card as [Dodge].

skill_field_medicine.description_cn: 在你的回合外，你可以将一张红色牌当【桃】使用。
skill_field_medicine.description_en: Outside your turn, you may play any red card as [Peach].

skill_physicians_tome.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置一张手牌令一名角色回复1点体力。
skill_physicians_tome.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 1 hand card to have a character recover 1 HP.

skill_peerless.description_cn: 锁定技，你使用的【杀】需两张【闪】才能抵消；与你【决斗】的角色每次需打出两张【杀】。
skill_peerless.description_en: Locked: Negating your [Kill] requires 2 [Dodge]. Each time a character plays out a [Kill] against you in a [Duel], they must play out 2 [Kill] cards instead of 1.

skill_eclipse_the_moon.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以摸一张牌。
skill_eclipse_the_moon.description_en: End Phase: You may draw 1 card.

skill_sow_discord.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置一张牌令一名男性角色视为对另一名男性角色使用一张【决斗】（不能被【无懈可击】抵消）。
skill_sow_discord.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 1 card to force a male character to [Duel] another male character (cannot be negated by [Nullification]).

skill_fierce_lady.description_cn: 当你失去装备区里的一张牌后，你可以摸两张牌。
skill_fierce_lady.description_en: When you lose a card from your Equipment Zone, you may draw 2 cards.

skill_political_marriage.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置两张手牌，令你与一名已受伤的男性角色各回复1点体力。
skill_political_marriage.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 2 hand cards. You and 1 Wounded male character each recover 1 HP.

skill_show_of_arms.description_cn: 锁定技，当一名角色使用红色【杀】对你造成伤害时，其选择回复1点体力或摸一张牌。
skill_show_of_arms.description_en: Locked: When a character deals damage to you with a red [Kill], they must choose: recover 1 HP or draw 1 card.

skill_vainglorious.description_cn: 主公的准备阶段，你可以摸一张牌，然后令其本回合手牌上限-1。
skill_vainglorious.description_en: During the Lord's Starting Phase, you may draw 1 card, then reduce the Lord's Hand Limit by 1 this turn.

skill_shared_ailment.description_cn: 锁定技，若你的手牌数大于体力值，攻击范围内包含你的其他角色使用【杀】不能指定除你外的角色为目标。
skill_shared_ailment.description_en: Locked: If your hand card count exceeds your HP Value, other characters whose Attack Range includes you cannot use [Kill] to target anyone other than you.

skill_eight_trigram_array.description_cn: 锁定技，若你的装备区里没有防具牌，你视为装备着【八卦阵】。
skill_eight_trigram_array.description_en: Locked: If you have no Armor card equipped, you are treated as having [Eight Trigrams] equipped.

skill_fire_stratagem.description_cn: 你可以将一张红色手牌当【火攻】使用。
skill_fire_stratagem.description_en: You may Use any red hand card as [Incendiary].

skill_see_through.description_cn: 你可以将一张黑色手牌当【无懈可击】使用。
skill_see_through.description_en: You may Use any black hand card as [Nullification].

skill_flying_corps.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置一张牌，然后选择一项：令一名手牌数大于你的角色交给你一张牌；或令名装备区里牌数大于你的角色弃置一张装备牌。
skill_flying_corps.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 1 card, then choose one: 1. Have a character whose hand count is greater than yours give you 1 of their hand cards; 2. Have a character whose Equipment Zone card count is greater than yours discard 1 Equipment card.

skill_military_strategy.description_cn: 锁定技，当你发动〖飞军〗，目标与你之前指定的目标均不相同，则你摸两张牌
skill_military_strategy.description_en: Locked: When you activate 〖Flying Corps〗 and the designated target is different from all previous targets you designated via 〖Flying Corps〗 this turn, draw 2 cards.

skill_resist_battle.description_cn: 转换技，阳：当你成为其他角色使用【杀】的目标后，你可以与其各摸一张牌，然后其本回合不能再对你使用牌。阴：当你使用【杀】指定目标后，你可以获得其中一名目标的一张牌，然后你本回合不能再对其使用牌。
skill_resist_battle.description_en: Convert Skill: Yang — When you become the target of another character's [Kill], you and that character each draw 1 card, then that character cannot Use cards targeting you again this turn. Yin — After your [Kill] designates targets, you may gain 1 card from one of those target characters, then you cannot Use cards targeting them again this turn.

skill_unwavering_zeal.description_cn: 你出牌阶段使用的首张牌无距离限制。当你于出牌阶段使用基本牌或普通锦囊牌时，你可以令此牌不能被响应，然后你本阶段不能再使用牌。
skill_unwavering_zeal.description_en: The first card you Use each Action Phase has no distance restriction. When you Use a Basic card or Non Time-Delay Tool card during your Action Phase, you may make that card unrespondable; if you do, you cannot Use any more cards this Action Phase.

skill_doctrines_of_crime.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以观看牌堆顶三张牌，然后获得其中X张牌，将剩余牌以任意顺序置于牌堆顶（X为你满足的项数：1.本回合造成过伤害；2.本回合未弃置过牌；3.手牌数全场最少）。若均不满足，你与一名其他角色失去1点体力。
skill_doctrines_of_crime.description_en: End Phase: Look at the top 3 cards of the deck. Keep X of them and return the rest to the top in any order (X = number of the following conditions met: 1. You dealt damage this turn; 2. You discarded no cards this turn; 3. You have the fewest hand cards on the field). If no conditions are met, you and another character of your choice each lose 1 HP.

skill_fathers_shield.description_cn: 锁定技，当你每回合首次成为其他角色【杀】或【决斗】的目标后，若其手牌数不小于你，此牌对你无效。
skill_fathers_shield.description_en: Locked: The first time each turn you become the target of another character's [Kill] or [Duel], if that character's hand count is ≥ yours, that card is Nullified against you.

skill_field_farming.description_cn: 当你于回合外失去牌后，你可以判定，当非红桃判定牌生效后，你将此牌置于你的武将牌上，称为「田」。你计算与其他角色的距离-X（X为你「田」的数量）。
skill_field_farming.description_en: When you lose cards outside your turn, perform a Judgment. If the result is not Hearts, place the Judgment Card on your character card as a 「Field」 token. Your distance to other characters is reduced by X (X = number of 「Field」 tokens on your character card).

skill_breach_the_pass.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若「田」的数量不小于3，你减少1点体力上限，然后获得〖急袭〗。
skill_breach_the_pass.description_en: Awakening: Starting Phase, if you have ≥ 3 「Field」 tokens, reduce your Max HP by 1, then gain 〖Swift Strike〗.

skill_swift_strike.description_cn: 你可以将一张「田」当【顺手牵羊】使用
skill_swift_strike.description_en: You may Use a 「Field」 token as [Steal].

skill_adaptive_tactics.description_cn: 当你于回合内使用基本牌或锦囊牌指定目标后，你可以弃置不是此牌目标的一名角色一张牌，然后该角色摸一张牌。
skill_adaptive_tactics.description_en: When you Use a non-Equipment card that targets at least one character during your turn, you may discard 1 card from another character (not a target of that card), then have that character draw 1 card.

skill_advance.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以摸两张牌，然后将手牌弃置至X张（X为你于此回合内发动过〖奇制〗的次数）。
skill_advance.description_en: End Phase: You may draw 2 cards, then discard down to X hand cards (X = the number of times you activated 〖Adaptive Tactics〗 this turn).

skill_counsel_surrender.description_cn: 当你成为其他角色使用牌的目标后，你可令手牌数最少的一名角色摸一张牌。
skill_counsel_surrender.description_en: When you become the target of another character's card, you may have the character with the fewest hand cards draw 1 card.

skill_read_the_moment.description_cn: 转换技，阳：出牌阶段限一次，你可以将一张牌交给一名手牌数最多的角色，然后对其造成1点伤害。若该角色因此死亡，则你可以令一名角色将手牌摸至四张。阴：其他角色对你造成伤害后，你可以观看该角色的手牌，然后交给其一张牌，当前回合结束时，若该角色未失去此牌，你将手牌摸至四张。
skill_read_the_moment.description_en: Convert Skill: Yang — Once per Action Phase: Give 1 hand card to the character with the most hand cards, then deal 1 damage to them. If that character dies from this damage, you may have a character draw until they have 4 hand cards. Yin — After another character deals damage to you, you may look at their hand cards, then give them 1 of your hand cards. At the end of the current turn, if they still have that card, draw until you have 4 hand cards.

skill_steady_resolve.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以选择一名其他角色，本回合结束时和其下回合结束时，其将手牌调整至与你手牌数相同（至多摸至五张）。
skill_steady_resolve.description_en: End Phase: Choose another character. At the end of this turn and at the end of that character's next turn, they adjust their hand count to match yours: drawing up to 5 cards or discarding down as needed.

skill_claim_glory.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】或伤害锦囊牌时，你可以选择其中一个手牌数不小于你的目标角色，将其一张牌置于你的武将牌上，称为「荣」。
skill_claim_glory.description_en: When you Use [Kill] or a damage-dealing Tool card, you may choose one target whose hand count is ≥ yours and place 1 of their cards on your character card as a 「Glory」 token.

skill_grand_rise.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若「荣」的数量不小于3，你用任意手牌替换等量的「荣」，减少1点体力上限并获得〖清侧〗。
skill_grand_rise.description_en: Awakening: Starting Phase, if you have ≥ 3 「Glory」 tokens, replace any number of them with an equal number of hand cards, reduce your Max HP by 1, then gain 〖Clear the Flanks〗.

skill_clear_the_flanks.description_cn: 出牌阶段、你可以移去一张「荣」，然后弃置场上的一张牌
skill_clear_the_flanks.description_en: During your Action Phase, you may remove 1 「Glory」 token, then discard 1 card that is On the Field.

skill_humble_restraint.description_cn: 锁定技、不能被横置、且不能成为延时类锦囊牌或其他角色拼点的目标。
skill_humble_restraint.description_en: Locked: You cannot be placed into the Chain State. You cannot be the target of Time-Delayed Tool cards or Point Duels initiated by other characters.

skill_breach_the_dam.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次、你可以废除你装备区里的一种装备栏、然后执行对应的一项：武器栏、本回合你可以多使用三张【杀】：防具栏、三张牌、本合手牌上限+3；坐骑栏、本回合你使用牌无距离限制：宝物栏、本回合获得〖集智〗
skill_breach_the_dam.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Abolish 1 Equipment slot in your Equipment Zone, then perform the corresponding effect: Weapon slot — you may Use 3 additional [Kill] cards this turn; Armor slot — draw 3 cards and your Hand Limit is +3 this turn; Mount slot — your cards have no distance restriction this turn; Treasure slot — gain 〖Gathered Wisdom〗 until the end of this turn.

skill_break_the_tide.description_cn: 觉醒技、备阶段、若你所有装备栏均被废除或体力值为 1 则你减点体力上限、然后将手牌补至体力上限、失去〖决堰〗并获得〖怀柔〗。
skill_break_the_tide.description_en: Awakening: Starting Phase, if all of your Equipment slots have been Abolished or your HP Value is 1, reduce your Max HP by 1, draw cards until you have a number equal to your Max HP, lose 〖Breach the Dam〗, then gain 〖Embrace Leniency〗.

skill_embrace_leniency.description_cn: 出牌阶段、可以重铸装备牌。
skill_embrace_leniency.description_en: During your Action Phase, you may Reforge Equipment cards.

skill_cherish_tangerines.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，你获得3个「橘」标记。（有「橘」的角色受到伤害时，你防止此伤害，然后移去一个「橘」；你令有「橘」的角色摸牌阶段额外摸一张牌）
skill_cherish_tangerines.description_en: Locked: At the start of the game, gain 3 「Tangerine」 tokens. When a character who has a 「Tangerine」 token takes damage, prevent that damage and remove 1 「Tangerine」 from that character. Characters who have a 「Tangerine」 token draw 1 additional card during their Draw Phase.

skill_parting_gift.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以失去1点体力或移去一个「橘」，然后令一名其他角色获得一个「橘」。
skill_parting_gift.description_en: At the start of your Action Phase, you may lose 1 HP or remove 1 「Tangerine」 token from yourself, then give another character 1 「Tangerine」 token.

skill_even_counsel.description_cn: 若你没有「橘」，你可以跳过摸牌阶段然后获得一个「橘」。
skill_even_counsel.description_en: If you have no 「Tangerine」 tokens, you may skip your Draw Phase and gain 1 「Tangerine」 token.

skill_rout_and_execute.description_cn: 弃牌阶段结束后，你可以选择一项：令至多X名角色各摸一张牌；对任意名体力值之和为X的角色造成一点伤害，若不少于2名角色，你失去一点体力（X为你此阶段弃置的牌数）。
skill_rout_and_execute.description_en: At the end of your Discard Phase, you may choose one: 1. Have up to X characters each draw 1 card; 2. Deal 1 damage to any characters whose combined HP Values equal X (if 2 or more characters are targeted this way, you lose 1 HP) (X = number of cards you discarded this phase).

skill_restrain_the_court.description_cn: 锁定技，你的出牌阶段内，攻击范围内不包含你的角色不能成为你使用牌的目标。出牌阶段结束时，若你本阶段内使用的牌数小于这些角色数，你弃置其中一名角色一张牌。
skill_restrain_the_court.description_en: Locked: During your Action Phase, characters not within your Attack Range cannot be the targets of your cards. At the end of your Action Phase, if the number of cards you Used this phase is less than the number of such characters, you discard 1 card from one of them.

skill_rally_the_army.description_cn: 主公技，其他吴势力角色于其出牌阶段使用【杀】结算结束后，其可以将此【杀】交给你，然后你可以令其摸一张牌。
skill_rally_the_army.description_en: Lord Skill: After another Wu faction character Uses [Kill] and it finishes resolving, they may give you that [Kill], then you may have them draw 1 card.

skill_auspicious_union.description_cn: 当每回合首次有牌移出/移入游戏后，你可以与一名其他角色各摸/弃置一张牌，然后你可以令其中一名手牌数为X的角色回复1点体力（X为「箜声」牌数）。
skill_auspicious_union.description_en: When any card first moves into or out of the game each turn, you and another character each draw 1 card (if cards moved into the game) or discard 1 card (if cards moved out of the game). You may then have a character whose hand count equals X recover 1 HP (X = number of 「Konghou」 cards on your character card).

skill_konghou_melody.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以将任意张牌置于你的武将牌上。结束阶段，你获得「箜声」牌中的非装备牌，然后令一名角色使用剩余「箜声」牌并失去1点体力。
skill_konghou_melody.description_en: Starting Phase: You may place any number of hand cards on your character card as 「Konghou」 cards. End Phase: Gain back all non-Equipment cards among the 「Konghou」 cards, then have another character Use all remaining 「Konghou」 Equipment cards; that character then loses 1 HP.

skill_debauched.description_cn: 锁定技，摸牌阶段，你改为摸X张牌（X为存活势力数）；出牌阶段结束时，若你此阶段：1.没有造成伤害，将手牌摸至当前体力值；2.造成伤害数超过1点，本回合手牌上限改为已损失体力值。
skill_debauched.description_en: Locked: During your Draw Phase, draw X cards instead of the normal amount (X = number of surviving factions). At the end of your Action Phase: 1. If you dealt no damage this phase, draw cards until you have a number equal to your current HP Value; 2. If you dealt damage more than once, your Hand Limit this turn is changed to your HP Lost.

skill_false_emperor.description_cn: 主公技，你于弃牌阶段弃置的牌可以交给任意名其他群雄角色各一张。
skill_false_emperor.description_en: Lord Skill: During your Discard Phase, cards you would discard may instead be given to any number of other Qun faction characters (1 card per character).

skill_heroic_chaos.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可以指定一名其他角色并废除你的判定区和装备区，然后你本回合对其使用牌无距离和次数限制，其本回合不能使用和打出手牌。
skill_heroic_chaos.description_en: Limited: During your Action Phase, Abolish your Judgment Zone and Equipment Zone. Choose 1 target character — this turn, your cards targeting them have no distance or count restriction, and they cannot Use or Play hand cards.

skill_heed_counsel.description_cn: 当你成为锦囊牌的目标时，若此牌的目标数大于1，你可以交给其中一名目标角色一张牌，然后摸一张牌，若你给出的牌是装备牌，改为摸两张牌。
skill_heed_counsel.description_en: When you become the target of a Tool card that has more than one target, you may give 1 hand card to one of the other target characters, then draw 1 card. If the card you gave was an Equipment card, draw 2 cards instead.

skill_shifting_stratagem.description_cn: 转换技，出牌阶段限一次，阳：你可以摸一张牌，然后弃置两张手牌。阴：你可以摸两张牌，然后弃置一张手牌。若如此做，直到本回合结束，你使用与弃置牌相同花色的牌无距离和次数限制。
skill_shifting_stratagem.description_en: Convert Skill: Once per Action Phase: Yang — Draw 1 card then discard 2 hand cards. Yin — Draw 2 cards then discard 1 hand card. After either option, until the end of this turn, cards you Use that share a suit with a card you discarded this way have no distance or count restriction.

skill_rely_on_talent.description_cn: 当你使用一张牌结算结束后，若此牌与你本回合使用的牌类型均不同（包括装备牌），你可以将此牌置于牌堆顶，然后摸一张牌。
skill_rely_on_talent.description_en: After the first time each turn that you Use a card of a given type (including Equipment cards), you may place that card on top of the deck, then draw 1 card.

skill_draw_from_the_bottom.description_cn: 锁定技，当你摸牌时，改为从牌堆底摸牌。
skill_draw_from_the_bottom.description_en: Locked: Whenever you draw cards, draw from the bottom of the deck instead of the top.

skill_clear_commission.description_cn: 游戏开始时，你摸一张牌，然后将你的一张手牌置于你的武将牌上，称为「任」。结束阶段，你可以用手牌替换「任」。
skill_clear_commission.description_en: At the start of the game, draw 1 card, then place 1 of your hand cards on your character card as a 「Duty」 card. End Phase: You may replace the 「Duty」 card with 1 of your hand cards.

skill_steadfast_loyalty.description_cn: 转换技，阳：出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择一名攻击范围内的其他角色并弃置x张与「任」颜色相同的牌对其造成1点伤害（x为你与其体力值之差且至少为1）阴：你的回合外，当你使用或打出的牌结算结束后，若此牌与「任」类别相同，则你可令一名角色摸一张牌。
skill_steadfast_loyalty.description_en: Convert Skill: Yang — Once per Action Phase: Choose another character within your Attack Range and discard X hand cards of the same color as the 「Duty」 card to deal 1 damage to them (X = the absolute difference between your HP Values, minimum 1). Yin — Outside your turn, after a card you Use or Play finishes resolving, if that card is of the same type as the 「Duty」 card, you may have a character draw 1 card.

skill_silent_oath.description_cn: 锁定技，防止你使用和受到的锦囊牌造成的伤害。
skill_silent_oath.description_en: Locked: Prevent all damage caused by Tool cards that target you or that you use.

skill_commend.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以弃置一张非基本牌并令一名其他角色选择一项：1.摸两张牌；2.回复1点体力；3.复原其武将牌。
skill_commend.description_en: End Phase: Discard 1 non-Basic card, then choose another character who selects one: 1. Draw 2 cards; 2. Recover 1 HP; 3. Reset their General Card.

skill_covert_strike.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以摸一张牌，并弃置一张牌，然后令距离为1的一名角色本回合不能使用或打出与你弃置牌颜色相同的手牌。
skill_covert_strike.description_en: Starting Phase: You may draw 1 card, discard 1 card, then choose a character at distance 1 — they cannot Use or Play hand cards matching the color of your discarded card this turn.

skill_spread_rumours.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置一张牌然后对一名体力值最大的角色造成1点伤害。
skill_spread_rumours.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 1 card, then deal 1 damage to a character with the highest HP Value.

skill_suppress_tribes.description_cn: 当你对其他角色造成伤害时，你可以防止此伤害，然后你获得其装备区或判定区里的一张牌
skill_suppress_tribes.description_en: When you deal damage to another character, you may prevent that damage, then take 1 card from their Equipment Zone or Judgment Zone.

skill_gratitude_and_grudge.description_cn: 当你获得一名其他角色至少两张牌后，你可以令其摸一张牌；当你受到1点伤害后，除非伤害来源交给你一张手牌，否则其失去1点体力。
skill_gratitude_and_grudge.description_en: When you take at least 2 cards from another character, you may have them draw 1 card. When you take 1 damage, unless the damage source gives you 1 hand card, they lose 1 HP.

skill_beguile.description_cn: 摸牌阶段，你可以改为令一名其他角色摸两张牌，然后除非该角色对你选择的另一名角色使用一张【杀】，否则你获得其两张牌。
skill_beguile.description_en: Draw Phase: You may instead have another character draw 2 cards. Then, unless that character uses [Kill] on a character you designate, you take 2 of their cards.

skill_fathers_legacy.description_cn: 你可以将两张手牌当【杀】使用或打出；当你于出牌阶段以此法造成伤害后，获得〖武圣〗 和〖咆哮〗直到回合结束。
skill_fathers_legacy.description_en: You may use 2 hand cards as [Kill]. When you deal damage this way during your Action Phase, gain 〖Valor〗 and 〖Roar〗 until the end of this turn.

skill_charge_ahead.description_cn: 锁定技，回合开始时，你失去1点体力并从弃牌堆获得一张【杀】，然后执行一个额外的出牌阶段。
skill_charge_ahead.description_en: Locked: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP and take a [Kill] from the Discard Pile, then perform an extra Action Phase.

skill_loyal_steed.description_cn: 限定技，当你处于濒死状态时，你可以将体力回复至点且手牌摸至X张(X为全场势力数)。若大于等于3，你翻面。
skill_loyal_steed.description_en: Limited: When you enter the Verge of Death State, you may recover HP to your Max HP and draw X cards (X = number of surviving factions). If X ≥ 3, Flip over your General Card.

skill_martial_might.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可展示手牌并将其中一种颜色的所有牌当杀】使用(无次数距离限制)，其中每有一种类型你可选择一项执行(可重复选择):1. 摸一张牌:2.目标角色本回合非锁定技能失效；3.此技能本回合可发动次数+1。若此【杀】执行了所有选项，则伤害+1。
skill_martial_might.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Reveal your hand. Use all cards of one color as [Kill] with no distance or count restrictions. For each card type among them, choose one (repeatable): 1. Draw 1 card; 2. The target's non-Locked skills are Nullified this turn; 3. This skill can be activated one additional time this turn. If this [Kill] executed all options, its damage is increased by 1.

skill_clever_persuasion.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以与一名角色拼点:若你赢，本回合你使用下一张基本牌或普通锦囊牌可以多选择或少选择一个目标；若你没赢，本回合你不能使用锦囊牌。
skill_clever_persuasion.description_en: At the start of your Action Phase, you may initiate a Point Duel with a character. If you win, your next Basic or Non Time-Delay Tool card this turn may target one more or one fewer character. If you lose, you cannot use Tool cards this turn.

skill_follow_the_win.description_cn: 当你拼点后，若你赢，你可以获得对手拼点的牌:若你没赢，你可以获得你拼点的牌。
skill_follow_the_win.description_en: After a Point Duel, if you won, you may take your opponent's Point Duel card. If you lost, you may take your own Point Duel card.

skill_entrap_the_heir.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以选择至多两名角色，将这些角色的各一张牌置于武将牌上，称为「逆」；一名角色需要对你使用【杀】时，其可以移去两张 「逆」，视为对你使用【杀】。
skill_entrap_the_heir.description_en: Starting Phase: Choose up to 2 characters and place 1 card from each on your character card as 「Treachery」 cards. When a character needs to use [Kill] against you, they may remove 2 「Treachery」 cards to be treated as using [Kill] against you.

skill_lightning_raid.description_cn: 锁定技，当你于回合内使用【杀】或普通锦囊牌指定唯一目标时，若你与其他角色的距离均为1，你选择至多两项:1.此牌无视目标角色防具；2.此牌增加一个目标；3.此牌不能被抵消；4.此牌造成伤害时，你摸一张牌；你于回合内与其他角色的距离-X (为你本回合使用过的牌数)。
skill_lightning_raid.description_en: Locked: When you use [Kill] or a Non Time-Delay Tool card targeting only one character during your turn, if your distance to all other characters is 1, choose up to two options: 1. Ignore target's Armor; 2. Add one target; 3. Cannot be Negated; 4. Draw 1 card when it deals damage. Your distance to others is reduced by X this turn (X = number of cards you have used this turn).

skill_loyal_valour.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】后，你可以将此【杀】或目标角色使用的【闪】交给另一名其他角色，以此法获得红色牌的角色可以对你攻击范围内的角色使用一张【杀】。
skill_loyal_valour.description_en: After you use [Kill], you may give that [Kill] or a [Dodge] used by the target to another character. A character who gains a red card this way may use [Kill] on a character within your Attack Range.

skill_last_stand.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以将所有手牌当一张【决斗】使用(至少一张)，结算完成后，你和受伤角色各摸一张牌，若你此阶段因〖战绝〗摸过至少三张牌，此阶段〖战绝〗 失效
skill_last_stand.description_en: Action Phase: Use at least 1 hand card as [Duel]. After resolution, you and any Wounded character each draw 1 card. If you have drawn at least 3 cards from 〖Last Stand〗 this phase, it is disabled for the rest of this phase.

skill_loyal_service.description_cn: 主公技，出牌阶段限一次，你可以令其他蜀势力角色依次选择是否展示并交给你一张【杀】，然后你可以令选择是的角色摸一张牌，这些【杀】本回合不计入〖战绝〗转化。
skill_loyal_service.description_en: Lord Skill — Once per Action Phase: Have other Shu faction characters each choose whether to reveal and give you a [Kill] one at a time. Those who do may draw 1 card. These [Kill] cards do not count toward 〖Last Stand〗 conversions this turn.

skill_woodcutters_gleaning.description_cn: 其他角色的结束阶段，若其手牌数等于你，你可以与其各摸一张牌。
skill_woodcutters_gleaning.description_en: During another character's End Phase, if their hand count equals yours, you may both draw 1 card.

skill_swallows_song.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以重铸【杀】；出牌阶段结束时，若你于此阶段内重铸过两张或更多的【杀】，则你可以令一名男性角色摸两张牌。
skill_swallows_song.description_en: Action Phase: You may Reforge [Kill] cards. At the end of your Action Phase, if you Reforged 2 or more [Kill] cards this phase, you may have a Male character draw 2 cards.

skill_comfort_the_tribes.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以和一名其他角色同时展示一张手牌:若你展示的是【杀】且该角色不是【闪】，你弃置此【杀】，然后对其造成1 点伤害；若你展示的不是【杀】且该角色是【闪】，你弃置此牌，然后获得其一张牌。
skill_comfort_the_tribes.description_en: Once per Action Phase: You and another character each reveal 1 hand card simultaneously. If you revealed [Kill] and they did not reveal [Dodge], discard your [Kill] and deal 1 damage to them. If you did not reveal [Kill] and they revealed [Dodge], discard your card and take 1 of their cards.

skill_steadfast_will.description_cn: 锁定技，若你的体力值为1，你的【闪】视为【杀】
skill_steadfast_will.description_en: Locked: If your HP Value is 1, your [Dodge] cards are treated as [Kill].

skill_slumber_scheme.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以选择任意名攻击范围内含有主公的角色，然后弃置这些角色各一张牌并令其摸一张牌(无牌则不弃)；若如此做，你摸 X张牌(X为其中手牌比主公多的角色数)
skill_slumber_scheme.description_en: End Phase: Choose any number of characters whose Attack Range includes the Lord, discard 1 card from each and have them draw 1 card (skip discard if they have none). If you do, draw X cards (X = number of those characters with more hand cards than the Lord).

skill_bribe_for_survival.description_cn: 当你受到其他角色对你造成的伤害时，你可以令其观看你任意数量的牌并令其选择一项:1. 获得这些牌中的一张，防止此伤害，然后你不能再对其发动〖贿生〗；2.弃置等量的牌。
skill_bribe_for_survival.description_en: When another character deals damage to you, you may let them look at any number of your cards, then they choose one: 1. Take 1 of those cards, prevent this damage, and you can no longer activate 〖Bribe for Survival〗 against them; 2. Discard an equal number of cards.

skill_oversee_provisions.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以获得一名其他角色的一张手牌，然后选择一项:1.令其观看牌堆顶的两张牌，然后获得其中的基本牌:2.令其于其下个摸牌阶段多摸一张牌。
skill_oversee_provisions.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Take 1 hand card from another character, then choose one: 1. Let them look at the top 2 cards of the deck and keep any Basic cards; 2. Let them draw 1 extra card during their next Draw Phase.

skill_hidden_scales.description_cn: 锁定技，弃牌阶段内，你于此回合内获得的牌不计入你的手牌数。
skill_hidden_scales.description_en: Locked: During your Discard Phase, cards you gained this turn do not count toward your hand count.

skill_lasting_fortune.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以选择一项:1.摸牌阶段多摸一张牌；2.使用红色牌可以多选择一个目标。若与你上回合选择的选项不同，则该选项数值+1并复原此技能。
skill_lasting_fortune.description_en: Starting Phase: Choose one option: 1. Draw 1 extra card during your Draw Phase; 2. Red cards you use may target one additional character. If different from last turn's choice, that option's value increases by 1 and this skill Resets.

skill_idle_feast.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以令一名其他角色从牌堆中获得一张红桃基本牌，然后若其于上回合成为过该技能目标，则其失去1点体力。
skill_idle_feast.description_en: End Phase: Have another character take a Hearts Basic card from the deck. If they were a target of this skill last turn, they lose 1 HP.

skill_remonstrate.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定目标后，你可以与其拼点:若你赢，其不能响应此【杀】；当你成为【杀】的目标后， 你可以与使用者拼点:若你赢，此【杀】对你无效。
skill_remonstrate.description_en: After you use [Kill] and designate a target, you may initiate a Point Duel with them. If you win, they cannot respond to this [Kill]. When you become the target of [Kill], you may initiate a Point Duel with the User. If you win, that [Kill] is Nullified against you.

skill_counter_directly.description_cn: 攻击范围内包含你的角色使用【杀】指定目标时，若你不为此【杀】目标，你可以将一张手牌置于牌堆顶，取消之，然后若此【杀】不为黑色，你成为此【杀】目标。
skill_counter_directly.description_en: When a character within your Attack Range uses [Kill] and designates a target and you are not that target, you may place 1 hand card on top of the deck to Remove that target, then if that [Kill] is not Black, you become the target instead.

skill_heavenly_rhetoric.description_cn: 你可以用牌堆顶的牌拼点；你的红桃拼点牌点数视为K。
skill_heavenly_rhetoric.description_en: You may use the top card of the deck as your Point Duel card. Your Hearts Point Duel cards are treated as having rank K.

skill_hold_the_north.description_cn: 每轮开始时，你选择任意种花色，然后你本轮无法使用这些花色的牌且使用手牌后摸选择花色数张牌。
skill_hold_the_north.description_en: At the start of each round, choose any number of suits. This round you cannot use cards of those suits, but after using any hand card you draw a number of cards equal to the number of chosen suits.

skill_whirlwind.description_cn: 当你于弃牌阶段弃置过至少两张牌，或当你失去装备区里的牌后，你可以弃置至多两名其他角色的共计两张牌。
skill_whirlwind.description_en: When you discard at least 2 cards during your Discard Phase, or when you lose cards from your Equipment Zone, you may discard up to 2 cards total from up to 2 other characters.

skill_sweet_dew.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择两名装备区里的牌数之差不大于你已损失体力值数的角色，交换他们装备区里的牌。
skill_sweet_dew.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose 2 characters whose Equipment Zone card counts differ by no more than your HP Lost. Swap the contents of their Equipment Zones.

skill_supplement.description_cn: 一名角色进入濒死状态时，你可以展示其一张手牌，然后若此牌不为基本牌，则其弃置此牌，然后回复1点体力。
skill_supplement.description_en: When a character enters the Verge of Death State, you may reveal 1 of their hand cards. If it is not a Basic card, they discard it, then recover 1 HP.

skill_comfort_and_care.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择两名手牌数不同的其他角色，令其中手牌少的角色获得手牌多的角色的一张手牌并展示之，然后若以此法展示的牌不为黑桃，你摸一张牌。
skill_comfort_and_care.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose 2 other characters with different hand counts. Have the one with fewer cards take 1 hand card from the one with more and reveal it. If the revealed card is not Spades, draw 1 card.

skill_in_memoriam.description_cn: 当你死亡时，你可以令一名其他角色(杀死你的角色除外)摸三张牌，然后回复1点体力。
skill_in_memoriam.description_en: When you die, you may have another character (not the one who killed you) draw 3 cards and recover 1 HP.

skill_plague_fire.description_cn: 你使用的普通【杀】可以改为火【杀】，若此【杀】造成过伤害，你失去1点体力；你使用火【杀】可以多选择一个目标。
skill_plague_fire.description_en: Your normal [Kill] may become [Fire Kill]; if that [Fire Kill] deals damage, you lose 1 HP. Your [Fire Kill] may designate one additional target.

skill_aged_wine.description_cn: 结束阶段，若你没有「醇」，你可以将任意张【杀】置于武将牌上，称为「醇」；当一名角色处于濒死状态时，你可以移去一张「醇」 视为该角色使用一张【酒】。
skill_aged_wine.description_en: End Phase: If you have no 「Wine」 tokens, you may place any number of [Kill] cards on your character card as 「Wine」 tokens. When a character enters the Verge of Death State, you may remove 1 「Wine」 token to be treated as that character using [Wine].

skill_mounted_archery.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置一张牌使你本回合的攻击范围无限。若弃置的为装备牌，你可以弃置一名其他角色的一张牌。
skill_mounted_archery.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 1 card to make your Attack Range unlimited this turn. If the discarded card is an Equipment card, you may also discard 1 card from another character.

skill_seize_the_blade.description_cn: 当你受到【杀】造成的伤害后，你可以弃置一张牌，然后获得伤害来源装备区里的武器牌
skill_seize_the_blade.description_en: After a [Kill] deals damage to you, you may discard 1 card, then take the damage source's Weapon card from their Equipment Zone.

skill_arrow_from_the_dark.description_cn: 锁定技，当你使用杀】对目标角色造成伤害时，若你不在其攻击范围内，则此伤害+1。
skill_arrow_from_the_dark.description_en: Locked: When your [Kill] deals damage to the target, if they are not within their own Attack Range, the damage is increased by 1.

skill_release_the_esoteric.description_cn: 当你的牌因弃置而放入弃牌堆后，你可以将其中任意张牌置于牌堆顶。
skill_release_the_esoteric.description_en: After any of your cards are placed into the Discard Pile via discarding, you may place any of them on top of the deck.

skill_speak_plainly.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以令一名角色摸一张牌并展示之，若此牌为装备牌，则该角色使用此牌，然后其回复1点体力。
skill_speak_plainly.description_en: End Phase: You may have a character draw 1 card and reveal it. If it is an Equipment card, that character must Use it, then they recover 1 HP.

skill_steadfast_courage.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当你成为基本牌或锦囊牌的目标后，你可以摸X张牌为你本回合成为牌的目标次数)；当前合角色的结束阶段，若你本回合没有以此法摸牌，你可以弃置与其手牌数相同的牌数对其造成1点害。
skill_steadfast_courage.description_en: Once per turn: After you become the target of a Basic or Tool card, you may draw X cards (X = number of times you have been targeted by cards this turn). During the current turn character's End Phase, if you did not draw this way this turn, you may discard a number of cards equal to their hand count and deal 1 damage to them.

skill_act_with_caution.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以弃置两张牌，然后摸一张牌。
skill_act_with_caution.description_en: Action Phase: You may discard 2 cards, then draw 1 card.

skill_hold_to_the_one.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以展示所有手牌，若颜色均相同，你令至多名角色各摸一张牌(X为你的手牌数)。
skill_hold_to_the_one.description_en: End Phase: You may reveal all your hand cards. If they are all the same color, have up to X characters each draw 1 card (X = your hand count).

skill_slander.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，当你使用【杀】或黑色普通锦囊牌指定唯一目标时，你可以令另一名角色选择一项:交给你一张牌，然后代替你成为此牌的使用者；或也成为此牌的目标。
skill_slander.description_en: Once per Action Phase: When you use [Kill] or a Black Non Time-Delay Tool card targeting only one character, you may have another character choose one: give you 1 card and become the User of this card in your place; or also become a target.

skill_haughty_pride.description_cn: 当你受到男性角色造成的伤害时，你可以弃置一张装备牌，然后此伤害-1。
skill_haughty_pride.description_en: When you take damage from a Male character, you may discard 1 Equipment card, then reduce that damage by 1.

skill_inspired_drive.description_cn: 若你的手牌数为全场最多，你可以跳过摸牌阶段；若你的体力值为全场最多，你可以跳过出牌阶段；若你的装备区里有牌且数量为全场最多，你可以跳过弃牌阶段。
skill_inspired_drive.description_en: If your hand count is the highest on the field, you may skip your Draw Phase. If your HP Value is the highest, you may skip your Action Phase. If you have Equipment cards and the most of them on the field, you may skip your Discard Phase.

skill_pacify_the_rebels.description_cn: 回合结束时，你可以对至多名其他角色各造成1点伤害(X为你本回合跳过的阶段数)
skill_pacify_the_rebels.description_en: At the end of your turn, you may deal 1 damage to up to X other characters (X = number of Phases you skipped this turn).

skill_seek_renown.description_cn: 每回合每个选项限一次，当你造成或受到伤害后，你可以选择一项:1.弃置手牌数大于你的一名角色的一张手牌；2.令手牌数小于你的一名角色摸一张牌；3.令手牌数与你相同的角色弃置至多两张牌然后摸等量的牌
skill_seek_renown.description_en: Once per option per turn: After you deal or receive damage, choose one: 1. Discard 1 hand card from a character with more hand cards than you; 2. Have a character with fewer hand cards than you draw 1 card; 3. Have a character with the same hand count as you discard up to 2 cards then draw the same number.

skill_banquet_purge.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以令一名其他角色选择一项:1.令你获得其装备区里的所有牌，你失去〖宴诛〗并将〖兴学〗的描述中X改为你的体力上限；2.弃置一张牌。
skill_banquet_purge.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Have another character choose one: 1. You take all cards from their Equipment Zone, lose 〖Banquet Purge〗, and 〖Promote Learning〗's X becomes your Max HP; 2. Discard 1 card.

skill_promote_learning.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以选择至多名角色(X为你的体力值)，令这些角色依次摸一张牌并将一张牌置于牌堆顶。
skill_promote_learning.description_en: End Phase: Choose up to X characters (X = your HP Value) and have each draw 1 card then place 1 card on top of the deck, one at a time.

skill_imperial_edict.description_cn: 主公技，锁定技，你距离为1的角色视为在其他吴势力角色的攻击范围内。
skill_imperial_edict.description_en: Lord Skill — Locked: Characters at distance 1 from you are treated as being within the Attack Range of all other Wu faction characters.

skill_pacify_the_realm.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择其他角色场上的一张装备牌并令其获得之，然后若其攻击范围内的角色因此而变少，则你摸一张牌。
skill_pacify_the_realm.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose an Equipment card from another character's zone and have them equip it; if their Attack Range decreases as a result, draw 1 card.

skill_extreme_excess.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以摸一张牌，然后本回合你的手牌上限-1；结束阶段，若你没有手牌，则你可以横置最多名角色的武将牌(为你的体力值)。
skill_extreme_excess.description_en: Action Phase: You may draw 1 card, then your Hand Limit decreases by 1 this turn. End Phase: If you have no hand cards, you may place up to X characters into the Chain State (X = your HP Value).

skill_chain_calamity.description_cn: 锁定技，当你受到火焰伤害时，若你处于「连环状态」且你是传导伤害的起点，则此伤害+1。
skill_chain_calamity.description_en: Locked: When you take Fire damage while in the Chain State and you are the starting point of chain propagation, that damage is increased by 1.

skill_loyal_counsel.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以令一名其他角色将至多三张牌置于你的武将牌上。你的下回合开始时， 你获得这些牌，然后该角色摸等量的牌。
skill_loyal_counsel.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Have another character place up to 3 of their cards on your character card. At the start of your next turn, take those cards, then that character draws the same number.

skill_divine_the_hexagram.description_cn: 所有角色出牌阶段限一次，其可以交给你一张牌，然后你可以将此牌置于牌堆顶或牌堆底，你与其从另一端摸一张牌。
skill_divine_the_hexagram.description_en: Once per Action Phase per character: A character may give you 1 card, then you may place it on top or bottom of the deck; you and that character each draw 1 card from the other end.

skill_hidden_execution.description_cn: 一名男性角色的结束阶段内，若牌堆剩余牌数小于等于你体力值的十倍，则你可以依次对其使用牌堆中所有的【杀】
skill_hidden_execution.description_en: During a Male character's End Phase, if the remaining deck size is ≤ 10× your HP Value, you may use all [Kill] in the deck against that character one at a time.

skill_retort.description_cn: 其他角色使用或打出牌响应你使用的牌时，你可令其获得你使用的牌(其本回合不能使用或打出这张牌)，然后你获得其使用或打出的牌。
skill_retort.description_en: When another character Uses or Plays a card to respond to your card, you may have them keep your card (they cannot Use or Play it this turn), then you take theirs.

skill_stern_teaching.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可令一名其他角色摸等同于场上方块牌数的牌，然后弃置X张牌(X为此前该技能发动过的次数)。若有角色因此法弃置了所有牌，则你失去「诚训」，然后你发动〖复难〗时，无须令其获得你使用的牌。
skill_stern_teaching.description_en: End Phase: You may have another character draw cards equal to the number of Diamonds cards on the field, then discard X cards (X = number of times this skill has been activated before). If any character discards all their cards this way, you lose 〖Stern Teaching〗 and when activating 〖Retort〗 you no longer need to give them your card.

skill_brilliant_stratagem.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将所有手牌当任意一张普通锦囊牌使用。
skill_brilliant_stratagem.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Use all your hand cards as any one Non Time-Delay Tool card.

skill_wisdom_in_folly.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以摸一张牌，然后展示所有手牌，若颜色均相同，伤害来源弃置一张手牌。
skill_wisdom_in_folly.description_en: After you take damage, you may draw 1 card, then reveal all your hand cards. If they are all the same color, the damage source discards 1 hand card.

skill_command_the_army.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可交给一名其他角色一张牌，令其使用一张非黑色的【杀】:若其执行，则此【杀】结算后你摸一张牌，若此【杀】造成伤害，你额外摸伤害值数张牌:若其不执行，则你可对其或其攻击范围内的一名角色造成1点伤害。
skill_command_the_army.description_en: At the start of your Action Phase: Give another character 1 card and have them use 1 non-Black [Kill]. If they do, draw 1 card after that [Kill] resolves; if it dealt damage, draw additional cards equal to the damage value. If they do not, you may deal 1 damage to them or a character within their Attack Range.

skill_fallen_petals.description_cn: 其他角色的梅花牌因弃置或判定而放入弃牌堆后， 你可以选择其中的任意张获得之。
skill_fallen_petals.description_en: After another character's Clubs card is placed into the Discard Pile via discarding or Judgment, you may choose any of those cards to gain.

skill_wine_and_poetry.description_cn: 若你的武将牌正面向上，你可以翻面，视为使用一张【酒】；若你的武将牌背面向上，你受到伤害后可以翻面
skill_wine_and_poetry.description_en: If your General Card is face-up, you may Flip over and be treated as using [Wine]. If your General Card is face-down, after you take damage you may Flip over.

skill_chaste_resolve.description_cn: 当你成为其他角色示或普通锦囊牌的目标后， 你可以失去1点体力令此牌对你无效，然后你弃置其一张牌。
skill_chaste_resolve.description_en: After you become the target of another character's [Kill] or Non Time-Delay Tool card, you may lose 1 HP to Nullify that card against you, then discard 1 of their cards.

skill_secret_plan.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以漠张牌(X为你已损失的体力值)，然后你可以将等量的手牌交给其他角色。
skill_secret_plan.description_en: End Phase: You may draw X cards (X = your HP Lost), then give an equal number of hand cards to other characters.

skill_weigh_the_elephant.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以亮出牌堆顶的四张牌，然后你获得其中的任意张点数之和不大于 13的牌。
skill_weigh_the_elephant.description_en: After you take damage, you may flip the top 4 cards of the deck face-up, then take any whose combined rank total is ≤ 13.

skill_benevolent_heart.description_cn: 当其他体力值为1的角色受到伤害时，你可以翻面并弃置一张装备牌，然后防止此伤害。
skill_benevolent_heart.description_en: When another character with HP Value 1 takes damage, you may Flip over your General Card and discard 1 Equipment card to prevent that damage.

skill_refined_strategy.description_cn: 结束阶段，若你于此回合内使用过的牌数量大于等于你的体力值，则你可以摸两张牌。
skill_refined_strategy.description_en: End Phase: If the number of cards you used this turn is ≥ your HP Value, you may draw 2 cards.

skill_severe_punishment.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置任意张手牌并选择一名其他角色，然后令其选择一项:1.弃置与你弃置的牌类别均不同的一张手牌；2.翻面，然后将手牌摸至四张。
skill_severe_punishment.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard any number of hand cards and choose another character. They must choose one: 1. Discard 1 hand card of a different type from each of yours; 2. Flip over, then draw until they have 4 hand cards.

skill_defensive_plan.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以展示一张手牌，然后除非伤害来源弃置与你展示的牌类别不同的一张手牌，否则你回复1点体力。
skill_defensive_plan.description_en: After you take damage, you may reveal 1 hand card. Unless the damage source discards 1 hand card of a different type, you recover 1 HP.

skill_counter_the_enemy.description_cn: 其他角色出牌阶段开始时，你可以弃置一张非基本牌(须与你装备区里的牌颜色相同)，然后该角色不能使用和打出与此牌颜色相同的牌。此阶段结束时，若其没有使用【杀】，视为你对其使用一张【杀
skill_counter_the_enemy.description_en: At the start of another character's Action Phase, you may discard 1 non-Basic card matching the color of a card in your Equipment Zone; if so, that character cannot Use or Play cards of that color this phase. At the end of their phase, if they did not use [Kill], you are treated as using [Kill] against them.

skill_rank_and_grade.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以弃置一张牌并选择一名其他角色(不能弃置相同类型牌且不能指定相同的角色)，然后令其执行一项:摸张牌；弃置张牌(为本回合此技能发动次数)。若其已受伤，则你横置。
skill_rank_and_grade.description_en: Action Phase: Discard 1 card and choose another character (cannot repeat card type or target this turn). They must choose: draw X cards; or discard X cards (X = number of times this skill was activated this turn). If they are Wounded, you are placed into the Chain State.

skill_grace_of_law.description_cn: 当一名角色翻至正面或横置后，你可以令其摸一张牌。
skill_grace_of_law.description_en: When a character is Reset or placed into the Chain State, you may have them draw 1 card.

skill_cautious_judgment.description_cn: 当你的一张黑色基本牌因弃置而放入弃牌堆后，你可以将此牌当无距离限制的【兵粮寸断】使用。
skill_cautious_judgment.description_en: After one of your Black Basic cards is placed into the Discard Pile via discarding, you may use it as [Starvation] with no distance restriction.

skill_valiant_stratagem.description_cn: 其他角色的判定阶段开始时，若其在你攻击范围内，你可以弃置其判定区里的一张牌，然后视为你对其使用一张【杀】，若此【杀】没有造成过伤害，则你摸一张牌。
skill_valiant_stratagem.description_en: At the start of another character's Judgment Phase, if they are within your Attack Range, you may discard 1 of their Judgment Zone cards, then be treated as using [Kill] against them. If that [Kill] dealt no damage, draw 1 card.

skill_expand_and_restore.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以令一名角色判定，若结果为:红色，其回复1点体力；黑色，其摸X张牌 (X为伤害值)。
skill_expand_and_restore.description_en: After you take damage, you may have a character make a Judgment. If the result is Red, they recover 1 HP. If Black, they draw X cards (X = damage value).

skill_clear_discernment.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将所有手牌交给一名其他角色，然后该角色下回合的手牌上限+1，且出牌阶段内可以多使用一张【杀】
skill_clear_discernment.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Give all your hand cards to another character. Their Hand Limit is +1 and they may use 1 additional [Kill] during their next Action Phase.

skill_rise_and_fall.description_cn: 主公技，限定技，当你进入濒死状态时，你可令其他魏势力角色依次选择是否令你回复1点体力。选择是的角色在此次濒死结算结束后受到1点伤害
skill_rise_and_fall.description_en: Lord Skill — Limited: When you enter the Verge of Death State, other Wei faction characters each choose whether to restore 1 HP to you one at a time. Each character who does takes 1 damage after this Verge of Death Resolution ends.

skill_thousand_steeds.description_cn: 锁定技，你计算与其他角色的距离-X(X为你已损失的体力值)
skill_thousand_steeds.description_en: Locked: Your distance to other characters is reduced by X (X = your HP Lost).

skill_devastating_raid.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】对目标角色造成伤害时，若你的装备区里有武器牌，你可令其选择一项:弃置等同于此武器牌攻击范围张数的手牌，然后弃置此牌；或令此伤害+1。
skill_devastating_raid.description_en: When your [Kill] deals damage to a target, if you have a Weapon in your Equipment Zone, you may have them choose one: discard a number of hand cards equal to that weapon's Attack Range, then discard that weapon; or increase that damage by 1.

skill_living_ink.description_cn: 每回合每种基本牌限一次，你可以将一张黑色的非基本牌置于牌堆顶，视为使用任意基本牌。
skill_living_ink.description_en: Once per Basic card type per turn: Place 1 Black non-Basic card on top of the deck to be treated as using any Basic card.

skill_steadying_aid.description_cn: 其他角色于其出牌阶段内使用黑桃牌指定目标后， 若没有角色于此阶段内受到过伤害，则你可以令其中的一个目标摸一张牌。
skill_steadying_aid.description_en: After another character uses a Spades card and designates targets during their Action Phase, if no character has taken damage this phase, you may have one of those targets draw 1 card.

skill_forged_decree.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以展示一张手牌，然后选择一名距离最近的其他角色，其声明一种基本牌的牌名，本回合你可以将此牌当声明的牌使用（不能指定自己为目标）。
skill_forged_decree.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Reveal 1 hand card, then choose the nearest other character. They declare a Basic card name — you may use that revealed card as the declared card this turn (cannot target yourself).

skill_devoted_mind.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以摸一张牌或修改〖矫诏〗。
skill_devoted_mind.description_en: After you take damage, you may draw 1 card or modify 〖Forged Decree〗.

skill_forged_decree_ii.description_cn: （第一次修改后）出牌阶段限一次，你可以展示一张手牌，然后选择一名距离最近的其他角色，其声明一种基本牌或普通锦囊牌的牌名，本回合你可以将此牌当声明的牌使用（不能指定自己为目标）。
skill_forged_decree_ii.description_en: (After first modification) Once per Action Phase: Reveal 1 hand card, then choose the nearest other character. They declare a Basic or Non Time-Delay Tool card name — you may use that revealed card as the declared card this turn (cannot target yourself).

skill_forged_decree_iii.description_cn: （第二次修改后）出牌阶段限一次，你可以展示一张手牌，然后声明一种基本牌或普通锦囊牌的牌名，本回合你可以将此牌当声明的牌使用（不能指定自己为目标）。
skill_forged_decree_iii.description_en: (After second modification) Once per Action Phase: Reveal 1 hand card and declare a Basic or Non Time-Delay Tool card name — you may use that revealed card as the declared card this turn (cannot target yourself).

skill_ornate_composition.description_cn: 若你于弃牌阶段弃置过至少两张牌且这些牌花色均不相同，则你可以回复1点体力或摸一张牌。
skill_ornate_composition.description_en: If during your Discard Phase you discarded at least 2 cards of different suits, you may recover 1 HP or draw 1 card.

skill_mock_the_flatterer.description_cn: 出牌阶段每名角色限一次，若你有可以使用的手牌，你可以令一名角色ù置一张牌，然后本回合你不能使用与之相同花色的牌。若其以此法弃置的牌为黑桃，其失去1点体力，你翻面。
skill_mock_the_flatterer.description_en: Once per character per Action Phase: If you have hand cards you can use, have a character discard 1 card; this turn you cannot use cards of the same suit as their discarded card. If they discarded Spades, they lose 1 HP and you Flip over.

skill_loyal_discernment.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以展示一张手牌，然后展示一名其他角色至多三张手牌。对比你与其展示的牌，每有一张牌花色相同，你摸一张牌；每有一张牌点数相同，你对其造成1点伤害；每有一张牌花色点数均不同，你弃置一张手牌。
skill_loyal_discernment.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Reveal 1 of your hand cards, then reveal up to 3 hand cards from another character. For each pair of cards sharing a suit, draw 1 card; for each pair sharing a rank, deal 1 damage to them; for each pair sharing neither, discard 1 hand card.

skill_gifted_insight.description_cn: 摸牌阶段开始时，你可以选择一项:1.少摸一张牌，然后本回合〖忠鉴〗可多展示自己一张手牌；2.本回合手牌上限-1，然后本回合〖忠鉴〗可多展示目标角色一张牌:3.多摸两张牌，然后本回合不能发动〖忠鉴〗。
skill_gifted_insight.description_en: At the start of your Draw Phase, choose one: 1. Draw 1 fewer card; 〖Loyal Discernment〗 may reveal 1 extra card of yours this turn; 2. Your Hand Limit -1 this turn; 〖Loyal Discernment〗 may reveal 1 extra card from the target this turn; 3. Draw 2 extra cards; you cannot activate 〖Loyal Discernment〗 this turn.

skill_pure_strings.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置至多张牌，然后选择名其他角色(X为已损失的体力值)，比较他们各自装备区内的牌数与手牌数:装备牌数较多，失去 1点体力；手牌数较多，回复1点体力；相同，摸一张牌。
skill_pure_strings.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard up to X cards, then choose X other characters (X = your HP Lost). Compare each character's Equipment Zone card count to their hand count: more equipment than hand — they lose 1 HP; more hand than equipment — they recover 1 HP; equal — they draw 1 card.

skill_final_melody.description_cn: 当你死亡时，你可以将牌堆中的所有牌移出游戏，然后令一名角色摸两张牌；当前回合角色的下个回合开始时，将被移出的梅花牌移回游戏
skill_final_melody.description_en: When you die, you may Remove from the Game all cards remaining in the deck, then have a character draw 2 cards. At the start of the current turn character's next turn, return all removed Clubs cards to the game.

skill_bright_stratagem.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将一张装备牌或【杀】交给一名其他角色，然后其选择一项:视为对其攻击范围内你选择的另一名角色使用【杀】:摸一张牌。
skill_bright_stratagem.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Give another character 1 Equipment card or [Kill], then they choose one: be treated as using [Kill] on another character within their Attack Range that you designate; or draw 1 card.

skill_delayed_wisdom.description_cn: 锁定技，当你于回合外受到伤害后，本回合【杀】和普通锦囊牌对你无效。
skill_delayed_wisdom.description_en: Locked: After you take damage outside your turn, [Kill] and Non Time-Delay Tool cards are Nullified against you for the rest of this turn.

skill_charge_the_phalanx.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以与一名角色拼点。若你赢，直到回合结束，你无视该角色的防具，且对该角色使用牌没有距离和次数限制；若你没赢， 本回合你不能使用【杀】。
skill_charge_the_phalanx.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Initiate a Point Duel with a character. If you win, until the end of your turn: Ignore their Armor and have no distance or count restrictions against them. If you lose, you cannot use [Kill] this turn.

skill_forbid_wine.description_en: Locked: Your [Wine] cards are treated as [Kill].

skill_self_preservation.description_cn: 摸牌阶段，你可以多摸X张牌(X为全场势力数)，然后本回合你不能对其他角色使用牌。
skill_self_preservation.description_en: Draw Phase: You may draw X additional cards (X = number of surviving factions), then you cannot use cards targeting other characters this turn.

skill_imperial_clan.description_cn: 锁定技，你的手牌上限+X(X为全场势力数)。
skill_imperial_clan.description_en: Locked: Your Hand Limit is increased by X (X = number of surviving factions).

skill_seek_aid.description_cn: 当你成为【杀】的目标时，你可以令另一名其他角色交给你一张【闪】，否则也成为此【杀】的目标。
skill_seek_aid.description_en: When you become the target of [Kill], you may have another character give you 1 [Dodge]; if they do not, they also become a target of that [Kill].

skill_eavesdrop.description_cn: 其他角色的回合结束时，若其于此回合内没有对除其外的角色使用过牌，则你可以选择一项:1.将其装备区里的一张牌放入你的装备区:2.摸一张牌。
skill_eavesdrop.description_en: At the end of another character's turn, if they used no cards targeting characters other than themselves this turn, choose one: 1. Move 1 of their Equipment Zone cards into your Equipment Zone; 2. Draw 1 card.

skill_offer_the_province.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可以将装备区里的所有牌交给一名其他角色，然后该角色选择一项:1.令你回复点体力；2.对其攻击范围内的至多名角色各造成1点伤害。(X为你以此法交给该角色的牌的数量)
skill_offer_the_province.description_en: Limited: During your Action Phase, give all your Equipment Zone cards to another character, then they choose one: 1. Let you recover X HP; 2. Deal 1 damage to up to X characters within their Attack Range (X = number of cards given).

skill_harbour_treachery.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以展示所有手牌。若不为同一颜色，则你弃置其中一种颜色的牌，然后获得至多名角色的各一张牌(X为你以此法弃置的手牌数)。若你获得的牌大于一张，则你失去 1点体力。
skill_harbour_treachery.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Reveal all your hand cards. If they are not all one color, discard all cards of one color, then take 1 card from each of up to X characters (X = number of cards discarded). If you take more than 1 card, lose 1 HP.

skill_hasty_attack.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以模两张牌，然后你本回合的手牌上限等于你此阶段造成的伤害值。
skill_hasty_attack.description_en: At the start of your Action Phase: Draw 2 cards, then your Hand Limit this phase equals the total damage you deal this phase.

skill_cover_ones_tracks.description_cn: 当你需要使用或打出【闪】时，你可以令当前回合角色摸一张牌，然后若其手牌不是唯一最多，则你弃置最多的角色一张牌，视为你使用或打出一张【闪】
skill_cover_ones_tracks.description_en: When you need to Use or Play [Dodge], you may have the current turn character draw 1 card. Then, if their hand count is not the sole highest, discard 1 card from the character with the most hand cards and be treated as having Used or Played [Dodge].

skill_stop_the_blade.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择一名攻击范围内含有你的其他角色，除非该角色交给你一张【杀】或武器牌，否则视为对其攻击范围内你选择的另一名角色使用一张【杀】。
skill_stop_the_blade.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose another character who has you within their Attack Range. Unless they give you 1 [Kill] or Weapon card, you are treated as using [Kill] on another character within their Attack Range that you designate.

skill_dynastic_legacy.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，你加点体力和体力上限(为全场势力数)，当某势力的最后一名角色死亡后，你减1点体力上限并摸两张牌
skill_dynastic_legacy.description_en: Locked: At the start of the game, increase your HP and Max HP by X (X = number of surviving factions). When the last character of a faction dies, reduce your Max HP by 1 and draw 2 cards.

skill_tidal_chaos.description_cn: 你可将一张牌当做任意一张本回合没使用过的基本牌或普通锦囊牌使用，然后你令一名其他角色选择一项:1.交给你张与〖滔乱〗牌类别不同的牌；2.你失去X点体力，〖滔乱〗无效直到回合结束(X为你本回合发动〖滔乱〗 的次数且最多为3)。
skill_tidal_chaos.description_en: You may use 1 card as any Basic or Non Time-Delay Tool card not yet used this turn, then have another character choose one: 1. Give you X cards of a different type from your 〖Tidal Chaos〗 card; 2. You lose X HP and 〖Tidal Chaos〗 is disabled until end of turn (X = number of times 〖Tidal Chaos〗 was activated this turn, max 3).

skill_guard_the_seal.description_cn: 当你成为【杀】的目标后，你可声明一种牌名 (每种牌名限一次)，然后除非使用者弃置一张你声明的牌，并获得你的一张牌，否则此【杀】无效。
skill_guard_the_seal.description_en: After you become the target of [Kill], you may declare a card name (each name once only). Unless the User discards 1 card of that name and takes 1 of your cards, that [Kill] is Nullified.

skill_benefit_the_people.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以摸张牌(X为手牌数小于其体力值的角色数)，然后展示等量的手牌，从你选择的一名角色开始依次获得其中一张。
skill_benefit_the_people.description_en: End Phase: Draw X cards (X = number of characters whose hand count is less than their HP Value), then reveal the same number of hand cards. Starting from a character you choose, each character takes 1 of the revealed cards one at a time.

skill_compile_texts.description_cn: 当你使用牌后，或当你成为其他角色使用牌的目标后，你可以将牌堆顶的一张牌置于武将牌上，称为「书」；你至多拥有四张「书」，你每有一张「书」，手牌上限便+1。
skill_compile_texts.description_en: After you use a card, or after you become the target of another character's card, you may place the top card of the deck on your character card as a 「Scroll」 token. You may hold up to 4 「Scroll」 tokens; your Hand Limit is +1 per 「Scroll」.

skill_wide_learning.description_cn: 摸牌阶段摸牌后，你可以用任意张牌替换等量的 「书」，然后若你的「书」包含四种花色，你将所有「书」交给任意名其他角色。
skill_wide_learning.description_en: After drawing cards during your Draw Phase, you may exchange any number of hand cards for an equal number of 「Scroll」 tokens. If your 「Scroll」 tokens then include all four suits, give all 「Scroll」 tokens to any number of other characters.

skill_righteous_refusal.description_cn: 锁定技，其他角色使用牌指定你为唯一目标后，你弃置一张牌。
skill_righteous_refusal.description_en: Locked: After another character uses a card and designates you as the only target, you discard 1 card.

skill_guard_the_state.description_cn: 每回合结束时，你可以依次使用本回合因弃置而置入弃牌堆的牌直到你使用了其他角色弃置的牌。若你的手牌数不为全场唯一最多，每有一张本回合弃置的牌没有使用，你便摸一张牌(至多摸五张)。
skill_guard_the_state.description_en: At the end of each turn, you may use, one at a time, cards placed into the Discard Pile this turn via discarding, stopping when you Use a card that was discarded by another character. For each discarded card not Used this way, if your hand count is not the sole highest, draw 1 card (up to 5).

skill_trepidation.description_cn: 其他角色的回合开始时，若你已受伤，你可以与其拼点:若你赢，本回合该角色只能对自己使用牌:若你没赢，本回合其与你的距离视为1。
skill_trepidation.description_en: At the start of another character's turn, if you are Wounded, you may initiate a Point Duel with them. If you win, they can only use cards targeting themselves this turn. If you lose, their distance to you is treated as 1 this turn.

skill_dispel_vexation.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可以选择一名角色，令能攻击到该角色的所有角色选择一项:弃置一张武器牌；或令该角色摸一张牌。
skill_dispel_vexation.description_en: Limited: During your Action Phase, choose a character. All characters who have them within their Attack Range each choose one: discard 1 Weapon card; or let that character draw 1 card.

skill_jx_benevolence.description_cn: 出牌阶段，每名角色限一次，你可以交给一名其他角色任意张手牌。当你本阶段以此法给出第二张牌时，你可以视为使用一张基本牌。（使用【杀】有次数限制）
skill_jx_benevolence.description_en: Once per character per Action Phase: Give any number of hand cards to another character. When you give your 2nd card this phase, you may be treated as using 1 Basic card (subject to [Kill] count limits).

skill_severing_bonds.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置一张牌，然后令一名其他角色展示一张手牌。若此牌为：黑色，其本回合非锁定技失效且不能使用或打出手牌，你本回合对其使用的红桃【杀】伤害+1；红色，你获得之，然后你可以令其回复1点体力。
skill_severing_bonds.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 1 card and have another character reveal 1 hand card. If Black: their non-Locked skills are Nullified and they cannot Use or Play hand cards this turn; your Hearts [Kill] deals +1 damage to them this turn. If Red: you gain the card, then may have them recover 1 HP.

skill_jx_saint_of_war.description_cn: 你可以将一张红色牌当【杀】使用或打出。你使用的方片【杀】无距离限制。
skill_jx_saint_of_war.description_en: You may Use or Play any red card as [Kill]. Your Diamonds [Kill] has no distance restriction.

skill_body_double.description_cn: 出牌阶段结束时，你可发动此技能。你弃置所有锦囊牌和坐骑牌。然后直到你的下回合开始，获得所有以你为目标且未对你造成伤害的【杀】。
skill_body_double.description_en: At the end of your Action Phase, you may activate this skill: discard all Tool and Mount cards from your hand, then until the start of your next turn, gain all [Kill] cards that target you but deal no damage.

skill_jx_roar.description_cn: 锁定技，你使用【杀】无次数限制。你的出牌阶段，若你于当前阶段内使用过【杀】，你于此阶段使用【杀】无距离限制。
skill_jx_roar.description_en: Locked: You may Use [Kill] any number of times. During your Action Phase, if you have already used [Kill] this phase, your [Kill] has no distance restriction.

skill_jx_read_the_stars.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以观看牌堆顶的五张牌（存活人数小于4时改为三张），然后以任意顺序放回牌堆顶或牌堆底。若你将这些牌均放至牌堆底，则结束阶段你可以再进行一次“观星”。
skill_jx_read_the_stars.description_en: Starting Phase: You may look at the top 5 cards of the deck (3 cards if fewer than 4 players remain alive), then return them in any order to the top or bottom of the deck. If you place all of them at the bottom, you may perform 〖Read the Stars〗 again during your End Phase.

skill_edge_of_the_horizon.description_cn: 当你于回合外使用或打出手牌时，你可以展示牌堆顶一张牌并将其交给任意一名角色。若这两张牌类别不同，你弃置一张牌。
skill_edge_of_the_horizon.description_en: When you Use or Play a hand card outside your turn, you may reveal the top card of the deck and give it to any character. If that card and the card you Used or Played are of different types, you must discard 1 card.

skill_jx_iron_cavalry.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定一个目标后，你可令其本回合内非锁定技失效，然后你进行判定，除非该角色弃置与结果花色相同的一张牌，否则不能使用【闪】响应此【杀】。
skill_jx_iron_cavalry.description_en: After your [Kill] designates a target, you may Nullify their non-Locked skills for this turn, then perform a Judgment: unless they discard a card matching the Judgment result's suit, they cannot Use [Dodge] to respond to this [Kill].

skill_jx_extraordinary_talent.description_cn: 锁定技，你使用锦囊牌无距离限制。当其他角色弃置你装备区里的防具或宝物牌时，你防止之。
skill_jx_extraordinary_talent.description_en: Locked: Tool cards you use have no distance restriction. When another character discards an Armor or Treasure card from your Equipment Zone, prevent that discard.

skill_fierce_archery.description_cn: 你使用【杀】可选择在此【杀】点数距离内的角色为目标。当你使用【杀】指定目标后，你可以根据下列条件执行相应的效果：1.若你的手牌数大于等于其手牌数，该角色不能使用【闪】；2.若你的体力值小于等于其体力值，此【杀】伤害+1。
skill_fierce_archery.description_en: Your [Kill] may target any character within a distance equal to its rank value. After your [Kill] designates a target, you may apply one or both of the following conditions: 1. If your hand count is ≥ theirs, they cannot Use [Dodge]; 2. If your HP Value is ≤ theirs, this [Kill] deals +1 damage.

skill_bloodthirst.description_cn: 当你对距离1以内的一名角色造成1点伤害后，你可以回复1点体力或摸一张牌。
skill_bloodthirst.description_en: After you deal 1 damage to a character within distance 1, you may recover 1 HP or draw 1 card.

skill_chain_links.description_cn: 你可以将一张梅花手牌当【铁索连环】使用，或重铸一张梅花手牌；你使用【铁索连环】可以额外指定一名角色为目标。
skill_chain_links.description_en: You may use a Clubs hand card as [Iron Shackles], or Reforge a Clubs hand card. When you Use [Iron Shackles], you may designate one additional target.

skill_nirvana.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段或当你处于濒死状态时，你可以弃置你的区域里的所有牌，摸三张牌，体力回复至3点，并复原你的武将牌。
skill_nirvana.description_en: Limited: During your Action Phase, or when you are in the Verge of Death State, you may discard all cards from your zones, draw 3 cards, recover your HP to 3, and Reset your General Card.

skill_feign_weakness.description_cn: 锁定技，弃牌阶段开始时，若你本回合未使用过锦囊牌，你的锦囊牌不计入手牌上限。
skill_feign_weakness.description_en: Locked: At the start of your Discard Phase, if you did not Use any Tool card this turn, your Tool cards do not count toward your Hand Limit.

skill_jx_fire_stratagem.description_cn: 你可以将一张红色牌当【火攻】使用。你的【火攻】改为令目标展示随机手牌，你弃置与展示牌颜色相同的牌以造成伤害。
skill_jx_fire_stratagem.description_en: You may Use any red card as [Incendiary]. When using [Incendiary] this way, the target reveals a random hand card instead; if you discard a card matching that card's color, [Incendiary] deals its damage to them.

skill_jx_see_through.description_cn: 你可以将一张黑色牌当【无懈可击】使用。你的【无懈可击】不能被响应。
skill_jx_see_through.description_en: You may Use any black card as [Nullification]. Your [Nullification] cannot be responded to.

skill_provoke.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择一名其他角色，然后除非该角色对你使用一张【杀】，否则你弃置其一张牌。
skill_provoke.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose another character — unless they Use [Kill] against you, you discard 1 of their cards.

skill_inherit_the_will.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若你没有手牌，你回复1点体力或摸两张牌，然后减1点体力上限，获得“观星”
skill_inherit_the_will.description_en: Awakening: Starting Phase, if you have no hand cards, recover 1 HP or draw 2 cards, reduce your Max HP by 1, then gain 〖Read the Stars〗.

skill_idle_pleasure.description_cn: 锁定技，当你成为一名角色使用【杀】的目标后，除非该角色弃置一张基本牌，否则此【杀】对你无效。
skill_idle_pleasure.description_en: Locked: When you are the target of [Kill], that [Kill] has no effect unless the User first discards 1 Basic card.

skill_abdicate.description_cn: 你可以跳过出牌阶段，若如此做，则你本回合手牌上限等于你的体力上限值，然后此回合结束时，你可以弃置一张手牌并令一名其他角色获得一个额外的回合。
skill_abdicate.description_en: You may skip your Action Phase. If you do, your Hand Limit this turn equals your Max HP. Then at the end of this turn, you may discard 1 hand card and have another character take an extra turn.

skill_feign_foolishness.description_cn: 主公技，觉醒技，准备阶段，若你是体力值最小的角色，你增加1点体力上限，回复1点体力，然后获得“激将”。
skill_feign_foolishness.description_en: Lord Skill — Awakening: Starting Phase, if you have the lowest HP Value on the field, increase your Max HP by 1, recover 1 HP, then gain 〖Rally the Vanguard〗.

skill_ringleader.description_cn: 锁定技，【南蛮入侵】对你无效；当其他角色使用【南蛮入侵】指定目标后，你代替其成为此牌造成的伤害的来源。
skill_ringleader.description_en: Locked: [Barbarians] has no effect on you. When another character uses [Barbarians] and designates targets, you replace them as the damage source for that card.

skill_rise_again.description_cn: 弃牌阶段结束时，你可以令至多X名角色各选择一项（X为本回合内置入弃牌堆的红色牌数量）：摸一张牌；令你回复1点体力。
skill_rise_again.description_en: At the end of your Discard Phase, you may have up to X characters each choose one: draw 1 card; or let you recover 1 HP (X = number of red cards placed into the Discard Pile this turn).

skill_war_elephants.description_cn: 锁定技，【南蛮入侵】对你无效；当其他角色使用的【南蛮入侵】结算结束后，你获得之。
skill_war_elephants.description_en: Locked: [Barbarians] has no effect on you. After another character's [Barbarians] finishes resolving, you gain that card.

skill_blazing_blade.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定目标后，你可以与目标角色拼点，若你：赢，你获得其一张牌；没赢，你与其交换拼点的牌。
skill_blazing_blade.description_en: After your [Kill] designates a target, you may initiate a Point Duel with them. If you win: take 1 of their cards. If you lose: swap the Point Duel cards with them.

skill_punish_the_wicked.description_cn: 其他角色的结束阶段，若其本回合造成过伤害，你可以对其使用一张【杀】。
skill_punish_the_wicked.description_en: During another character's End Phase, if that character dealt damage this turn, you may Use a [Kill] against them.

skill_deep_focus.description_cn: 觉醒技，当你造成伤害后，若你已受伤，你减少1点体力上限并获得“荐言”。
skill_deep_focus.description_en: Awakening: After you deal damage, if you are Wounded, reduce your Max HP by 1, then gain 〖Recommendation〗.

skill_recommendation.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择一种牌的类别或颜色，然后亮出牌堆顶的一张牌，若此牌不为此类别或颜色，你重复此流程。你令一名男性角色获得最后亮出的此类别或颜色的牌，然后将其余亮出的牌置入弃牌堆
skill_recommendation.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose a card type or color, then reveal the top card of the deck. If that card is not of the chosen type or color, repeat this process. A Male character gains the last revealed card of the matching type or color; place the remaining revealed cards into the Discard Pile.

skill_jx_covert_strike.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以摸一张牌并展示一张牌。若如此做，距离为1的其他角色本回合不能使用或打出与“潜袭”牌颜色相同的手牌，你本回合使用“潜袭”牌造成的伤害+1。
skill_jx_covert_strike.description_en: Starting Phase: You may draw and reveal 1 card. If you do, characters at distance 1 from you cannot Use or Play hand cards of the same color as the revealed card this turn, and your cards of that color deal +1 damage this turn.

skill_jx_beguile.description_cn: 摸牌阶段结束时，你可以交给一名其他角色两张牌，令其选择一项：1.对你指定的另一名角色使用一张【杀】；2.你观看其手牌并获得其两张牌。
skill_jx_beguile.description_en: At the end of your Draw Phase, you may give 2 cards to another character. They choose one: 1. Use [Kill] on a character you designate within their Attack Range; 2. You look at their hand and take 2 of their cards.

skill_jx_gratitude_and_grudges.description_cn: 当你获得一名其他角色至少两张牌后，你可以令其摸一张牌。当你受到1点伤害后，你可以令伤害来源选择一项：1.交给你一张红色手牌；2.失去1点体力。
skill_jx_gratitude_and_grudges.description_en: When you gain at least 2 cards from another character, you may have them draw 1 card. When you take 1 damage, you may have the damage source choose one: 1. Give you 1 red hand card; 2. Lose 1 HP.

skill_jx_fathers_legacy.description_cn: 你可将两张牌当【杀】使用或打出。你使用的转化【杀】目标角色只能使用颜色相同的手牌响应；你于出牌阶段使用【杀】造成伤害后，你本回合获得“武圣”“咆哮”。
skill_jx_fathers_legacy.description_en: You may Use or Play 2 hand cards as [Kill]. A converted [Kill] used this way can only be responded to with hand cards of the same color. After dealing damage with [Kill] during your Action Phase, you gain 〖Saint of War〗 and 〖Roar〗 until the end of this turn.

skill_jx_lead_the_charge.description_cn: 回合开始时，你执行一个额外的出牌阶段。此阶段开始时，你可以从牌堆或弃牌堆中获得一张无距离限制的【杀】，然后若你未于此阶段造成过伤害，阶段结束时你对自己造成1点伤害。
skill_jx_lead_the_charge.description_en: Locked: At the start of your turn, perform an additional Action Phase. At the start of this extra phase, you may take 1 rangeless [Kill] from the deck or Discard Pile. If you dealt no damage during this extra phase, you take 1 damage at the end of it.

skill_jx_veterans_resolve.description_cn: 限定技，当你处于濒死状态时，你可以将体力回复至X点且手牌摸至X张（X为全场势力数）。然后若X大于你造成的伤害数，你翻面。
skill_jx_veterans_resolve.description_en: Limited: When you are in the Verge of Death State, you may recover your HP to X and draw cards until you have X hand cards (X = number of surviving factions). If X is greater than the total damage you dealt this game, Flip over your General Card.

skill_jx_follow_the_win.description_cn: 当你拼点赢时，你可以获得点数较小的拼点牌；当你拼点没赢时，你可以获得你的拼点牌。
skill_jx_follow_the_win.description_en: When you win a Point Duel, you may gain the lower-ranked Point Duel card. When you lose a Point Duel, you may gain your own Point Duel card.

skill_jx_clever_words.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以拼点：若你赢，你本回合使用的下一张牌可以多指定或少指定一个目标；若你没赢，此技能失效且你不能使用锦囊牌直到回合结束。
skill_jx_clever_words.description_en: During your Action Phase, you may initiate a Point Duel. If you win: your next card used this turn may target one more or one fewer character. If you lose: this skill is Nullified for the rest of this turn and you cannot Use Tool cards until the end of this turn.

skill_photographic_memory.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以展示一名其他角色的一张手牌，然后当你于此阶段内使用与展示的牌类别相同的牌时，你可以摸一张牌。
skill_photographic_memory.description_en: At the start of your Action Phase, you may reveal 1 hand card from another character. Whenever you Use a card of the same type as the revealed card this phase, you may draw 1 card.

skill_present_the_map.description_cn: 其他角色的出牌阶段开始时，你可以摸两张牌，然后将两张牌交给其。此阶段结束时，若其于此阶段内未造成过伤害，你失去1点体力。
skill_present_the_map.description_en: At the start of another character's Action Phase, you may draw 2 cards then give them 2 cards. At the end of their phase, if they dealt no damage this turn, you lose 1 HP.

skill_jx_treacherous_hero.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以摸一张牌，并获得造成此伤害的牌。
skill_jx_treacherous_hero.description_en: After you take damage, you may draw 1 card and gain the card that caused that damage.

skill_jx_retribution.description_cn: 当你受到1点伤害后，你可以获得伤害来源的一张牌。
skill_jx_retribution.description_en: After you take 1 damage, you may gain 1 card from the damage source's zones.

skill_jx_unyielding.description_cn: 当一名角色对你造成1点伤害后，你可以判定，若结果为：红色，你对其造成1点伤害；黑色，你弃置其一张牌。
skill_jx_unyielding.description_en: After you take 1 damage, you may perform a Judgment. If the result is Red: deal 1 damage to the source. If Black: discard 1 card from the source.

skill_frugal_ways.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当你在摸牌阶段外获得牌后，你可以展示并交给一名其他角色任意张牌，令当前回合角色本回合手牌上限+X（X为你给出牌的类型数）。
skill_frugal_ways.description_en: Once per turn: After you gain cards outside your Draw Phase, you may reveal and give any number of those cards to another character. The current turn character's Hand Limit increases by X this turn (X = number of different card types given).

skill_jx_bare_chested.description_cn: 摸牌阶段开始前，你可以亮出牌堆顶的三张牌，然后你可以跳过摸牌阶段并获得其中所有基本牌、武器牌和【决斗】，且直到你的下回合开始，你为伤害来源的【杀】和【决斗】对目标角色造成的伤害+1。
skill_jx_bare_chested.description_en: Before your Draw Phase: Reveal the top 3 cards of the deck. You may skip your Draw Phase and gain all Basic cards, Weapon cards, and [Duel] cards among them; if you do, your [Kill] and [Duel] cards deal +1 damage to their targets until the start of your next turn.

skill_jx_goddess_of_the_luo.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以判定，若结果为黑色，你获得此牌，然后你可以重复此流程。以此法获得的牌本回合不计入手牌上限。
skill_jx_goddess_of_the_luo.description_en: Starting Phase: You may perform a Judgment. If the result is Black, you gain that Judgment Card, then you may repeat this process. Cards gained this way do not count toward your Hand Limit this turn.

skill_lightning_speed.description_cn: 你可以选择至多三项：1.跳过判定阶段和摸牌阶段；2.跳过出牌阶段并弃置一张装备牌；3.跳过弃牌阶段并翻面。你每选择一项，你视为使用一张无距离限制的【杀】。
skill_lightning_speed.description_en: You may choose up to 3 of the following options, each chosen option counts as using 1 rangeless [Kill]: 1. Skip your Judgment Phase and Draw Phase; 2. Skip your Action Phase and discard 1 Equipment card; 3. Skip your Discard Phase and Flip over your General Card.

skill_agile_maneuver.description_cn: 每轮开始时，你可以与一名上轮未选择过的角色各摸一张牌，本轮其回合内你可以弃置一张牌跳过其一个阶段（准备阶段和结束阶段除外），若以此法跳过摸牌阶段，其获得至多两名角色各一张手牌；若以此法跳过出牌阶段，其可以移动场上的一张牌。
skill_agile_maneuver.description_en: At the start of each round, you may choose a character not chosen last round — you and they each draw 1 card. This round, during their turn, you may discard 1 card to make them skip one Phase (not Starting or End Phase): if the Draw Phase is skipped, they may take 1 card from each of up to 2 characters; if the Action Phase is skipped, they may move 1 card that is On the Field.

skill_cut_supply_lines.description_cn: 你可以将一张黑色的基本牌或装备牌当【兵粮寸断】使用；你对手牌数大于等于你的角色使用【兵粮寸断】无距离限制。
skill_cut_supply_lines.description_en: You may Use a black Basic card or Equipment card as [Starvation]. When you Use [Starvation] against a character whose hand count is ≥ yours, there is no distance restriction.

skill_intercept_provisions.description_cn: 锁定技，一名其他角色跳过摸牌阶段后，你摸一张牌。
skill_intercept_provisions.description_en: Locked: When another character skips their Draw Phase, you draw 1 card.

skill_steadfast_defense.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以翻面并摸四张牌，然后弃置一张手牌，若以此法弃置的是装备牌，则你改为使用之。
skill_steadfast_defense.description_en: End Phase: Flip over your General Card (face-up to face-down) and draw 4 cards, then discard 1 hand card. If the discarded card is an Equipment card, Use it instead of discarding it.

skill_break_the_siege.description_cn: 你可以将装备区里的牌当【无懈可击】使用；当你从背面翻至正面时，你可以弃置一张手牌，然后移动场上的一张牌。
skill_break_the_siege.description_en: You may Use an Equipment card from your Equipment Zone as [Nullification]. When you Flip over from face-down to face-up, you may discard 1 hand card, then move 1 card that is On the Field.

skill_violent_assault.description_cn: 出牌阶段对每名角色限一次，你可以失去1点体力或弃置一张武器牌，然后对攻击范围内的一名其他角色造成1点伤害。
skill_violent_assault.description_en: Once per character per Action Phase: Lose 1 HP or discard 1 Weapon card, then deal 1 damage to a character within your Attack Range.

skill_drive_the_tiger.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以与一名体力值大于你的角色拼点。若你赢，该角色对其攻击范围内你选择的一名角色造成1点伤害；若你没赢，该角色对你造成1点伤害。
skill_drive_the_tiger.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Initiate a Point Duel with a character whose HP Value is greater than yours. If you win: that character deals 1 damage to a character within their Attack Range that you designate. If you lose: that character deals 1 damage to you.

skill_preserve_lives.description_cn: 当你受到1点伤害后，你可以令一名角色摸两张牌，然后若其手牌数小于其体力上限，你摸一张牌。
skill_preserve_lives.description_en: After you take 1 damage, you may have a character draw 2 cards. If their hand count is then less than their Max HP, you may draw 1 card.

skill_reap_the_fallen.description_cn: 其他角色死亡时，你可以选择一项：获得其所有牌；回复1点体力。
skill_reap_the_fallen.description_en: When another character dies, you may choose one: gain all of their cards; or recover 1 HP.

skill_exile.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以令一名其他角色选择一项：摸X张牌并将武将牌翻面；弃置X张牌并失去1点体力。（X为你已损失的体力值）
skill_exile.description_en: After you take damage, you may have another character choose one: draw X cards and Flip over their General Card; or discard X cards and lose 1 HP (X = your HP Lost).

skill_laud_authority.description_cn: 主公技，当其他魏势力角色的黑色判定牌生效后，其可以令你摸一张牌。
skill_laud_authority.description_en: Lord Skill: When another Wei faction character's Black Judgment Card takes effect, they may have you draw 1 card.

skill_careful_survey.description_cn: 摸牌阶段开始时，你可改为观看牌堆顶的四张牌将其中两张牌收入手牌，其余以任意顺序置于牌堆底。
skill_careful_survey.description_en: At the start of your Draw Phase, you may instead look at the top 4 cards of the deck, take 2 of them into your hand, then place the remaining cards at the bottom in any order.

skill_set_aside_grudges.description_cn: 当你对其他角色造成1点伤害后，或受到其他角色造成的1点伤害后，你可以与该角色各摸一张
