skill_set_aside_grudges.description_en: After you deal 1 damage to another character, or after you take 1 damage from another character, you may have both you and that character each draw 1 card.

skill_jx_suppress_the_army.description_cn:
准备阶段，你可以弃置一名角色X张牌（X为其手牌数减体力值且至少为1)，然后选择一项：
 1.你弃置与其中非装备牌数等量张牌；
 2.结束阶段，其摸与其中非装备牌数等量张牌。
skill_jx_suppress_the_army.description_en: Starting Phase: You may discard X cards from a character (X = their hand count minus their HP Value, minimum 1). Then choose one: 1. You discard a number of cards equal to the non-Equipment cards discarded this way; 2. At your End Phase, they draw a number of cards equal to the non-Equipment cards discarded this way.

skill_steadfast_resolve.description_cn: 锁定技，体力值大于等于你的角色的黑色【杀】对你无效；手牌数小于等于你的角色无法响应你的黑色【杀】。
skill_steadfast_resolve.description_en: Locked: Black [Kill] used by characters whose HP Value is ≥ yours is Nullified against you. Characters whose hand count is ≤ yours cannot respond to your Black [Kill].

skill_jx_fallen_blossoms.description_cn: 当其他角色的梅花牌因弃置或判定而置入弃牌堆后，你可以获得其中任意张牌。
skill_jx_fallen_blossoms.description_en: After another character's Clubs card is placed into the Discard Pile via discarding or Judgment, you may gain any of those cards.

skill_jx_wine_and_verse.description_cn: 你可以将武将牌翻至背面，视为使用一张【酒】。若你的武将牌背面朝上，你使用的“落英”牌无距离限制且不能被响应。当你受到伤害后，或回合外累计获得至少X张“落英”牌后（X为你体力值上限），若你的武将牌背面朝上，你可以翻至正面。
skill_jx_wine_and_verse.description_en: You may Flip over your General Card (face-up to face-down), treated as using [Wine]. While your General Card is face-down, cards used via 〖Fallen Blossoms〗 have no distance restriction and cannot be responded to. You may Flip back (face-down to face-up) after you take damage, or after you have gained at least X cards via 〖Fallen Blossoms〗 outside your turn (X = your Max HP).

skill_heartless.description_cn: 锁定技，你即将造成的伤害视为失去体力。
skill_heartless.description_en: Locked: Damage you deal is treated as the target losing HP instead (no damage event is generated).

skill_mourn_the_fallen.description_cn: 当你的手牌数小于X后，你可以将手牌摸至X张(X为你已损失体力值)。
skill_mourn_the_fallen.description_en: When your hand count becomes less than X, you may draw cards until you have X hand cards (X = your HP Lost).

skill_eradicate.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可与一名其他角色同时选择一种颜色，你与其展示手牌并置各自选择颜色的手牌，然后弃置牌较多的角色视为对对方使用一张【决斗】。
skill_eradicate.description_en: Once per Action Phase: You and another character simultaneously each choose a color. Both players reveal all hand cards of their chosen color. The player with more such cards discards all of them and is treated as using [Duel] against the other.

skill_power_play.description_cn: 出牌阶段结束时，若你的手牌数大于体力值，或当你受到1点伤害后，你可以摸一张牌，然后将一张手牌置于武将牌上，称为“权”:你的手牌上限+X(X为“权”的数量)。
skill_power_play.description_en: At the end of your Action Phase, if your hand count is greater than your HP Value, or after you take 1 damage: draw 1 card, then place 1 hand card on your character card as a 「Power」 token. Your Hand Limit is increased by X (X = number of 「Power」 tokens on your character card).

skill_self_reliance.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若“权”的数量不小于3，你回复 1点体力或摸两张牌，然后减1点体力上限并获得“排异”
skill_self_reliance.description_en: Awakening: Starting Phase, if you have at least 3 「Power」 tokens, recover 1 HP or draw 2 cards, reduce your Max HP by 1, then gain 〖Purge the Rivals〗.

skill_purge_the_rivals.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以移去一张“权”，令一名角色摸两张牌，然后若其手牌数大于你，你对其造成 1点伤害
skill_purge_the_rivals.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Remove 1 「Power」 token. Have a character draw 2 cards; if their hand count is then greater than yours, deal 1 damage to them.

skill_cavalry_charge.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以选择一项：1.摸一张牌，本阶段你不能使用【杀】；2.弃置一张牌，本阶段你使用【杀】无距离限制且可以多使用一张【杀】。
skill_cavalry_charge.description_en: At the start of your Action Phase, choose one: 1. Draw 1 card; you cannot Use [Kill] this phase. 2. Discard 1 card; your [Kill] has no distance restriction and you may Use 1 additional [Kill] this phase.

skill_jx_chaste_resolve.description_cn: 当你成为其他角色【杀】或普通锦囊牌的目标后，你可以失去1点体力令此牌对你无效，然后你可以选择一项：1.获得使用者一张牌；2.本回合结束阶段，发动一次“秘计”。
skill_jx_chaste_resolve.description_en: When you become the target of another character's [Kill] or Non Time-Delay Tool card, you may lose 1 HP to Nullify that card against you, then choose one: 1. Gain 1 of the User's cards; 2. Activate 〖Secret Plan〗 during your End Phase this turn.

skill_jx_secret_plan.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以摸X张牌（X为你已损失的体力值），然后你可以交给其他角色至多X张牌。
skill_jx_secret_plan.description_en: End Phase: You may draw X cards (X = your HP Lost), then give up to X of your hand cards to other characters.

skill_jx_weigh_the_elephant.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以亮出牌堆顶的四张牌，然后你获得其中的任意张点数之和不大于13的牌。
skill_jx_weigh_the_elephant.description_en: After you take damage, you may flip the top 4 cards of the deck face-up, then gain any of them whose combined rank total is ≤ 13.

skill_jx_benevolent_heart.description_cn: 当其他角色受到伤害时，若该角色的体力值为1，则你可以翻面并弃置一张装备牌，然后防止此伤害。
skill_jx_benevolent_heart.description_en: When another character with HP Value 1 takes damage, you may Flip over your General Card and discard 1 Equipment card to prevent that damage.

skill_jx_master_strategy.description_cn: 你每于回合内使用一种花色的手牌，本回合的手牌上限便+1；每个出牌阶段结束时，你可以摸X张牌（X为你本回合使用过牌的类型数）。
skill_jx_master_strategy.description_en: Each time you Use a hand card of a suit you have not yet used this turn, your Hand Limit increases by 1 for this turn. At the end of each Action Phase, you may draw X cards (X = number of different card types you have Used this turn).

skill_jx_severe_punishment.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置任意张手牌并令一名其他角色选择一项：1.弃置等量的牌并失去1点体力；2.翻面，然后摸等量的牌。
skill_jx_severe_punishment.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard any number of hand cards, then have another character choose one: 1. Discard the same number of cards and lose 1 HP; 2. Flip over their General Card, then draw the same number of cards.

skill_jx_balance_of_power.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置任意张牌，然后摸等量张牌，若你以此法弃置了所有手牌，你额外摸一张牌。
skill_jx_balance_of_power.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard any number of cards, then draw the same number. If you discarded all of your hand cards this way, draw 1 additional card.

skill_jx_rescue.description_cn: 主公技，其他吴势力角色于其回合内回复体力时，若其体力值大于等于你，则其可以改为令你回复1点体力，然后其摸一张牌。
skill_jx_rescue.description_en: Lord Skill: When another Wu faction character recovers HP during their turn, if their HP Value is ≥ yours, they may instead have you recover 1 HP, then draw 1 card.

skill_show_of_force.description_cn: 限定技，当一张锦囊牌指定多个目标后，你可以令此牌对任意个目标无效。
skill_show_of_force.description_en: Limited: When a Tool card designates multiple targets, you may Nullify that card against any number of those targets.

skill_diligent_study.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段或结束阶段，若你的手牌数比体力值多2或更多，你减少1点体力上限，回复1点体力或摸两张牌，然后获得“攻心”。
skill_diligent_study.description_en: Awakening: During your Starting Phase or End Phase, if your hand count exceeds your HP Value by 2 or more, reduce your Max HP by 1, then recover 1 HP or draw 2 cards, then gain 〖Strike at the Heart〗.

skill_strike_at_the_heart.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以观看一名其他角色的手牌，然后你可以展示其中一张红桃牌，选择一项：1.弃置此牌；2.将此牌置于牌堆顶
skill_strike_at_the_heart.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Look at another character's hand cards, then you may reveal 1 Hearts card from their hand and choose one: 1. Discard that card; 2. Place it on top of the deck.

skill_jx_self_harm.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置一张牌，然后失去1点体力。
skill_jx_self_harm.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 1 card, then lose 1 HP.

skill_feigned_surrender.description_cn: 定技，当你失去1点体力后，你摸三张牌，然后若此时在你的出牌阶段内，则直到回合结束，你使用红色【杀】无距离限制且不能被【闪】响应，且你可以多使用一张【杀】。
skill_feigned_surrender.description_en: After you lose 1 HP, draw 3 cards. If this occurs during your Action Phase, until the end of this turn: your red [Kill] has no distance restriction and cannot be responded to with [Dodge], and you may Use 1 additional [Kill].

skill_jx_heroic_bearing.description_cn: 锁定技，摸牌阶段，你多摸一张牌。你的手牌上限为你的体力上限。
skill_jx_heroic_bearing.description_en: Locked: During your Draw Phase, draw 1 additional card. Your Hand Limit equals your Max HP.

skill_jx_peerless_beauty.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择一项：1.将一张方块牌当【乐不思蜀】使用；2.弃置一张方块牌并弃置场上的一张【乐不思蜀】。选择完成后，你摸一张牌。
skill_jx_peerless_beauty.description_en: Once per Action Phase, choose one: 1. Use a Diamonds card as [Acedia]; 2. Discard 1 Diamonds card and discard 1 [Acedia] card that is On the Field. After resolving either option, draw 1 card.

skill_jx_humility.description_cn: 当一张延时锦囊牌或其他角色使用的普通锦囊牌对你生效时，若你是此牌唯一目标，则你可以将所有手牌扣置于武将牌上，然后此回合结束时，你获得这些牌。
skill_jx_humility.description_en: When a Time-Delayed Tool card, or a Non Time-Delay Tool card used by another character, takes effect on you as its only target, you may place all of your hand cards face-down onto your character card. At the end of this turn, gain those cards back.

skill_jx_linked_camps.description_cn: 当你失去手牌后，若你没有手牌，则你可以令至多X名角色各摸一张牌（X为你此次失去的手牌数）
skill_jx_linked_camps.description_en: When you lose hand cards, if you then have no hand cards, you may have up to X characters each draw 1 card (X = the number of hand cards you just lost).

skill_jx_political_marriage.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，选择一名男性角色，弃置一张手牌或将一张装备牌置入其装备区：你与其体力值较高的角色摸一张牌，体力值较低的角色回复1点体力。
skill_jx_political_marriage.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose a Male character. Discard 1 hand card or place 1 Equipment card from your hand into their Equipment Zone. The character among you and them with the higher HP Value draws 1 card; the one with the lower HP Value recovers 1 HP.

skill_heroic_spirit.description_cn: 准备阶段，若你已受伤，你可以选择一名其他角色并选择一项：1.令其摸X张牌，然后弃置一张牌；2.令其摸一张牌，然后弃置X张牌。（X为你已损失体力值）
skill_heroic_spirit.description_en: Starting Phase: If you are Wounded, you may choose another character and have them choose one: 1. Draw X cards, then discard 1 card; 2. Draw 1 card, then discard X cards (X = your HP Lost).

skill_crush_the_foe.description_cn: 当你杀死一名角色或死亡后，你可以令任意名角色各摸X张牌（X为此技能发动次数且包含本次）。
skill_crush_the_foe.description_en: When you kill a character or when you die, you may have any number of characters each draw X cards (X = the total number of times this skill has been activated, including this activation).

skill_ardor.description_cn: 每当你使用（指定目标后）被使用（成为目标后）一张【决斗】或红色的【杀】时、你可以摸一张牌。
skill_ardor.description_en: Whenever you Use (after designating targets) or become a target of [Duel] or a red [Kill], you may draw 1 card.

skill_spirit_awakening.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若你的体力值不大于2，减1点体力上限，然后获得〖英姿〗和〖英魂〗。
skill_spirit_awakening.description_en: Awakening: During your Starting Phase, if your HP Value is 2 or less, reduce your Max HP by 1, then gain 〖Heroic Bearing〗 and 〖Heroic Spirit〗.

skill_dominate.description_cn: 主公技、每名其他吴势力角色的出牌阶段限一次、该角色可以与你拼点（若你已发动过“魂姿”则你可以拒绝此次拼点）: 其没没赢、你可以获得你与其此次拼点的牌。
skill_dominate.description_en: Lord Skill: Once per Action Phase per other Wu faction character, that character may initiate a Point Duel with you (if you have activated 〖Spirit Awakening〗, you may refuse). If they lose: you gain both Point Duel cards.

skill_blushing_beauty.description_cn: 锁定技，你的黑桃牌视为红桃牌
skill_blushing_beauty.description_en: Locked: Your Spades cards are treated as Hearts cards.

skill_celestial_fragrance.description_cn: 当你受到伤害时，你可以弃置一张红桃手牌，防止此次伤害并选择一名其他角色，你选择一项：令其受到1点伤害，然后摸X张牌（X为其已损失体力值且至多为5）；令其失去1点体力，然后其获得你弃置的牌。
skill_celestial_fragrance.description_en: When you take damage, you may discard 1 Hearts hand card to prevent that damage, then choose another character and select one: 1. Deal 1 damage to them, then draw X cards (X = their HP Lost, max 5); 2. They lose 1 HP, then gain the Hearts card you just discarded.

skill_heavens_justice.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以与一名角色拼点，若你：赢，本回合你使用【杀】无距离限制、次数上限和目标上限均+1；没赢，本回合你使用下一张牌时取消之并令唯一目标摸两张牌。
skill_heavens_justice.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Initiate a Point Duel with a character. If you win: this turn your [Kill] has no distance restriction, and your [Kill] count limit and target limit are each increased by 1. If you lose: when you next Use a card this turn, Remove that card's only target and have them draw 2 cards.

skill_fierce_duel.description_cn: 当你使用牌结算结束后，若此牌与你本回合使用的上一张牌目标不完全相同，你可以对两张牌的相同目标各造成1点伤害。
skill_fierce_duel.description_en: After a card you Use finishes resolving, if its targets do not completely overlap with the targets of the previous card you Used this turn, you may deal 1 damage to each target shared between the two cards.

skill_indomitable.description_cn: 锁定技，当你处于濒死状态时，你将牌堆顶的一张牌置于你的武将牌上，称为创，若此牌的点数与已有的创点数均不同，则你将体力回复至1点。若出现相同点数则将此牌置入弃牌堆。若你的武将牌上有创，则你的手牌上限与创的数量相等。
skill_indomitable.description_en: Locked: When you are in the Verge of Death State, place the top card of the deck onto your character card as a 「Wound」 token. If its rank differs from all existing 「Wound」 tokens, recover your HP to 1. If its rank matches an existing token, place it into the Discard Pile. Your Hand Limit equals the number of 「Wound」 tokens on your character card.

skill_invigorate.description_cn: 一名角色的回合结束时，若其没有手牌，你可以令其摸两张牌，然后你失去1点体力。
skill_invigorate.description_en: At the end of a character's turn, if that character has no hand cards, you may have them draw 2 cards, then you lose 1 HP.

skill_generous.description_cn: 摸牌阶段，你可以多摸两张牌，然后手牌唯一最多的角色将半数（向下取整）手牌交给你选择的一名手牌最少的角色。
skill_generous.description_en: Draw Phase: You may draw 2 additional cards. The character with the sole highest hand count must then give half their hand cards (rounded down) to a character with the fewest hand cards that you designate.

skill_forge_alliance.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择两名其他角色并弃置X张牌（X为这两名角色手牌数的差），然后令这两名角色交换手牌。
skill_forge_alliance.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose 2 other characters and discard X cards (X = the difference in their hand counts), then those 2 characters swap all their hand cards with each other.

skill_direct_remonstrance.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以将手牌中的一张装备牌置于一名其他角色的装备区里，然后摸一张牌；当你于出牌阶段使用装备牌时，你摸一张牌。
skill_direct_remonstrance.description_en: During your Action Phase: You may place 1 Equipment card from your hand into another character's Equipment Zone, then draw 1 card. Additionally, whenever you Use an Equipment card during your Action Phase, draw 1 card.

skill_consolidate_authority.description_cn: 其他角色的弃牌阶段结束时，你可以将该角色此阶段弃置的一张手牌交给该角色，然后你可以获得其余此阶段弃置的牌。
skill_consolidate_authority.description_en: At the end of another character's Discard Phase, you may return 1 of the cards they discarded this phase to them, then gain the remaining cards they discarded this phase.

skill_shatter_the_army.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定目标后，你可以将其至多张牌移出游戏直到回合结束(X为其体力值)。你使用的【杀】对手牌区与装备区内牌数皆不大于你的角色造成的伤害+1。
skill_shatter_the_army.description_en: After your [Kill] designates a target, you may Remove from the Game up to X of their cards until the end of this turn (X = their HP Value). Your [Kill] deals +1 damage to characters whose combined hand and Equipment Zone card count is ≤ yours.

skill_jx_whirlwind.description_cn: 当你失去装备区里的牌后，或一次性失去至少两张牌后，你可以依次弃置至多两名其他角色共计至多两张牌。
skill_jx_whirlwind.description_en: After you lose cards from your Equipment Zone, or after you lose at least 2 cards at once, you may discard up to 2 cards total from up to 2 other characters, one at a time.

skill_jx_sweet_dew.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以令两名角色交换装备区里的牌。若X大于你已损失的体力值，你须在选择角色时弃置X张牌（X为其装备区里的牌数之差）。
skill_jx_sweet_dew.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose 2 characters and swap the contents of their Equipment Zones. If the difference in their Equipment Zone card counts (X) is greater than your HP Lost, you must first discard X cards.

skill_jx_nurture.description_cn: 当一名角色进入濒死状态时，你可以选择其一张牌，若此牌不为基本牌，则其弃置此牌，然后回复1点体力。
skill_jx_nurture.description_en: When a character enters the Verge of Death State, you may choose 1 of their cards. If that card is not a Basic card, they discard it, then recover 1 HP.

skill_jx_comfort_and_care.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择两名其他角色，令其中一名角色获得另一名角色的一张牌，若其未获得装备区里的牌，你摸一张牌，然后你可以令其中手牌数较少的角色摸一张牌。
skill_jx_comfort_and_care.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose 2 other characters. Have one of them gain 1 card from the other. If the gained card is not from the Equipment Zone, draw 1 card. Then the character among the two with fewer hand cards may draw 1 card.

skill_jx_in_memoriam.description_cn: 当你死亡时，你可以令一名其他角色(杀死你的角色除外)摸三张牌并回复1点体力。
skill_jx_in_memoriam.description_en: When you die, you may have another character (not the one who killed you) draw 3 cards and recover 1 HP.

skill_jx_plague_fire.description_cn: 你使用的非火【杀】可以改为火【杀】使用，此牌结算后，若其造成伤害，你弃置一张牌或失去1体力。你使用的火【杀】可以多指定一个目标。
skill_jx_plague_fire.description_en: Your normal [Kill] may be used as a Fire [Kill]; if that Fire [Kill] deals damage, you must discard 1 card or lose 1 HP. Your [Fire Kill] may designate 1 additional target.

skill_jx_aged_wine.description_cn: 你或你相邻角色的【杀】因弃置置入弃牌堆后，将之置于你的武将牌上，称为“醇”。当一名角色处于濒死状态时，你可以移去X张“醇”视为其使用一张【酒】(X为本轮以此法使用【酒】的次数)。
skill_jx_aged_wine.description_en: When a [Kill] card used by you or an adjacent character is placed into the Discard Pile via discarding, place it on your character card as a 「Wine」 token. When a character enters the Verge of Death State, you may remove X 「Wine」 tokens to be treated as that character using [Wine] (X = the number of times this method has been used this round).

skill_jx_arcane_mastery.description_cn: 当你的牌因弃置而置入弃牌堆后，或你上家的牌于每回合首次因弃置而置入弃牌堆后，你可以将其中任意张牌置于牌堆顶。
skill_jx_arcane_mastery.description_en: When your cards are placed into the Discard Pile via discarding, or when your Left Neighbor's cards are first placed into the Discard Pile via discarding this turn, you may place any of those cards on top of the deck.

skill_jx_blunt_counsel.description_cn: 你上家或你的结束阶段，你可以令一名角色摸一张牌并展示之，若为装备牌，其使用之并回复1点体力。若为非装备牌且其体力值不等于你，其失去1点体力。
skill_jx_blunt_counsel.description_en: During your End Phase or your Left Neighbor's End Phase, you may have a character draw 1 card and reveal it. If it is an Equipment card: they Use it, then recover 1 HP. If it is not an Equipment card and their HP Value ≠ yours: they lose 1 HP.

skill_jx_gallant_defense.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当你成为非装备牌的目标后，你可以摸X张牌(X为你本回合成为非装备牌目标的次数且至多为5)；一名角色的结束阶段，若你本回合未发动过“胆守”，你可以弃置等于其手牌数的牌，然后对其造成1点伤害。
skill_jx_gallant_defense.description_en: Once per turn: After you become the target of a non-Equipment card, you may draw X cards (X = the total number of times you have been targeted by non-Equipment cards this turn, max 5). At the end of a character's turn, if you did not draw via 〖Gallant Defense〗 this turn, you may discard a number of cards equal to that character's hand count, then deal 1 damage to them.

skill_pestilence_purge.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择任意名势力各不相同的其他角色，弃置你和这些角色的各一张牌，然后被弃置黑桃牌的角色各摸一张牌。
skill_pestilence_purge.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose any number of other characters from different factions. Discard 1 card from each of those characters and from yourself. Each character among them who discarded a Spades card draws 1 card.

skill_ruthless_dominance.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】对其他角色造成伤害后，你可以获得其区域里的一张牌，若获得的牌：不为装备牌，其摸一张牌；为装备牌，你视为对由其指定的另一名角色使用一张【决斗】。
skill_ruthless_dominance.description_en: After your [Kill] deals damage to another character, you may gain 1 card from their zones. If the gained card is an Equipment card: you are treated as using [Duel] against another character they designate. If it is not an Equipment card: they draw 1 card.

skill_jx_eclipse_the_moon.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以摸一张牌。若你没有手牌，则改为摸两张牌。
skill_jx_eclipse_the_moon.description_en: End Phase: You may draw 1 card. If you have no hand cards, draw 2 cards instead.

skill_wild_strike.description_cn: 出牌阶段、你可以将两张手牌当【万箭齐发】使用（不能使用此回合发动本技能时已用过的花色）。当其他角色因响应你使用的【万箭齐发】而打出【闪】时、其摸一张牌。当你使用的【万箭齐发】结算结束后、没有角色因此牌而受到过伤害、你摸一张牌。
skill_wild_strike.description_en: During your Action Phase, you may discard 2 hand cards as [Raining Arrows] (you cannot use the same suit you have already used via 〖Wild Strike〗 this turn). When another character plays out [Dodge] in response to your [Raining Arrows], they draw 1 card. After your [Raining Arrows] finishes resolving, if no character took damage from it, you draw 1 card.

skill_bloodline.description_cn: 主公技，锁定技，你的手牌上限+X（X为其他群势力角色数的两倍）。
skill_bloodline.description_en: Lord Skill — Locked: Your Hand Limit is increased by X (X = twice the number of other surviving Qun faction characters).

skill_twin_warriors.description_cn: 摸牌阶段开始时、你可以改为亮出牌堆顶两张牌然后你获得其中一张且可以将与此牌颜色不同的手牌当【决斗】使用直到回合结束；当你因【决斗】受到伤害后、你获得此次【决斗】中其他角色打出的【杀】。
skill_twin_warriors.description_en: At the start of your Draw Phase, you may instead reveal the top 2 cards of the deck, gain 1 of them, and you may use hand cards of the opposite color from the gained card as [Duel] until the end of this turn. When you take damage from a [Duel], gain all [Kill] cards played out by other characters during that [Duel].

skill_lustful_tyranny.description_cn: 锁定技，你对女性角色使用的【杀】和女性角色对你使用的【杀】均需使用两张【闪】才能抵消。
skill_lustful_tyranny.description_en: Locked: [Kill] between you and Female characters requires 2 [Dodge] to cancel.

skill_collapse.description_cn: 锁定技，结束阶段，若你不是体力值最小的角色，你失去1点体力或减1点体力上限。
skill_collapse.description_en: Locked: During your End Phase, if you do not have the lowest HP Value on the field, you must either lose 1 HP or reduce your Max HP by 1.

skill_wine_pool.description_cn: 你可以将一张黑桃手牌当【酒】使用。你使用的受【酒】影响的【杀】造成伤害后，本回合“崩坏”失效。
skill_wine_pool.description_en: You may Use any Spades hand card as [Wine]. If a [Kill] boosted by [Wine] deals damage, 〖Collapse〗 does not take effect this turn.

skill_tyranny.description_cn: 主公技，当其他群势力角色造成伤害后，其可以令你判定，若结果为黑桃，你回复1点体力。
skill_tyranny.description_en: Lord Skill: After another Qun faction character deals damage, they may have you perform a Judgment. If the result is Spades, you recover 1 HP.

skill_total_annihilation.description_cn: 锁定技，你的回合内：除濒死角色外，所有其他角色的红色基本牌均视为【杀】，且使用时你摸两张牌
skill_total_annihilation.description_en: Locked: During your turn, all other characters' red Basic cards are treated as [Kill]. Whenever another character Uses one of those cards, you draw 2 cards.

skill_iron_curtain.description_cn: 限黑色锦囊牌对你无效；你可以将黑色非锦囊牌当【借刀杀人】使用。
skill_iron_curtain.description_en: Black Tool cards have no effect on you. You may Use any black non-Tool card as [Proxy Attack].

skill_reign_of_chaos.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可以令所有其他角色须对各自距离最近的角色使用一张【杀】。否则失去1点体力。
skill_reign_of_chaos.description_en: Limited: During your Action Phase, you may have all other characters each Use [Kill] against the character nearest to them, or lose 1 HP.

skill_quiver_strike.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定一个目标后，你可以弃置其一张牌，若弃置的牌：是装备牌，该角色不能使用【闪】；不是装备牌，该角色获得此【杀】。+1。
skill_quiver_strike.description_en: After your [Kill] designates a target, you may discard 1 card from their zones. If the discarded card is an Equipment card: they cannot Use [Dodge] in response to this [Kill]. If it is not an Equipment card: they gain this [Kill].

skill_shapeshifter.description_cn: 游戏开始时，你随机获得三张武将牌作为“化身”牌，然后亮出其中一张，获得该“化身”牌的一个技能，且性别与势力视为与该化身牌相同。回合开始时或结束后，你可以选择一项：1.更改亮出的“化身”牌；2.弃置至多两张未亮出的“化身牌”，然后你获得等量的“化身”牌。.替换展示的“化身”牌及因此获得的技能；2.移去至多两张“化身”牌并获得等量新的“化身”牌。
skill_shapeshifter.description_en: At the start of the game, randomly gain 3 General Cards as 「Avatar」 cards. Reveal 1 of them, gain 1 of its skills, and your gender and faction are treated as the same as that avatar. At the start or end of your turn, choose one: 1. Change the revealed 「Avatar」 card (replacing its granted skill); 2. Remove up to 2 「Avatar」 cards and gain an equal number of new 「Avatar」 cards.

skill_rebirth.description_cn: 当你受到1点伤害后，你获得一张新的化身牌。
skill_rebirth.description_en: After you take 1 damage, gain 1 new 「Avatar」 card.

skill_lightning_strike.description_cn: 每当你使用或打出【闪】时，你可以令一名其他角色进行判定，若结果为：黑桃，你对该角色造成2点雷电伤害；梅花，你回复1点体力，然后对该角色造成1点雷电伤害。
skill_lightning_strike.description_en: Whenever you Use or Play [Dodge], you may have another character perform a Judgment. If the result is Spades: deal 2 Lightning damage to that character. If the result is Clubs: recover 1 HP, then deal 1 Lightning damage to that character.

skill_ghost_path.description_cn: 当一名角色的判定牌生效前，你可以打出一张黑色牌替换之。
skill_ghost_path.description_en: When a Judgment Card is about to take effect, you may Play a black hand card to replace it.

skill_yellow_heaven.description_cn: 主公技，其他群势力角色的出牌阶段限一次，该角色可以将一张【闪】或【闪电】交给你。
skill_yellow_heaven.description_en: Lord Skill: Once per Action Phase, another Qun faction character may give you 1 [Dodge] or 1 Spades hand card.

skill_hex.description_cn: 每名角色的回合限一次，你可以扣置一张手牌当任意一张基本牌或普通锦囊牌使用或打出。此时，一旦有其他角色质疑则翻开此牌：若为假则此牌作废，若为真则质疑角色获得技能缠怨（锁定技，你不能质疑蛊惑；若你的体力值为1，则你的其他技能失效）。
skill_hex.description_en: Once per character's turn, you may place 1 hand card face-down and Use or Play it as any Basic card or Non Time-Delay Tool card. If another character challenges it, reveal that card: if it does not match the declared card, the Use is voided; if it does match, the challenging character gains 〖Entanglement〗 (Locked: they cannot challenge 〖Hex〗; if their HP Value is 1, all their other skills are Nullified).

skill_heartbreak.description_cn: 锁定技，当你死亡时，杀死你的角色失去所有武将技能。
skill_heartbreak.description_en: Locked: When you die, the character who killed you loses all skills on their General Card.

skill_lament.description_cn: 当一名角色受到【杀】造成的伤害后，你可以弃置一张牌，然后令其进行判定，若结果为：红桃，其回复x点体力（x为其本次受到伤害值）；方块，其摸三张牌；梅花，伤害来源弃置两张牌；黑桃，伤害来源翻面。
skill_lament.description_en: When a character takes damage from [Kill], you may discard 1 card, then have that character perform a Judgment. If the result is: Hearts — they recover X HP (X = damage taken); Diamonds — they draw 3 cards; Clubs — the damage source discards 2 cards; Spades — the damage source Flips over their General Card.

skill_jx_show_of_might.description_cn: 锁定技，当你受到伤害时，若造成伤害的牌：为红色，伤害来源摸一张牌；不为红色，你摸一张牌。
skill_jx_show_of_might.description_en: Locked: When you take damage, if the card that caused the damage is Red: the damage source draws 1 card. If it is not Red: you draw 1 card.

skill_dominating_strike.description_cn: 出牌阶段限两次，你可以令一名其他角色视为对你使用一张【决斗】。
skill_dominating_strike.description_en: Twice per Action Phase: You may have another character be treated as using [Duel] against you.

skill_white_horse_fellowship.description_cn: 锁定技，若你的体力值大于2，你计算与其他角色的距离-1；若你的体力值不大于2，其他角色计算与你的距离+1。
skill_white_horse_fellowship.description_en: Locked: If your HP Value is greater than 2, your distance to other characters is reduced by 1. If your HP Value is ≤ 2, other characters' distance to you is increased by 1.

skill_nimble_ferocity.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】对一名角色造成伤害后，你可以弃置其区域里的一张牌。若此牌为坐骑牌，你获得之。
skill_nimble_ferocity.description_en: After your [Kill] deals damage to a character, you may discard 1 card from their zones. If that card is a Mount card, you gain it instead of discarding it.

skill_jx_delayed_wisdom.description_cn: 锁定技，当你于回合外受到伤害后，直到当前回合结束，【杀】和普通锦囊牌对你无效。
skill_jx_delayed_wisdom.description_en: Locked: After you take damage outside your turn, [Kill] and Non Time-Delay Tool cards are Nullified against you until the end of the current turn.

skill_jx_wise_counsel.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将一张装备牌或【杀】交给一名其他角色，然后其选择一项：1.视为对其攻击范围内你选择的另一名角色使用【杀】；2.摸一张牌。
skill_jx_wise_counsel.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Give 1 Equipment card or [Kill] to another character. They choose one: 1. Be treated as using [Kill] against another character within their Attack Range that you designate; 2. Draw 1 card.

skill_jx_self_preservation.description_cn: 摸牌阶段，你可以多摸X张牌，你以此法摸牌的结束阶段，若你本回合对其他角色造成过伤害，你弃置X张牌（X为全场势力数）。
skill_jx_self_preservation.description_en: Draw Phase: You may draw X additional cards (X = number of surviving factions). At your End Phase, if you dealt damage to another character this turn, discard X cards.

skill_jx_royal_clan.description_cn: 锁定技，你的手牌上限+X（X为全场势力数）。其他角色对你造成伤害时，防止此伤害改为令其摸一张牌，每种势力限一次。
skill_jx_royal_clan.description_en: Locked: Your Hand Limit is increased by X (X = number of surviving factions). The first time each faction's character deals damage to you each round, prevent that damage; the attacker draws 1 card instead.

skill_jx_intimidate.description_cn: 其他角色的回合开始时，若你已受伤，你可以与其拼点：若你赢，其本回合不能对除其以外的角色使用牌；若你没赢，你获得其拼点牌，然后其视为对你使用一张【杀】。
skill_jx_intimidate.description_en: At the start of another character's turn, if you are Wounded, you may initiate a Point Duel with them. If you win: they cannot Use cards targeting anyone other than themselves this turn. If you lose: you gain their Point Duel card, then they are treated as using [Kill] against you.

skill_jx_plea_for_aid.description_cn: 当你成为【杀】或伤害锦囊的目标时，你可以令另一名其他角色选择一项：1.交给你一张与此牌同类型不同牌名的牌；2.成为此牌的额外目标。
skill_jx_plea_for_aid.description_en: When you become the target of [Kill] or a damage-dealing Tool card, you may have another character choose one: 1. Give you 1 card of the same type but different name from that card; 2. Become an additional target of that card.

skill_decisive_stratagem.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以对一名手牌数小于等于你的其他角色造成1点伤害。
skill_decisive_stratagem.description_en: End Phase: You may deal 1 damage to another character whose hand count is ≤ yours.

skill_destroy_the_plan.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以展示一张锦囊牌置于牌堆顶井令一名有手牌的其他角色选择一项:1.弃置一张锦囊牌:2.依次弃置两张牌。
skill_destroy_the_plan.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Reveal 1 Tool card from your hand and place it on top of the deck. Then have another character who has hand cards choose one: 1. Discard 1 Tool card; 2. Discard 2 cards, one at a time.

skill_raze_the_city.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可以选择一名其他角色开始，令所有其他角色依次选择一项:1.弃置任意张牌(须比上家弃置的牌多)；2.受到你造成的2点火焰伤害。
skill_raze_the_city.description_en: Limited: During your Action Phase, choose a starting character. Starting from them, each other character in sequence must choose one: 1. Discard cards (must discard more cards than the previous character did); 2. Take 2 Fire damage dealt by you.

skill_jx_cede_the_province.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可以将你装备区里的所有牌交给一名其他角色，然后其选择一项：1.令你回复X点体力；2.对其攻击范围内至多X名角色各造成1点伤害。（X为你给出的牌数）
skill_jx_cede_the_province.description_en: Limited: During your Action Phase, give all cards from your Equipment Zone to another character. They choose one: 1. Let you recover X HP; 2. Deal 1 damage to each of up to X characters within their Attack Range (X = number of cards given).

skill_jx_eavesdrop.description_cn: 其他角色的回合结束后，若其本回合未对其他角色造成伤害，你可以选择一项；若其本回合未对其他角色使用过牌，你可以选择两项；1.将其装备区里的一张牌置入你的装备区；2.摸一张牌。
skill_jx_eavesdrop.description_en: At the end of another character's turn, if they dealt no damage this turn, you may choose 1 option; if they used no cards targeting other characters this turn, you may choose 2 options: 1. Place 1 card from their Equipment Zone into your Equipment Zone; 2. Draw 1 card.

skill_gradual_encampment.description_cn: 当你于出牌阶段使用牌时，若此牌与你此阶段使用的上一张牌花色或点数相同，你可以摸一张牌；出牌阶段限一次，你可以将一张牌当任意基本牌使用，此牌花色视为与你此阶段使用的上一张牌相同。
skill_gradual_encampment.description_en: When you Use a card during your Action Phase, if that card shares a suit or rank with the last card you Used this phase, you may draw 1 card. Once per Action Phase, you may Use 1 card as any Basic card; that card's suit is treated as the same suit as the last card you Used this phase.

skill_loyal_to_a_fault.description_cn: 锁定技，当你受到伤害后，若为你本回合第一次受到伤害，你回复1点体力，否则你失去1点体力。
skill_loyal_to_a_fault.description_en: Locked: The first time you take damage each turn, recover 1 HP instead. Each subsequent time you take damage during the same turn, you lose 1 HP.

skill_sovereign_realm.description_cn: 锁定技，你的装备牌只能当【借刀杀人】或【无中生有】使用。若你的装备区里没有牌，你视为装备着攻击范围为X的武器牌和牌名字数为X的防具牌各随机一张（X为你的体力值；若无对应则完全随机一张）。
skill_sovereign_realm.description_en: Locked: Your equipment cards can only be used as [Proxy Attack] or [Resupply]. If your equipment zone is empty, you are treated as having equipped a random weapon with attack range X and a random armor whose Chinese name has X characters (X = your current HP; if no matching equipment exists, a completely random one is used).

skill_tyrants_decree.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以令所有其他角色同时选择是否交给你一张牌，然后你可以对未以此法交给你非基本牌的一名角色造成1点伤害。若你选择自己，本阶段你使用当前手牌无次数和距离限制，并入魔。
skill_tyrants_decree.description_en: At the start of your Action Phase: you may have all other characters simultaneously choose whether to give you a card. You may then deal 1 damage to one character who did not give you a non-basic card this way. If you choose yourself, during this phase your current hand cards have no frequency or distance restrictions, and you Demonize.

skill_ambuscade.description_cn: 每轮开始时或你体力值变化后，你获得一张不计入手牌上限的【闪】。技能或牌造成伤害后，你记录此技能或牌名。你可将因此技能获得的【闪】当做记录的牌名使用（不计入次数限制，每回合每种牌名限一次）。
skill_ambuscade.description_en: At the start of each round or when your HP changes, gain one [Dodge] that does not count toward your hand limit. When a skill or card deals damage, record that skill or card name. You may use [Dodge] cards gained from this skill as any recorded card name (does not count toward frequency limits; once per card name per turn).

skill_scheme_of_transformation.description_cn: 准备阶段，若你【诡伏】记录数至少为3，你可入魔，获得你【诡伏】记录的技能，并获得【骤袭】。入魔后，每轮结束时，若本轮你未造成过伤害，你失去1点体力。
skill_scheme_of_transformation.description_en: Starting Phase: If the total number of entries recorded by [Ambuscade] is at least 3, you may Demonize — gain all skills recorded by [Ambuscade] and gain [Onslaught]. While Demonized: at the end of each round, if you dealt no damage this round, lose 1 HP.

skill_swift_assault.description_cn: 准备阶段，你从三个可造成伤害的技能中选择一个获得至你的下回合开始。受到你伤害的角色于本轮结束时视为对你使用一张【杀】。
skill_swift_assault.description_en: Starting Phase: Choose one of three damage-dealing skills to gain until the start of your next turn. At the end of this round, each character who took damage from you this round is treated as using a [Kill] against you.

skill_seize_qi.description_cn: 锁定技，一号位首个回合开始前，你执行一个不能使用延时锦囊牌的额外出牌阶段。所有角色的初始手牌称为炁。你每回合对一名角色首次造成伤害后，你获得其一张炁。
skill_seize_qi.description_en: Locked: Before the first player's first turn begins, you take an extra Action Phase in which Time-Delayed Tool cards cannot be used. All characters' starting hand cards are called [Qi]. The first time you deal damage to a character each turn, gain one of their [Qi].

skill_demonic_frenzy.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以入魔并选择一名其他角色，你与其成为狂角色，每回合对彼此首次造成的伤害+1；击败对方后，获得对方所有炁。狂角色死亡后，你重新指定。入魔后，每轮结束时，若本轮你未造成过伤害，你失去1点体力。
skill_demonic_frenzy.description_en: Action Phase: You may Demonize and choose another character. You and that character become Frenzied: the first damage dealt between you each turn is increased by 1; upon defeating them, gain all their [Qi]. When the Frenzied character dies, you must designate a new one. While Demonized: at the end of each round, if you dealt no damage this round, lose 1 HP.

skill_astral_strike.description_cn: 若你使用的上一张牌为炁，你可以将一张装备牌当指定相邻角色为目标的【火杀】使用；否则，你可以将一张锦囊牌当【决斗】使用。
skill_astral_strike.description_en: If the last card you used was a [Qi] card, you may use an equipment card as a [Fire Kill] targeting an adjacent character; otherwise, you may use a tool card as a [Duel].

skill_bewitch.description_cn: 每轮开始时，你摸两张牌，然后弃置至多两张牌并选择等量其他角色。其下回合出牌阶段强制选中一张可用的手牌，且每使用一张牌后随机弃一张牌，直到其使用了两张牌后。
skill_bewitch.description_en: At the start of each round, draw 2 cards, then discard up to 2 cards and choose an equal number of other characters. During their next Action Phase, one usable hand card is forcibly selected; after each card they use, they randomly discard one card, until they have used 2 cards total.

skill_alluring.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可入魔，令所有角色获得一张单目标伤害牌。其他角色使用此牌指定唯一目标时，你可弃置一张牌，重新指定牌的目标（无距离限制）。这些牌：造成伤害后，你摸一张牌；未因使用进入弃牌堆后，你获得之。（准备阶段，若这些牌均离开其手牌区，你再令所有角色获得牌。）入魔后，每轮结束时，若本轮你未造成过伤害，你失去1点体力。
skill_alluring.description_en: Starting Phase: You may Demonize — give all characters one single-target damage card. When another character uses this card with only one target, you may discard a card to redirect it (no distance restriction). These cards: when one deals damage, you draw 1 card; if one enters the discard pile without being used, you gain it. (Starting Phase: if all these cards have left their holders' hands, give all characters another one.) While Demonized: at the end of each round, if you dealt no damage this round, lose 1 HP.

skill_jx_posthumous_plan.description_cn: 当你受到1点伤害后，你可以摸两张牌，然后你可以交给至多两名其他角色共计至多两张手牌。
skill_jx_posthumous_plan.description_en: After you take 1 damage, you may draw 2 cards, then give up to 2 of your hand cards to up to 2 other characters (1 card per character).

skill_jx_counter_spy.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以展示并交给一名其他角色一张手牌，其选择一项：1.展示所有手牌，弃置与此牌相同花色的牌；2.失去1点体力。
skill_jx_counter_spy.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Reveal and give 1 hand card to another character. They choose one: 1. Reveal all their hand cards and discard all cards matching the suit of the card you gave; 2. Lose 1 HP.

skill_audacious_stratagem.description_cn: 限定技、出牌阶段、你可以失去任意点体力、然后直到回合结束、你计算与其他角色的距离-X，且你可以多使用X张【杀】。（X为你失去的体力值）
skill_audacious_stratagem.description_en: Limited: During your Action Phase, you may lose any amount of HP. Until the end of this turn, your distance to other characters is reduced by X, and you may Use X additional [Kill] cards (X = HP lost).

skill_jx_gathered_wisdom.description_cn: 当你使用非转化锦囊牌时，你可以摸一张牌，若此牌是基本牌，你可以弃置此牌令你本回合手牌上限+1。
skill_jx_gathered_wisdom.description_en: When you Use a non-converted Tool card, you may draw 1 card. If that drawn card is a Basic card, you may discard it to increase your Hand Limit by 1 for this turn.

skill_war_god.description_cn: 锁定技，你的红桃手牌视为【杀】。你的红桃【杀】无距离和次数限制且不能被抵消。
skill_war_god.description_en: Locked: Your Hearts hand cards are treated as [Kill]. Your Hearts [Kill] has no distance or frequency limit and cannot be negated.

skill_war_soul.description_cn: 锁定技，当你受到1点伤害后，你令伤害来源获得1枚「梦魇」标记。当你死亡时，你令「梦魇」数最多的一名其他角色判定，若结果不为【桃】或【桃园结义】，你令其死亡。
skill_war_soul.description_en: Locked: When you take 1 damage, give the damage source 1 Nightmare token. When you die, the character with the most Nightmare tokens makes a judgment; if the result is not [Peach] or [Peach Garden], that character dies.

skill_war_god_v1.description_cn: 你可以将一张红桃手牌当【杀】使用或打出。你使用红桃【杀】无距离限制且伤害+1。
skill_war_god_v1.description_en: You may use or play a Hearts hand card as [Kill]. Your Hearts [Kill] has no distance restriction and deals +1 damage.

skill_war_soul_v1.description_cn: 锁定技，当你受到1点伤害后，你令伤害来源获得1枚「梦魇」；当你脱离濒死状态或死亡时，你令拥有最多「梦魇」的一名其他角色进行判定：若结果不为【桃】或【桃园结义】，其失去5点体力，然后弃所有「梦魇」。
skill_war_soul_v1.description_en: Locked: When you take 1 damage, give the damage source 1 Nightmare token. When you escape the Verge of Death State or die, the character with the most Nightmare tokens makes a judgment; if the result is not [Peach] or [Peach Garden], they lose 5 HP, then all Nightmare tokens are discarded.

skill_war_god_v2.description_cn: 锁定技，你的红桃手牌均只能当【杀】使用或打出；你使用红桃【杀】无距离和次数限制、不计入次数限制且多选择所有有「梦魇」的角色为目标；你每阶段使用的第一张【杀】不能被响应。
skill_war_god_v2.description_en: Locked: Your Hearts hand cards can only be used or played as [Kill]; your Hearts [Kill] has no distance or frequency restriction, does not count toward frequency limits, and additionally targets all characters with Nightmare tokens. The first [Kill] you use each phase cannot be responded to.

skill_war_god_v3.description_cn: 你可以将红色牌当【杀】使用或打出。你使用方块【杀】无距离限制，红桃【杀】无次数限制。
skill_war_god_v3.description_en: You may use or play a red card as [Kill]. Your Diamonds [Kill] has no distance restriction; your Hearts [Kill] has no frequency restriction.

skill_war_god_v4.description_cn: 锁定技，你每阶段使用的第一张【杀】不可被响应。你的手牌视为【杀】且你使用【杀】无距离和次数限制、不计入次数且额外指定所有拥有「梦魇」标记的其他角色为目标。
skill_war_god_v4.description_en: Locked: The first [Kill] you use each phase cannot be responded to. Your hand cards are treated as [Kill] and your [Kill] has no distance or frequency restriction, does not count toward the frequency limit, and additionally targets all other characters with Nightmare tokens.

skill_le_war_soul_v1.description_cn: 锁定技，当你受到1点伤害后/当你对「梦魔」标记 的角色造成伤害后,你令伤害来源/受到伤害的目标 获得1枚「梦魇」标记。当你死亡时,你选择是否判 定,若进行判定且结果不为【桃】或【桃园结义】,你选 择至少一名拥有「梦魇」标记的角色,令这些角色各 自依次失去点体力。(X为其拥有的「梦魇」标记数）
skill_le_war_soul_v1.description_en: Locked: When you take 1 damage, or when you deal damage to a character with Nightmare tokens, give the damage source or the damaged character 1 Nightmare token. When you die, you may choose whether to make a judgment. If you do and the result is not [Peach] or [Peach Garden], choose at least one character with Nightmare tokens; each loses HP equal to their Nightmare token count.

skill_wide_reading.description_cn: 摸牌阶段，你可以改为亮出牌堆顶的五张牌，然后获得每种花色的牌各一张。
skill_wide_reading.description_en: During your Draw Phase, you may instead reveal the top 5 cards of the deck and take one card of each suit.

skill_le_mental_attack.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以观看一名其他角色的手牌，然后你可以展示其中一张红桃牌并选择一项：1.弃置此牌；2.将此牌置于牌堆顶。
skill_le_mental_attack.description_en: Once per Action Phase: View another character's hand cards. You may reveal one Hearts card and choose: 1. Discard it; 2. Place it on top of the deck.

skill_zither_melody.description_cn: 弃牌阶段结束时，若你本阶段弃置过至少两张手牌，你可以选择令所有角色：1.各回复1点体力；2.各失去1点体力。
skill_zither_melody.description_en: At the end of your Discard Phase, if you discarded at least 2 hand cards this phase, choose: all characters 1. each recover 1 HP; or 2. each lose 1 HP.

skill_raging_flames.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可以选择至多三名角色，对其造成共计至多3点火焰伤害。若你将对一名角色分配至少2点伤害，你须先弃置四张花色各不相同的手牌并失去3点体力。
skill_raging_flames.description_en: Limited: During your Action Phase, choose up to 3 characters and deal them a combined total of up to 3 Fire damage. To assign 2 or more damage to a single character, you must first discard 4 cards of different suits and lose 3 HP.

skill_seven_stars.description_cn: 游戏开始时，你将牌堆顶的七张牌暗置于你的武将牌上，称为「星」，然后你可以用任意张手牌替换等量「星」。摸牌阶段结束时，你可以用任意张手牌替换等量「星」。
skill_seven_stars.description_en: At game start, place the top 7 deck cards face-down on your general card as Stars. You may swap any number of hand cards with an equal number of Stars. At the end of your Draw Phase, you may again swap any number of hand cards with an equal number of Stars.

skill_gale.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以移去一张「星」并选择一名角色，然后直到你的下回合开始，当其受到火焰伤害时，此伤害+1。
skill_gale.description_en: During your End Phase, remove 1 Star and choose a character. Until your next turn begins, Fire damage that character takes is increased by 1.

skill_great_fog.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以移去任意张「星」并选择等量角色，然后直到你的下回合开始，当其受到非雷电伤害时，防止此伤害。
skill_great_fog.description_en: During your End Phase, remove any number of Stars and choose an equal number of characters. Until your next turn begins, non-Lightning damage those characters take is prevented.

skill_gale_v1.description_cn: 出牌阶段结束时，你可以移去任意张「星」，然后对等量其他角色各造成1点伤害。
skill_gale_v1.description_en: At the end of your Action Phase, you may remove any number of Stars. Deal 1 damage to an equal number of other characters.

skill_great_fog_v1.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以移去一张「星」，然后直到你的下回合开始，当你受到普通伤害时，此伤害-1。
skill_great_fog_v1.description_en: During your End Phase, you may remove 1 Star. Until your next turn begins, normal damage you take is reduced by 1.

skill_rallying_hearts.description_cn: 当你受到1点伤害后，你可以随机获得每名其他角色区域里的一张牌，然后翻面。
skill_rallying_hearts.description_en: When you take 1 damage, you may randomly take 1 card from each other character's area, then flip your general card.

skill_shadow_flight.description_cn: 锁定技，其他角色计算与你的距离+1。
skill_shadow_flight.description_en: Locked: Other characters calculate their distance to you as +1.

skill_berserk_rage.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，你获得2枚「暴怒」标记。当你造成或受到1点伤害后，你获得1枚「暴怒」标记。
skill_berserk_rage.description_en: Locked: At game start, gain 2 Fury tokens. After you deal or take 1 damage, gain 1 Fury token.

skill_recklessness.description_cn: 锁定技，当你使用普通锦囊牌时，你移除1枚「暴怒」标记或失去1点体力。
skill_recklessness.description_en: Locked: When you use a Non Time-Delay Tool card, remove 1 Fury token or lose 1 HP.

skill_unstoppable.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以移除2枚「暴怒」标记并选择一名其他角色，然后你本回合获得「无双」且其防具失效。
skill_unstoppable.description_en: During your Action Phase, remove 2 Fury tokens and choose a character. This turn you gain Peerless and their equipped armor becomes ineffective.

skill_divine_fury.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以移除6枚「暴怒」标记，对所有其他角色各造成1点伤害，令这些角色先各弃置装备区里的所有牌，再弃置四张手牌，然后你翻面。
skill_divine_fury.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Remove 6 Fury tokens. Deal 1 damage to all other characters. They each discard all equipment, then discard 4 hand cards. You then flip your general card.

skill_desperate_stand.description_cn: 锁定技，你的手牌上限+2。当你进入或脱离濒死状态时，你摸一张牌。
skill_desperate_stand.description_en: Locked: Your hand card limit +2. When you enter or leave the Verge of Death State, draw 1 card.

skill_dragon_soul.description_cn: 你可以将至多两张花色相同的牌按以下规则使用或打出：红桃当【桃】；方片当火【杀】；梅花当【闪】；黑桃当【无懈可击】。若你以此法转化使用了两张：红色牌，此牌回复值或伤害值+1；黑色牌，你弃置当前回合角色一张牌。
skill_dragon_soul.description_en: You may use or play up to 2 cards of the same suit as follows: Hearts as [Peach]; Diamonds as [Fire Kill]; Clubs as [Dodge]; Spades as [Nullification]. If you convert 2 cards this way -- red cards: the recovery or damage value +1; black cards: discard 1 card from the current turn player.

skill_forbearance.description_cn: 锁定技，当你受到伤害后或于弃牌阶段内因弃置而失去手牌后，你获得X枚「忍」标记（X为此伤害值或你此次弃置的手牌数）。
skill_forbearance.description_en: Locked: After you take damage, or after you lose hand cards by discarding during your Discard Phase, gain X Forbearance tokens (X = the damage value or the number of hand cards discarded).

skill_seal_of_command.description_cn: 每名角色的回合结束时，若你于此回合内杀死过角色，你可以于此回合结束后执行一个额外的回合。
skill_seal_of_command.description_en: At the end of each character's turn, if you killed a character during that turn, you may take an extra turn after the current turn ends.

skill_supreme_advance.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若「忍」标记数量不小于4，你减1点体力上限，然后获得「极略」
skill_supreme_advance.description_en: Awakening: During your Starting Phase, if your Forbearance token count is at least 4, reduce your max HP by 1 and gain [Supreme Strategy].

skill_supreme_strategy.description_cn: 你可以移除1枚〖忍〗，发动下列一項技能：〖鬼才〗、〖放逐〗、〖集智〗、〖制衡〗或〖完杀〗。
skill_supreme_strategy.description_en: Remove 1 Forbearance token to activate one of the following skills: [Demonic Wit], [Exile], [Gather Wisdom], [Balance of Power], or [Total Annihilation].

skill_le_demonic_wit.description_cn: 当一名角色的判定牌生效前，你可以打出一张牌代替之。
skill_le_demonic_wit.description_en: Before a judgment card takes effect, you may play a card to replace it.

skill_le_exile.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以令一名其他角色选择一項：1. 摸X张牌并翻面；2. 弃置X张牌并失去1点体力（X为你已损失的体力值）。
skill_le_exile.description_en: After you take damage, you may instruct another character to choose: 1. Draw X cards and flip their general card; 2. Discard X cards and lose 1 HP (X = your HP Lost).

skill_le_gather_wisdom.description_cn: 当你使用普通锦囊牌时，你可以摸一张牌。若此牌是基本牌，你可以弃置此牌令本回合手牌上限+1。
skill_le_gather_wisdom.description_en: When you use a Non Time-Delay Tool card, you may draw 1 card. If that card is a Basic card, you may discard it to increase your hand limit by 1 this turn.

skill_le_balance_of_power.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置任意张牌，然后摸等量的牌。若你以此法弃置了所有手牌，则你多摸一张牌
skill_le_balance_of_power.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard any number of cards and draw the same number. If you discard all your hand cards this way, draw 1 extra card.

skill_le_total_annihilation.description_cn: 锁定技，你的回合内，只有你和处於瀕死狀态的角色才能使用【桃】。
skill_le_total_annihilation.description_en: Locked: During your turn, only you and characters in the Verge of Death State may use [Peach].

skill_dragon_fury.description_cn: 转换技，锁定技，出牌阶段开始时，阳：你失去1点体力并摸一张牌，然后本阶段你的红色手牌均视为火【杀】且无距离限制；阴：你减少1点体力上限并摸一张牌，然后本阶段你的锦囊牌均视为雷【杀】且无次数限制。
skill_dragon_fury.description_en: Convert/Locked: At the start of your Action Phase -- Yang: lose 1 HP and draw 1 card; your red hand cards are treated as [Fire Kill] with no distance limit this phase. Yin: reduce max HP by 1 and draw 1 card; your Tool cards are treated as [Lightning Kill] with no frequency limit this phase.

skill_entrenched_camp.description_cn: 锁定技，你始终处于连环状态。所有连环状态的角色手牌上限+2。结束阶段，你令一名其他角色进入连环状态。
skill_entrenched_camp.description_en: Locked: You are always in Chain status. All Chained characters' hand card limits +2. During your End Phase, put one other character into Chain status.

skill_military_stratagem.description_cn: 锁定技，当你受到或造成1点伤害后，你获得1枚「军略」标记。
skill_military_stratagem.description_en: Locked: After you deal or take 1 damage, gain 1 Stratagem token.

skill_crushing_advance.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，若「军略」数：为奇数，你可以对一名角色造成1点伤害；为偶数，你可以弃置一名角色区域里一张牌并令其进入连环状态。然后若大于7，你可以移除所有「军略」并对所有其他角色造成1点伤害。
skill_crushing_advance.description_en: At the start of your Action Phase, if Stratagem count is odd -- deal 1 damage to a character; if even -- discard 1 card from a character's area and Chain them. Then if count exceeds 7, remove all Stratagem tokens and deal 1 damage to all other characters.

skill_blaze_of_fire.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可以移除所有「军略」，令至多等量的连环状态角色弃置所有装备区里的牌，然后对其中一名角色造成1点火焰伤害。
skill_blaze_of_fire.description_en: Limited: During your Action Phase, remove all Stratagem tokens. Up to that many Chained characters discard all their equipment. Deal 1 Fire damage to one of those characters.

skill_usurp_the_edge.description_cn: 当你于出牌阶段内对一名其他角色造成伤害后，你可以废除你的一个装备栏，然后你选择其武将牌上的一个技能（除限定、觉醒、主公、隐匿技外），令其此技能于其下个回合结束之前无效，你于其下个回合结束或其死亡前拥有此技能且不能发动「夺锐」。
skill_usurp_the_edge.description_en: After dealing damage to a character during your Action Phase, you may destroy one of your equipment slots. Then choose one skill on that character's general card (excluding Limited, Awakening, Lord, and Hidden skills). That skill is disabled until the end of their next turn; you gain that skill until then (or until they die) and cannot use Skill Seizure again during that time.

skill_cry_of_the_fallen.description_cn: 锁定技，你攻击范围内已受伤的其他角色的手牌上限-1；当符合下列任意一项时机条件，若你有已废除的装备栏，你选择其中一个装备栏恢复：1.当你因【决斗】效果对你攻击范围内已受伤的其他角色造成伤害时；2.当你与你攻击范围内已受伤的其他角色的拼点结果确定后，若结果为你赢；3.当你受到你攻击范围内已受伤的其他角色对你造成伤害后。
skill_cry_of_the_fallen.description_en: Locked: Injured characters within your attack range have their hand card limit -1. Whenever any of the following occurs and you have a destroyed equipment slot, restore one destroyed slot: 1. You deal damage to an injured character in your attack range via [Duel]; 2. You win a showdown against an injured character in your attack range; 3. You take damage from an injured character within your attack range.

skill_spirit_ambush.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以观看一名其他角色的手牌并可以弃置你与其手牌中共计四张不同花色的牌，若如此做，你根据弃置牌中你的牌的数量执行效果：0张，减少1点体力上限；1张，结束出牌阶段且本回合手牌上限-1；3张，回复1点体力；4张，摸四张牌。
skill_spirit_ambush.description_en: Once per Action Phase: View a character's hand cards. You may discard a combined total of 4 cards of different suits from yours and theirs. Effect based on how many discarded cards were yours -- 0: reduce your max HP by 1; 1: end Action Phase and hand limit -1 this turn; 3: recover 1 HP; 4: draw 4 cards.

skill_camp_raid.description_cn: 回合开始时，若场上没有「营」标记，你获得「营」。结束阶段，你可以将「营」置于一名角色的武将牌上。有「营」的角色摸牌阶段多摸一张牌、出牌阶段使用【杀】的限制次数+1、手牌上限+1。有「营」的其他角色回合结束后，你获得其所有手牌和「营」。
skill_camp_raid.description_en: At the start of your turn, if no Camp token is in play, gain Camp. During your End Phase, you may place Camp on a character's general card. The Camp character draws +1 per Draw Phase, uses [Kill] +1 per Action Phase, and has hand limit +1. After their turn ends, take all their hand cards and Camp.

skill_soul_lure.description_cn: 结束阶段或当你成为【杀】的目标后，你可以令一名其他角色交给一张你声明花色的牌，若其没有则你观看其手牌然后弃置其中一张。
skill_soul_lure.description_en: During your End Phase, or after you become the target of a [Kill], you may ask one other character to give you one card of a suit you declare. If they have no card of that suit, you view their hand and discard one card from it.

skill_bewitching_hearts.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以展示两张花色相同的牌并分别交给两名其他角色，然后令这两名角色拼点，没赢的角色获得1个「魅惑」标记。拥有2个或更多「魅惑」的角色回合即将开始时，该角色移去其所有「魅惑」，此回合改为由你操控。
skill_bewitching_hearts.description_en: Once per Action Phase, you may reveal two cards of the same suit and give one to each of two different characters, then make those two characters compete in a showdown. The character who does not win gains 1 Bewitch token. When a character with 2 or more Bewitch tokens is about to begin their turn, that character removes all their Bewitch tokens and you take control of their turn instead.

skill_bewitching_hearts_v1.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次,你可以弃置一张牌并令两名 有手牌的角色拼点,然后你声明一种花色, 没赢的角色须交给你此花色的所有牌, 否则其获 得 个此花色的「魅惑」标记。有「魅惑」的角色不能使用或打出对应花色的牌;有「魅惑」的角色的回合结束时,移除「魅惑」。
skill_bewitching_hearts_v1.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 1 card and make two characters with hand cards compete in a showdown. Declare a suit — the loser must give you all cards of that suit; if they have none, they gain Bewitch tokens for each missing card of that suit. A Bewitched character cannot use or play cards of that suit. At the end of a Bewitched character's turn, remove their Bewitch tokens.

skill_five_spirits.description_cn: 出牌阶段限两次，你可以选择一名未拥有「五灵」标记的角色，按照你指定的顺序向其传授「五禽戏」。拥有「五灵」标记的角色拥有按照你指定的效果，并在准备阶段切换为下一种。虎灵：若你使用的牌仅指定唯一目标，则此牌对目标角色造成伤害时，此伤害+1。鹤灵：拥有「鹤」标记的角色获得「鹤」标记时，摸三张牌。熊灵：每回合限一次，你受到伤害时，此伤害-1。猿灵：拥有「猿」标记的角色获得「猿」标记时，选择另一名角色，获得其装备区的一张牌。鹿灵：你获得「鹿」标记时，回复1点体力，移除判定区所有牌。你不能成为延时锦囊目标。
skill_five_spirits.description_en: Twice per Action Phase: Choose a character without a Five Spirits token and assign them the Five Animals Exercise in your chosen order. The character gains the current active effect and switches to the next during their Starting Phase. Tiger: if your card targets only one character, damage dealt +1. Crane: when the Crane character gains a Crane token, draw 3 cards. Bear: once per turn, damage you take -1. Ape: when the Ape character gains an Ape token, take 1 equipment from another character. Deer: when you gain a Deer token, recover 1 HP and remove all cards from your judgment area; you cannot be targeted by Delayed Tool cards.

skill_traveling_physician.description_cn: 弃牌阶段结束时，你可以将此阶段弃置的牌置入「仁」区。出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置所有「仁」区的牌，令所有角色回复1点体力。
skill_traveling_physician.description_en: At the end of your Discard Phase, you may place cards discarded this phase into the Benevolence area. Once per Action Phase: discard all Benevolence area cards; all characters recover 1 HP.

skill_five_spirits_tiger.description_cn: 若你使用的牌仅指定唯一目标，则此牌对目标角色造成伤害时，此伤害+1。
skill_five_spirits_tiger.description_en: If a card you use targets only one character, damage dealt by that card +1.

skill_five_spirits_deer.description_cn: 你获得「鹿靈」标記时，回复1点体力，移除判定区所有牌。你不能成为延时锦囊牌的目标
skill_five_spirits_deer.description_en: When you gain a Deer token, recover 1 HP and remove all cards from your Judgment Zone. You cannot be targeted by Time-Delayed Tool cards.

skill_five_spirits_bear.description_cn: 每回合限一次，你受到伤害时，此伤害-1。
skill_five_spirits_bear.description_en: Once per turn, damage you take is reduced by 1.

skill_five_spirits_ape.description_cn: 你获得「猿」标記时，选择一名其他角色，获得其裝备区里的一张牌
skill_five_spirits_ape.description_en: When you gain an Ape token, choose another character and take 1 card from their Equipment Zone.

skill_five_spirits_crane.description_cn: 你获得「鹤」标記时，摸三张牌。
skill_five_spirits_crane.description_en: When you gain a Crane token, draw 3 cards.

skill_heal_the_world.description_cn: 游戏开始时，你获得3枚「药」（数量至多为3）。当一名角色进入濒死状态时，你可以弃1枚「药」，令其将体力回复至1点。当你于回合外失去红色手牌时，你获得等量「药」。你的手牌上限+3。+1。鹤灵：拥有「鹤」标记的角色获得「鹤」标记时，摸三张牌。熊灵：每回合限一次，你受到伤害时，此伤害-1。猿灵：拥有「猿」标记的角色获得「猿」标记时，选择另一名角色，获得其装备区的一张牌。鹿灵：你获得「鹿」标记时，回复1点体力，移除判定区所有牌。你不能成为延时锦囊目标。
skill_heal_the_world.description_en: At game start, gain 3 Medicine tokens (max 3). When a character enters the Verge of Death State, you may spend 1 Medicine token to recover their HP to 1. When you lose red hand cards outside your turn, gain an equal number of Medicine tokens. Your hand limit +3.

skill_peach_immortal.description_cn: 你可以将一张红桃牌当【桃】使用。当其他角色使用【桃】时，你摸一张牌
skill_peach_immortal.description_en: You may use a Hearts card as [Peach]. When another character uses [Peach], you draw 1 card.

skill_divine_needle.description_cn: 回合开始时，你可以弃任意枚「药」，然后选择一项：1.令等量角色各回复1点体力；2.令等量角色各失去1点体力。
skill_divine_needle.description_en: At the start of your turn, you may discard any number of Medicine tokens and choose: 1. An equal number of characters each recover 1 HP; 2. An equal number of characters each lose 1 HP.

skill_soul_refinement.description_cn: 锁定技，若场上最大阵营为反贼、其他角色的手牌上限-1，所有角色使用【杀】的次数和攻击范围+1，主忠、其他角色不能对其以外的角色使用【桃】。若有多个最大阵营，其他角色死亡后，杀死其的角色摸两张牌或回复1点体力；每轮开始时，你展示一张未加入游戏或死亡角色的身份牌，本轮该阵营角色数视为+1。
skill_soul_refinement.description_en: Locked: While the largest faction is Rebel — all other characters' hand card limits are -1, all characters' [Kill] frequency and attack range are +1, and Lord/Loyalist characters cannot use [Peach] on anyone but you. If there are multiple tied largest factions, whenever another character dies the killer draws 2 cards or recovers 1 HP. At the start of each round, reveal one role card from outside the game or from a dead character; that faction's count is treated as +1 for this round.

skill_omen_of_chaos.description_cn: 限定技，一名角色的濒死结算完成后，若其未脱离濒死状态，你可以令其增加3点体力上限并失去所有非锁定技，然后其将体力回复至3点并摸四张牌，本局游戏你可以令其减少1点体力上限并对一名你选择的角色造成1点伤害（出牌阶段每名角色限一次）。
skill_omen_of_chaos.description_en: Limited: After a Verge of Death Resolution completes for a character who has not escaped the Verge of Death State, you may increase their max HP by 3, remove all their non-Locked skills, recover their HP to 3, and let them draw 4 cards. For the rest of the game you may, once per character per Action Phase, reduce their max HP by 1 to deal 1 damage to a character of your choice.

skill_sacrifice_armor.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，你废除防具栏并获得一个额外的武器栏。
skill_sacrifice_armor.description_en: Locked: At game start, destroy your armor slot and gain an extra weapon slot.

skill_carry_generals.description_cn: 锁定技，准备阶段，你从随机五张武将牌中选择任意张当武器牌置于装备区，此类牌：无花色点数、攻击范围为牌上的体力上限、效果为牌上描述中含有【杀】的技能（觉醒技、限定技、转换技、主公技除外）、离开装备区时销毁。
skill_carry_generals.description_en: Locked: During your Starting Phase, choose any number of cards from 5 randomly drawn general cards to place in your equipment zone as weapon cards. These cards have no suit or value; their attack range equals the max HP on that general card; their effect is any skill on that card containing [Kill] (excluding Awakening, Limited, Convert, and Lord skills); they are destroyed when they leave the equipment zone.

skill_crushing_strike.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以弃置一张牌，然后对一名攻击范围内距离最远的其他角色造成1点伤害，每名角色每回合限一次。
skill_crushing_strike.description_en: During your Action Phase, discard 1 card to deal 1 damage to the farthest character within your attack range. Once per character per turn.

skill_divine_guard.description_cn: 回合开始时，可以以一名没有「卫」的角获得「卫」标记（若你的体力值为1，则改为至多两名）。有「卫」的角色受到伤害时，其可以移除「卫」，然后将伤害转移给你。回合开始时，你可以令一名没有「卫」的角色获得「卫」。当有「卫」的角色受到伤害时，其可以弃其「卫」，然后将此伤害转移给你。
skill_divine_guard.description_en: At the start of your turn, you may give 1 Guard token to a character without one (if your HP Value is 1, give to up to 2 characters instead). When a Guarded character takes damage, they may discard their Guard token to transfer that damage to you.

skill_fierce_advent.description_cn: 锁定技，当一名角色弃其「卫」后，你选择一项：1.回复1点体力；2.对你攻击范围内的一名其他角色造成1点伤害。
skill_fierce_advent.description_en: Locked: When a character discards their Guard token, choose: 1. Recover 1 HP; 2. Deal 1 damage to a character within your attack range.

skill_savage_strike.description_cn: 锁定技，若场上有「卫」，你造成的伤害+1。
skill_savage_strike.description_en: Locked: While any Guard token is in play, damage you deal +1.

skill_couch_counsel.description_cn: （身份场）游戏开始时，你可以重新分配除主公外每名角色的座次。（斗地主）游戏开始时，你可以重新分配三号位以外的角色的座次。
skill_couch_counsel.description_en: (Identity mode) At game start, you may reassign seating positions for all characters except the Lord. (Landlord mode) You may reassign seating for all characters except seat 3.

skill_claim_the_province.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你交给一名角色X张牌（X为其场上牌的张数），然后你获得其场上的所有牌。
skill_claim_the_province.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Give a character X cards (X = number of cards in their play area), then take all cards from their play area.

skill_alliance_of_wisdom.description_cn: （身份场）你的回合结束后，你可以选择一名其他角色，你与其随机平均分配双方手牌（若为奇数则你分配较多张数）。（斗地主、团战类）你的回合结束后，你可选择一名手牌数不大于x的其他角色（x为你的手牌数+1），你与其随机平均分配双方手牌（若为奇数则你分配较多张数）。
skill_alliance_of_wisdom.description_en: (Identity mode) After your turn ends, choose another character and randomly redistribute both your hand cards evenly; you keep the extra if odd. (Landlord/Team mode) After your turn ends, choose a character with hand cards not exceeding your count +1 and redistribute both hands evenly; you keep the extra if odd.

skill_rein_and_balance.description_cn: 锁定技，回合开始时，你弃置任意张花色不同的牌，随机获得等量吴势力武将的技能。回合结束时，你失去以此法获得的技能，摸等量张牌。
skill_rein_and_balance.description_en: Locked: At the start of your turn, discard any number of cards of different suits and randomly gain an equal number of Wu-faction generals' skills. At the end of your turn, lose those skills and draw that many cards.

skill_imperial_will.description_cn: 觉醒技，当你的技能数超过体力上限后，你减少1点体力上限，失去任意个其他技能并获得「圣质」「权道」「持纲」中的前等量个。
skill_imperial_will.description_en: Awakening: When your skill count exceeds your max HP, reduce max HP by 1, lose any number of other skills, and gain the first matching number of skills among: Sacred Essence, Sovereign Path, and Uphold Order.

skill_sacred_essence.description_cn: 锁定技，当你发动非锁定技后，你本回合使用的下一张牌无距离和次数限制。
skill_sacred_essence.description_en: Locked: After you activate a non-Locked skill, the next card you use this turn has no distance or frequency restriction.

skill_sovereign_path.description_cn: 锁定技，当你使用【杀】或普通锦囊牌时，你将手牌中两者数量弃至相同并摸一张牌。
skill_sovereign_path.description_en: Locked: When you use a [Kill] or a Non Time-Delay Tool card, discard hand cards until your counts of [Kill] and Tool cards are equal, then draw 1 card.

skill_uphold_order.description_cn: 转换技，锁定技，阴：你的判定阶段改为出牌阶段。；阳：你的判定阶段改为摸牌阶段
skill_uphold_order.description_en: Convert/Locked — Yin: Your Judgment Phase becomes an Action Phase. Yang: Your Judgment Phase becomes a Draw Phase.

skill_heavens_aid.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，将8张【奇正相生※】加入牌堆。【奇正相生】对你无效。
skill_heavens_aid.description_en: Locked: At game start, add 8 [Qizheng Xiangsheng] cards to the deck. [Qizheng Xiangsheng] has no effect on you.

skill_spirit_strategy.description_cn: 锁定技。一名角色使用非虚拟非转化的锦囊牌时，若此牌的牌名属于智囊牌名、「定汉」已记录的牌名或【奇正相生】时，你摸一张牌。（智囊牌的初始記錄为【无中生有】、【过河拆橋】、【无懈可擊】）。
skill_spirit_strategy.description_en: Locked: When a character uses a non-virtual, non-converted Tool card whose name matches a Strategist card name, a name recorded in [Grand Pacification], or [Qizheng Xiangsheng], you draw 1 card. (Initial Strategist card names: [Resupply], [Dismantle], [Nullification].)

skill_grand_pacification.description_cn: 每种牌名限一次，你成为锦囊牌的目标时，你记录此牌名，然后取消之。你的回合开始时，你可以在「定汉」记录中，增加或移除一种锦囊牌牌名。
skill_grand_pacification.description_en: Once per card name: when you become the target of a Tool card, record that card name and negate its effect on you. At the start of your turn, you may add or remove one Tool card name from your Grand Pacification record.

skill_astute_insight.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，若你体力上限小于10，你可进行一次判定：若判定结果与本阶段内以此法进行判定的判定结果花色均不相同，且此时你体力上限小于10，你可以重复此判定并增加1点体力上限。然后你可以将所有生效的判定牌交给任意一名角色。然后若其手牌数为全场最多，你减少1点体力上限。
skill_astute_insight.description_en: Once per Action Phase: If your max HP is below 10, make a judgment. If the result is a different suit from all prior judgments this phase, and your max HP is still below 10, repeat and increase max HP by 1 each time. Then you may give all activated judgment cards to any one character. If that character then has the most hand cards in play, reduce your max HP by 1.

skill_heavenly_soar.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若所有存活的角色在本局游戏内均受到过伤害，你增加2点体力上限，回复1点体力，然后令一名角色获得技能「佐幸」。
skill_heavenly_soar.description_en: Awakening: During your Starting Phase, if all surviving characters have taken damage this game, increase your max HP by 2, recover 1 HP, then grant one character the skill Blessing.

skill_radiant_passage.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可选择一名角色：若其有未触发的觉醒技，且你体力上限不小于X（X为场上存活人数），则你选择其中一个觉醒技，其视为已满足觉醒条件；否则其摸四张牌。若如此做，你减少2点体力上限。
skill_radiant_passage.description_en: Limited: During your Action Phase, choose a character. If they have an untriggered Awakening skill and your max HP is at least equal to the number of survivors, choose one of their Awakening skills and they are treated as having met its condition. Otherwise they draw 4 cards. Either way, reduce your max HP by 2.

skill_blessing.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次,若令你获得此技能的角色存活且体力上 限大于1,你可以令该角色减1点体力上限,然后你视为使 用一张普通锦囊牌。
skill_blessing.description_en: Once per Action Phase: If the character who granted you this skill is alive and has a max HP greater than 1, you may reduce their max HP by 1 and treat it as using a Non Time-Delay Tool card.

skill_heroic_dominance.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择一名体力值上限大于1的其他角色，令其减少1点体力值上限并获得「平定」标记，然后你减少1点体力值上限。你对拥有「平定」标记的角色使用牌没有距离限制。
skill_heroic_dominance.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose a character with max HP greater than 1. They reduce their max HP by 1 and gain a Pacify token; you reduce your max HP by 1. You have no distance restriction when using cards against Pacified characters.

skill_sea_overturned.description_cn: 锁定技，拥有「平定」标记的角色不能响应你对其使用的牌。你使用牌指定有「平定」标记的角色为目标时，若本回合你以此法获得的牌少于两张，你摸一张牌。拥有「平定」标记的角色死亡时，你增加X点体力值上限并摸X张牌（X为其拥有的「平定」标记数）。
skill_sea_overturned.description_en: Locked: Pacified characters cannot respond to cards you use against them. When you target a Pacified character, if you have gained fewer than 2 cards this way this turn, draw 1 card. When a Pacified character dies, increase your max HP by X and draw X cards (X = their Pacify token count).

skill_reckless_crossing.description_cn: 锁定技，你的手牌数上限等于已损失体力值。当你受到其他角色造成的伤害时，若你有手牌且体力上限大于1，则防止本次伤害，然后减少1点体力值上限并将1张手牌交给一名其他角色，然后若你拥有技能「英霸」，令伤害来源获得1个「平定」标记。
skill_reckless_crossing.description_en: Locked: Your hand card limit equals your lost HP. When another character deals damage to you, if you have hand cards and your max HP is greater than 1, prevent the damage, reduce your max HP by 1, give 1 hand card to a character, and if you have Heroic Dominance, give the damage source 1 Pacify token.

skill_steadfast_valor.description_cn: 锁定技，当你成为体力值大于你的角色使用【杀】的目标时，你进行判定：若判定结果为红桃，取消之。
skill_steadfast_valor.description_en: Locked: When you become the target of a [Kill] used by a character with more HP than you, make a judgment. If the result is a Hearts card, negate that [Kill].

skill_le_break_the_siege.description_cn: 使命技，游戏开始时，你令所有其他角色获得「围」标记。回合开始时，你令所有拥有「围」标记的角色将「围」标记移动到下家角色（若你获得「围」标记，则直接交给下家）。有「围」的角色受到伤害后，弃置其「围」标记。有「围」的角色回合开始时，你可以选择一项：1.弃置一张手牌，对其造成1点伤害；2.若其体力值不大于你，获得其一张手牌；若如此做，直到本回合结束，你视为在其攻击范围内。成功：你的回合开始时，若场上没有「围」标记，你获得技能「神著※」。失败：若你成功达成使命前，进入濒死状态时，你将体力值回复至1点，移除场上所有的「围」标记，然后弃置装备区所有牌。
skill_le_break_the_siege.description_en: Mission: At game start, all other characters gain a Siege token. At the start of your turn, all Sieged characters pass their Siege token to their next player (if you receive one, pass it on immediately). Sieged characters lose their token upon taking damage. When a Sieged character's turn begins, choose: 1. Discard 1 hand card and deal 1 damage to them; 2. If their HP does not exceed yours, take 1 hand card from them. If you act, you are treated as within their attack range until end of turn. Success: At the start of your turn, if no Siege tokens remain in play, gain skill Divine Record. Failure: If you enter the Verge of Death State before succeeding, recover to 1 HP, remove all Siege tokens, and discard all your equipment.

skill_divine_annals.description_cn: 锁定技，当你使用非转化且非虚拟的【杀】结算结束后，你选择一項：1.摸一张牌，然后若此时是你的出牌阶段，你本阶段使用【杀】的次数上限+1；2.摸三张牌，然后你本回合不能再使用【杀】。
skill_divine_annals.description_en: Locked: After a non-converted, non-virtual [Kill] you use finishes resolving, choose: 1. Draw 1 card; if it is currently your Action Phase, your [Kill] frequency limit +1 this phase; 2. Draw 3 cards, then you cannot use [Kill] again this turn.

skill_steed_hunt.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，从下家开始所有角色随机使用牌堆中的一张坐骑。你可将场上的一张进攻马当【杀】（不计入次数）、防御马当【闪】使用或打出，以此法失去坐骑的角色本回合非锁定技失效，你与其本回合受到的伤害+1且改为雷电伤害。
skill_steed_hunt.description_en: Locked: At the start of the game, each character beginning with your next-seat neighbor randomly equips one mount from the deck. You may treat one Attack Horse on the field as a [Kill] (not counting toward frequency) or one Defense Horse as a [Dodge] to use or play. A character who loses their mount this way has all non-Locked skills disabled for this turn, and all damage you and that character take this turn is +1 and becomes Thunder damage.

skill_unbridled_surge.description_cn: 当你使用或打出牌时，若你没有该花色的手牌，你可摸X张牌（X为场上与此牌花色相同的装备数量）。
skill_unbridled_surge.description_en: Whenever you use or play a card, if you have no hand cards of that suit, you may draw X cards (X = the number of equipment cards on the field that share that card's suit).

skill_contest_of_pillars.description_cn: 锁定技，每轮结束时，你令所有角色各弃其所有「擎」，然后本轮於一回合内造成伤害值最多的一名角色（多名角色中若包含你，则选择你，否则随机选择其中一名）获得X枚「擎」并与你各摸一张牌（X为其該回合造成的伤害值）。若为你获得「擎」且为获得数量最多的一次，你改为摸X张牌（至多摸五张）。
skill_contest_of_pillars.description_en: Locked: At the end of each round, all characters discard all their Pillar tokens. The character who dealt the most damage in a single turn this round (if tied and you are among them choose yourself, otherwise random) gains X Pillar tokens and both draw 1 card (X = damage dealt that turn). If you gain Pillar tokens and it is the highest count gained this way, instead draw X cards (max 5).

skill_divine_tribunal.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以令一名其他角色进行判定且你获得判定牌。若判定牌包含以下内容，其获得（已有标記则改为修改）对应标記：体力：「笞」标記，每次受到伤害后失去等量体力；武器：「杖」标记，无法响应【杀】；打出：「徒」标记，以此法外失去手牌后随机弃置一张手牌；距离：「流」标记，结束阶段将武将牌翻面；若判定牌不包含以上内容，該角色获得一个「死」标記且手牌上限減少其身上「死」标記个数，然后你获得其区域内一张牌。「死」标記个数大於场上存活人数的角色回合结束时，其直接死亡。
skill_divine_tribunal.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose another character to make a judgment; you gain the judgment card. Based on the card's face information, they gain (or modify) a corresponding token: HP value related — Flog token: lose HP equal to damage received each time; Weapon related — Rod token: cannot respond to [Kill]; Play related — Bondsman token: randomly discard 1 hand card each time a hand card is lost other than this way; Distance related — Exile token: flip general card at End Phase. If none of the above apply, they gain 1 Death token and their hand limit decreases by their Death token count; you take 1 card from their area. A character whose Death token count exceeds the number of survivors dies at the end of their turn.

skill_patrol_envoy.description_cn: 锁定技，你的多目标锦囊牌均视为无色的【杀】。你使用无色牌无距离和次数限制且可以额外指定任意个目标，然后修改〖神裁〗的发动次数（每次修改次数+1，至多为5）。
skill_patrol_envoy.description_en: Locked: Your multi-target Tool cards are treated as colorless [Kill]. Your colorless cards have no distance or frequency restriction and may target any number of additional characters; each use also modifies [Divine Judgment]'s activation limit (+1 each time, max 5).

skill_ominous_signs.description_cn: 锁定技,你使用或打出一张牌后,获得等于此牌点数 的「黄」标记。每次「黄」的十位数因此变化时,你 获得牌堆中一张与变化后十位数点数相同的牌锁定技，当你使用或打出牌时，你获得此牌点数的「黄」标记，若「黄」的十位数变化，你获得牌堆中一张与变化后十位数点数相同的牌。
skill_ominous_signs.description_en: Locked: When you use or play a card, gain Yellow tokens equal to that card's rank. Whenever the tens digit of your Yellow token count increases, take 1 card from the deck whose rank equals that new tens digit.

skill_three_heads.description_cn: 当你受到伤害时,你可以亮出牌堆顶三张牌,若其中 有本回合没使用过的牌的类型,则防止此伤害。
skill_three_heads.description_en: When you would take damage, you may reveal the top 3 cards of the deck. If any is a card type you have not used this turn, prevent the damage.

skill_army_rampage.description_cn: 准备阶段,若「黄」标记数量大于牌堆的剩余牌数, 你可以移去所有「黄」标记,然后随机获得点数之和 为36的牌并洗牌。
skill_army_rampage.description_en: During your Starting Phase, if your Yellow token count exceeds the remaining cards in the deck, you may remove all Yellow tokens, then randomly gain cards whose combined rank totals 36 and shuffle the deck.

skill_heavenly_calamity.description_cn: 每回合结束时,若本回合牌堆洗过牌,你可以选择至 多三名其他角色,依次对这些角色造成点雷电伤害 (X为其手牌中【闪】的数量且至少为1)。
skill_heavenly_calamity.description_en: At the end of each turn, if the deck was shuffled this turn, you may choose up to 3 other characters and deal each X Lightning damage in sequence (X = the number of [Dodge] cards in their hand, minimum 1).

skill_illusion_arts.description_cn: 锁定技,当你受到1点伤害或每轮开始时,你获得两 张〖幻术〗牌(〖幻术〗牌不计入手牌上限且至多为 你体力上限的两倍),若〖幻术〗牌达到上限则改为 摸等量的牌。出牌阶段开始时,手牌中所有未「幻 化」的〖幻术〗牌变为同花色的其他牌。其他角色获 得〖幻术〗牌后销毁之,然后你摸一张牌。
skill_illusion_arts.description_en: Locked: When you take 1 damage or at the start of each round, gain 2 Illusion cards (these do not count toward your hand limit; maximum = twice your max HP); if the cap is reached, draw those cards instead. At the start of your Action Phase, all un-Transformed Illusion cards become other cards of the same suit. When another character gains an Illusion card, it is immediately destroyed and you draw 1 card.

skill_transform.description_cn: 每回合限两次,你可以〖幻化〗手中的一张〖幻术〗 牌,令此牌的花色、点数、牌名与你的一张手牌(不包含 〖幻术〗牌)一致,若〖幻化〗目标的花色与〖幻术〗 牌一致,你获得一张〖幻术〗牌。(每张牌只能〖幻化〗和被〖幻化〗各一次)
skill_transform.description_en: Twice per turn: Transform an Illusion card in hand — it adopts the suit, rank, and name of one of your non-Illusion hand cards. If their suits match, gain 1 Illusion card. (Each card may be Transformed and be a Transformation target only once.)

skill_realm_of_illusion.description_cn: 限定技,你获得X张〖幻术〗牌,然后直到本回合结 束,〖幻化〗发动次数增加次且可以令〖幻术〗牌 成为〖幻化〗目标(X为你当前已损失体力值的两倍, 且至少为1
skill_realm_of_illusion.description_en: Limited: Gain X Illusion cards. Until the end of this turn, [Transform]'s activation limit increases and Illusion cards may also be selected as Transformation targets (X = twice your current HP Lost, minimum 1).

skill_expand_territory.description_cn: 锁定技，你的手牌区添加三个分别令手牌具有以下效果的副区域（初始为未开发状态）：1、无次数与距离限制；2、伤害与回复值+1；3、无法被响应。出牌阶段开始和结束时，你将未分配的手牌分配至任意已开发的副区域中。
skill_expand_territory.description_en: Locked: Your hand card zone gains three sub-zones, each granting cards assigned to it one of the following effects (each sub-zone starts undeveloped): 1. No frequency or distance restrictions; 2. Damage and recovery values +1; 3. Cannot be responded to. At the start and end of your Action Phase, assign any unassigned hand cards to any already-developed sub-zone.

skill_daring_advance.description_cn: 锁定技，你造成或受到两次伤害后开发一个副区域，然后摸X张牌（X为已开发的副区域数，若你手牌数为全场最多则改为摸一张牌）。
skill_daring_advance.description_en: Locked: After you deal or take damage twice, develop one sub-zone, then draw X cards (X = the number of developed sub-zones; if your hand card count is the highest on the field, draw 1 card instead).

skill_surprise_route.description_cn: 觉醒技，每个回合结束后，若你的手牌副区域均已开发，你减1体力上限，获得「摧心」，然后将座次移动至除你以外的两名相邻角色之间并获得一个额外的回合。
skill_surprise_route.description_en: Awakening: At the end of each turn, if all your hand card sub-zones are developed, reduce your max HP by 1, gain [Crushing Push], then move your seat position to between any two adjacent characters other than yourself and take an extra turn.

skill_crushing_push.description_cn: 你使用手牌对上家或下家结算完毕后，可视为对下家或上家再次使用一次。
skill_crushing_push.description_en: After you finish resolving a hand card used against the character to your left or right, you may treat it as used once more against the character on the other side.

skill_heavens_mandate.description_cn: 锁定技，当有基本牌或普通锦囊牌不是因使用而进入弃牌堆后，你获得一个〖天任〗标記。当你的〖天任〗标記大於等於你的体力上限时，你移除等量的〖天任〗然后增加1点体力上限并摸两张牌。
skill_heavens_mandate.description_en: Locked: Whenever a Basic or Non Time-Delay Tool card enters the Discard Pile other than by being used, gain 1 Mandate token. When your Mandate token count reaches or exceeds your max HP, remove that many tokens, increase your max HP by 1, and draw 2 cards.

skill_nine_campaigns.description_cn: 你每次使用九张不同牌名的牌后，你可以亮出牌堆顶的九张牌，你选择并获得其中点数重复的牌各一张，其余的牌置入弃牌堆。
skill_nine_campaigns.description_en: Each time you use 9 cards with different names, you may reveal the top 9 cards of the deck. Choose and keep one copy of each card with a duplicated rank; place the rest in the Discard Pile.

skill_pacify_xiang.description_cn: 限定技， 出牌阶段，你可以減9点体力上限。若如此做，你视为使用至多九张火【杀】。然后你失去〖九伐〗且本局遊戲你的手牌上限改为体力上限。
skill_pacify_xiang.description_en: Limited: During your Action Phase, you may reduce your max HP by 9. If you do, you are treated as using up to 9 [Fire Kill] cards. You then lose [Nine Campaigns] and your hand limit for the rest of the game equals your max HP.

skill_astral_soul.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次,你可以观看牌堆顶五张牌,用任 意张手牌交换其中等量的牌,并将这些牌以任意顺 序置于牌堆顶,然后令一名其他角色展示你手牌与 牌堆顶共五张牌,你对其依次使用其中的【杀】。
skill_astral_soul.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Look at the top 5 cards of the Draw Pile. Exchange any number of your hand cards for an equal number among those 5, then arrange all 5 in any order and return them to the top of the Draw Pile. Then choose another character to reveal the top 5 cards of the Draw Pile combined with your hand (5 total); use each [Kill] among them against that character in sequence.

skill_celestial_tide.description_cn: 锁定技,结束阶段,你选择一个区域并弃置其中 所有牌,然后依次弃置任意名其他角色相同区域 各一张牌,因此弃置牌且未弃置【杀】的角色失 去点体力。
skill_celestial_tide.description_en: Locked: During your End Phase, choose a zone. Discard all cards in that zone, then in sequence discard one card from the same zone of each other character. Any character who discarded cards this way but did not discard a [Kill] loses 1 HP.

skill_divine_deluge.description_cn: 限定技,当你进入濒死状态时,你可以回复点体 力(为你本局进入濒死状态的次数),并对一名 角色造成等量的雷电伤害,然后获得〖回天〗。
skill_divine_deluge.description_en: Limited: When you enter the Verge of Death State, you may recover X HP (X = the number of times you have entered the Verge of Death State this game) and deal X lightning damage to one character. Then gain [Return of Heaven].

skill_return_of_heaven.description_cn: 一名体力值大于你的角色的回合结束时,你可以 摸一张牌并执行一个额外的回合。每轮开始时, 若你发动过此技能,你死亡。
skill_return_of_heaven.description_en: At the end of a character's turn whose HP Value is greater than yours, you may draw 1 card and take an additional turn. At the start of each round, if you have activated this skill, you die.

skill_rend_the_sky.description_cn: 当你对其他角色造成伤害后，你可以在任意部位中选择一个「击伤」；可选择被击伤的部位：力烽：令其随机弃置一半手牌（向上取整）。地机：令其下一次受到的伤害+1直到其回合结束。中枢：令其使用的下一张牌无效直到其回合结束。气海：令其不能使用或打出红桃牌直到其回合结束。若你击伤了一名角色，则本回合再次击伤该角色时出现「天冲」选项。天冲：令其失去所有体力值，若其因此死亡，你+1体力上限。
skill_rend_the_sky.description_en: After you deal damage to another character, you may choose a Strike Location: Power — they randomly discard half their hand cards (round up); Ground — the next damage they take this turn +1; Center — the next card they use this turn is Nullified; Qi Sea — they cannot use or play Hearts cards until the end of their turn. If you have already struck that character this turn, a second strike adds the Heaven Strike option — Heaven Strike: they lose all HP; if they die from this, your max HP +1.

skill_decisive_slash.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以选择一项：1.摸体力值张牌，此阶段使用的下一张【杀】无距离限制且不能被响应；2.摸损失体力值张牌，此阶段下一次造成伤害后，回复等量体力值。
skill_decisive_slash.description_en: At the start of your Action Phase, choose: 1. Draw cards equal to your HP Value; the next [Kill] you use this phase has no distance restriction and cannot be responded to; 2. Draw cards equal to your HP Lost; after the next damage you deal this phase, recover HP equal to that damage.

skill_divine_verse.description_cn: 结束阶段，若你的手牌数为：奇数，你可以对一名其他角色造成1点雷电伤害，若其因此死亡，你可以重复此流程；偶数，你可以令一名角色摸一张牌或弃置其一张牌，然后若其手牌数等于体力值，你可以重复此流程（不能对本回合选择过的目标发动）。回合结束后，你摸X张牌（X为此技能本回合发动次数且至多为5）。
skill_divine_verse.description_en: During your End Phase, if your hand card count is: odd — you may deal 1 Lightning damage to another character; if they die from this, you may repeat; even — you may instruct a character to draw 1 card or discard 1 hand card; if their hand card count then equals their HP Value, you may repeat (cannot target the same character twice this turn). After your turn ends, draw X cards (X = number of times this skill activated this turn, max 5).

skill_seven_strings.description_cn: 锁定技，你的手牌上限为7。
skill_seven_strings.description_en: Locked: Your hand card limit is 7.

skill_flying_teal.description_cn: 你可以将一张黑色牌当【闪】使用或打出。
skill_flying_teal.description_en: You may use or play a black card as [Dodge].

skill_le_divine_verse.description_cn: 结束阶段，若你的手牌数为：奇数，你可以对一名其他角色造成1点雷电伤害，若其因此死亡，你可以重复此流程；偶数，你可以令一名角色摸一张牌或弃置一张手牌，然后若其手牌数等于体力值，你可以重复此流程。
skill_le_divine_verse.description_en: During your End Phase, if your hand card count is: odd — you may deal 1 Lightning damage to another character; if they die from this, you may repeat; even — you may instruct a character to draw 1 card or discard 1 hand card; if their hand card count then equals their HP Value, you may repeat.
