skill_phoenix_chain.description_cn: 锁定技,你的回合内,所有角色不能弃置手牌 且当前手牌与本回合进入弃牌堆的牌花色不同 的牌均视为【铁索连环】。
skill_phoenix_chain.description_en: Locked: During your turn, no character may discard hand cards, and any hand card whose suit differs from all suits of cards that entered the Discard Pile this turn is treated as [Iron Shackles].

skill_phoenix_blaze.description_cn: 锁定技,转换技,当你使用牌指定唯一目标 后,阳:你令其摸一张牌;阴:你对其造成1 点火属性伤害。
skill_phoenix_blaze.description_en: Convert/Locked: When you use a card targeting only one character — Yang: they draw 1 card; Yin: you deal them 1 Fire damage.

skill_kunpeng_rebirth.description_cn: 锁定技,你的体力上限始终为1。当你死亡时, 你将牌堆中的一张火属性伤害牌移出游戏,然 后复活并将体力值回复至1点。
skill_kunpeng_rebirth.description_en: Locked: Your max HP is always 1. When you die, remove 1 Fire-damage card from the deck from the game, then revive and recover your HP to 1.

skill_strategic_plan.description_cn: 每轮开始时,你可以选择一名角色并令其获得以下计策中的一策 （仅你可见）:1. 上策,其出牌阶段开始时,可以立即使用一张[杀】, 此[杀】无距离和次数限制且不计入次数;2.中策, 直到其回合结束, 其回合内首次使用[杀]指定目标时,你获得其一张牌; 3.下策,若该角色出牌阶段未使用【杀】 造成过伤害,其回合结束时,你可以将至多三张牌交给该角色 （若该角色为你改为摸三张牌）并令其回复1点体力。
skill_strategic_plan.description_en: At the start of each round, you may choose a character and secretly give them one Stratagem: 1. Upper — at the start of their Action Phase, they may immediately use 1 [Kill] with no distance or frequency restriction (not counting toward limits); 2. Middle — the first time they target someone with [Kill] this turn, you take 1 of their cards; 3. Lower — if they dealt no damage via [Kill] during their Action Phase, at the end of their turn you may give them up to 3 cards (or draw 3 if the target is yourself) and they recover 1 HP.

skill_survey_of_harm.description_cn: 锁定技,有计策的角色回合结束时,若此回合有计策：1. 成功发动,你摸 X 张牌并发动-次 〖论策〗 (X 为你本轮计策成功的次数且至多为 3); 2.未成功发动,你增加1 点体力上限 （体力上限至多加 3) 并回复1点体力
skill_survey_of_harm.description_en: Locked: At the end of the turn of a character with a Stratagem, if this turn the Stratagem was: 1. Successfully triggered — draw X cards and activate [Strategic Plan] once more (X = successful Stratagems this round, max 3); 2. Not triggered — increase your max HP by 1 (max +3) and recover 1 HP.

skill_twin_beauties.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以 亮出牌堆顶的两张牌，若其中：包含方块牌，本回合〖娉婷〗可选择的项数+1；包含红桃牌，本回合〖移筝〗可选择的项数+1；只有黑色牌，你获得这些牌。
skill_twin_beauties.description_en: During your Starting Phase, you may reveal the top 2 cards of the deck. If they include: a Diamonds — [Graceful Bearing]'s selectable options +1 this turn; a Hearts — [Zither Shift]'s selectable options +1 this turn; only black cards — you gain those cards.

skill_graceful_bearing.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以令你本阶段使用牌时获得至多2项效果：1.第一张牌无距离限制；2.第二张牌指定目标后，你获得之；3.第三张牌结算结束后，你摸两张牌；4.第四张牌额外结算一次。
skill_graceful_bearing.description_en: At the start of your Action Phase, you may grant up to 2 of the following effects to cards you use this phase: 1. First card — no distance restriction; 2. Second card — after targeting, you gain that card; 3. Third card — after resolution, draw 2 cards; 4. Fourth card — resolves one additional time.

skill_zither_shift.description_cn: 出牌阶段结束时，你可以选择至多1项：1.移动场上的一张武器牌；2.移动场上的一张坐骑牌；3.移动场上的一张防具牌。然后若你本回合移动的牌数为：1，你回复1点体力；2，直到你的下回合开始，当你失去一张牌后，你摸一张牌。
skill_zither_shift.description_en: At the end of your Action Phase, choose up to 1 option: 1. Move 1 weapon from the field; 2. Move 1 mount from the field; 3. Move 1 armor from the field. Then if you moved: 1 card total this turn — recover 1 HP; 2 cards total — until your next turn begins, whenever you lose a card, draw 1 card.

skill_hidden_ingenuity.description_cn: 每轮开始时，你可以获得游戏外或弃牌堆中的【折戟】、【女装】、【驽马】各至多一张；当你使用上述牌时，你可以将手牌摸至体力上限。
skill_hidden_ingenuity.description_en: At the start of each round, you may take up to one copy each of [Blunt Halberd], [Women's Garb], and [Slow Horse] from outside the game or the discard pile. Whenever you use any of those cards, you may draw up to your max HP in hand cards.

skill_divine_mechanism.description_cn: 每回合限一次，以你为唯一目标的黑色牌结算结束后，你可以将场上一张装备牌当未以此法使用过的延时锦囊牌使用（均使用过后重置）；此类锦囊牌在判定区内同时拥有被转化的装备牌的效果。
skill_divine_mechanism.description_en: Once per turn, after a black card that targeted only you finishes resolving, you may use one equipment card on the field as a Delayed Tool card that has not yet been used this way (reset after all options are used). While that Tool card is in a judgment zone, it also has the effect of the equipment card it was converted from.

skill_transmute.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将一种「藏巧」装备牌效果修改为下述对应顺序的牌直到你的下回合开始：【魂·诸葛连弩】；【魂·八卦阵】；【轨轨】。
skill_transmute.description_en: Once per Action Phase, you may change the effect of one [Hidden Ingenuity] equipment card to the corresponding card in the following sequence until the start of your next turn: [Soul · Zhuge Repeating Crossbow]; [Soul · Eight Trigrams Array]; [Rail Rail].

skill_battle_ready.description_cn: 锁定技,若你装备区里有:武器牌,你使用【杀】的次 数上限+1:防具牌,防止你受到的大于1点的伤害: 坐骑牌,你于摸牌阶段多摸一张牌:宝物牌,你跳过 判定阶段
skill_battle_ready.description_en: Locked: For each card type in your Equipment Zone: Weapon — your [Kill] frequency limit +1; Armor — prevent damage to you exceeding 1; Mount — draw 1 extra card during Draw Phase; Treasure — skip your Judgment Phase.

skill_masterwork_armor.description_cn: 锁定技,游戏开始时,将【红棉百花袍】或【玲珑狮蛮 带】中的一张与【束发紫金冠】、【无双方天】置入你 的装备区。
skill_masterwork_armor.description_en: Locked: At game start, place one of [Red Cotton Hundred-Flower Robe] or [Exquisite Lion-Mane Belt], along with [Crown of Purple Gold] and [Peerless Halberd], into your Equipment Zone.

skill_asura.description_cn: 回合开始时,你可以弃置一张牌,并弃置你判定区里 一张花色相同的牌,然后你可以重复此流程。
skill_asura.description_en: At the start of your turn, you may discard 1 card and discard a card of the same suit from your Judgment Zone. You may repeat this.

skill_divine_might.description_cn: 锁定技,摸牌阶段,你多摸X张牌;你的手牌上限+X (X为场上与你阵营不同的角色数)。
skill_divine_might.description_en: Locked: During your Draw Phase, draw X extra cards; your hand limit +X (X = number of characters with a different faction from you in play).

skill_divine_halberd.description_cn: 出牌阶段,你使用【杀】的次数+1;你使用【杀】可 以增加至多两个目标。
skill_divine_halberd.description_en: During your Action Phase, your [Kill] frequency +1; you may add up to 2 extra targets when using [Kill].

skill_divine_physique.description_cn: 每回合开始时,若你的手牌数不大于体力上限, 你摸两张牌;当你受到伤害后,你可以使用一张 【桃】。
skill_divine_physique.description_en: At the start of each turn, if your hand card count does not exceed your max HP, draw 2 cards. After you take damage, you may use a [Peach].

skill_ultimate_martial.description_cn: 出牌阶段各限一次,你可以弃置一张牌并获得 〖强袭〗 〖铁骑〗 〖完杀〗 〖旋风〗 中的一个技 能直到本回合结束
skill_ultimate_martial.description_en: Once per option per Action Phase: Discard 1 card to gain one of the following skills until end of turn: [Violent Assault], [Iron Cavalry], [Total Annihilation], or [Whirlwind].

skill_le_violent_assault.description_cn: 出牌阶段限两次，你可以受到1点伤害或弃置一张武器牌，对一名本回合内未以此法指定过的其他角色造成1点伤害。
skill_le_violent_assault.description_en: Twice per Action Phase: Lose 1 health or discard a weapon to deal 1 damage to a new target.

skill_le_iron_cavalry.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定目标后，你可以令其本回合非锁定技失效，然后你判定，除非其弃置一张与判定结果花色相同的牌，否则其不能抵消此【杀】。
skill_le_iron_cavalry.description_en: When using [Kill], you can disable the target's non-locked skills for the turn. Perform a judgment; they cannot dodge unless they discard a card of the same suit as the judgment.

skill_le_total_annihilation_b.description_cn: 锁定技，在你的回合内：只有你和处于濒死状态的角色才能使用【桃】；任意角色的濒死结算中，除你和濒死角色外的其他角色的非锁定技失效。
skill_le_total_annihilation_b.description_en: Locked: During your turn, only you and characters in the Verge of Death State may use [Peach]. During any Verge of Death Resolution this turn, all non-Locked skills of characters other than you and the dying character are Nullified.

skill_le_desperation.description_cn: 锁定技,你始终跳过摸牌阶段。当你的手牌发生变化时,你立即调整为四张
skill_le_desperation.description_en: Locked: You always skip your Draw Phase. Whenever your hand card count changes, immediately adjust to exactly 4 cards.

skill_le_dragon_soul.description_cn: 你的牌可以按以下规则使用或打出：红桃当【桃】；方块当火【杀】，梅花当【闪】，黑桃当【无懈可击】。
skill_le_dragon_soul.description_en: Your cards may be used or played as follows: Hearts as [Peach]; Diamonds as [Fire Kill]; Clubs as [Dodge]; Spades as [Nullification].

skill_slay_the_general.description_cn: 准备阶段，若其他角色装备区里有【青红剑】 你可以获得之。
skill_slay_the_general.description_en: During your Starting Phase, if [Qing Gang Sword] is in another character's Equipment Zone, you may take it.

skill_le_unstoppable.description_cn: 锁定技,你于回合内使用的第一张【杀】或 【决斗】获得〖无双〗效果且无视目标角色的 防具
skill_le_unstoppable.description_en: Locked: The first [Kill] or [Duel] you use each turn gains the Peerless effect and ignores the target's equipped armor.

skill_le_divine_fury.description_cn: 限定技，牌阶段，你可以失去3点体力然后对所有其他角色各造成1点伤害，这些角色先各弃置其装备区里的所有牌，再各弃置四张手牌。
skill_le_divine_fury.description_en: Limited: During your Action Phase, you may lose 3 HP. Deal 1 damage to all other characters. They each discard all cards from their Equipment Zone, then each discard 4 hand cards.

skill_wide_reading_v1.description_cn: 摸牌阶段,你可以改为亮出牌堆顶的五张牌获得其中每种花色的牌各一张。每轮限一次,回合结束时, 你回合使用过的花色数大于等于体力值,你获得一个额外的摸牌或出牌阶段。
skill_wide_reading_v1.description_en: During your Draw Phase, you may instead reveal the top 5 cards of the deck and take one card of each suit. Once per round, at the end of your turn, if the number of different suits among cards you used this turn is at least equal to your HP Value, you gain an extra Draw Phase or Action Phase.

skill_mental_attack_v1.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次,你可以观看一名其他角色的手牌,然后你可以展示其中一张牌并置于牌堆顶或弃置之。若其手牌中的花色数因此减少你可以令其本回合不能使用或打出一种颜色的牌。
skill_mental_attack_v1.description_en: Once per Action Phase: View another character's hand cards, then you may reveal 1 card and place it on top of the deck or discard it. If the number of different suits in their hand decreases as a result, you may prevent them from using or playing cards of one color for the rest of this turn.

skill_encourage_study.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以令至多两名其他角色各获得「学」，其于回合开始时弃其「学」并选择一项：1.本回合出牌阶段不能对除其以外的角色使用牌；2.失去1点体力。
skill_encourage_study.description_en: At the start of your Action Phase, you may give a Study token to up to 2 other characters. At the start of their turn, they discard their Study token and choose: 1. Cannot use cards targeting other characters during their Action Phase this turn; 2. Lose 1 HP.

skill_tiger_hunt.description_cn: 锁定技，当你对有「学」的角色使用【杀】时，你弃置其一张手牌。
skill_tiger_hunt.description_en: Locked: When you use [Kill] against a character with a Study token, discard 1 of their hand cards.

skill_tripod_balance.description_cn: 每轮限一次，当其他角色弃其「学」时，若其体力值：不小于你，你可以回复1点体力；小于你，你可以摸等同于你与其体力值差张牌（至多摸两张）。
skill_tripod_balance.description_en: Once per round: When another character discards their Study token, if their HP Value is at least equal to yours, you may recover 1 HP. If their HP Value is less than yours, draw cards equal to the difference (max 2).

skill_reserve_source.description_cn: 当一名角色受到伤害后，你可以令其摸一张牌，然后其将一张手牌置于你的武将牌上，称为「储」。你的手牌上限+X（X为「储」数）。
skill_reserve_source.description_en: When a character takes damage, you may have them draw 1 card, then they place 1 hand card face-down on your general card as a Reserve. Your hand limit +X (X = number of Reserve cards).

skill_ascend_the_throne.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若你的「储」数不小于3，你减1点体力上限，获得所有「储」，获得〖奸雄〗和〖天行〗。
skill_ascend_the_throne.description_en: Awakening: During your Starting Phase, if you have at least 3 Reserve cards, reduce your max HP by 1, gain all Reserve cards, and gain [Treacherous Hero] and [Imperial March].

skill_imperial_march.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若你的「储」数不小于3，你减1点体力上限，获得所有「储」，失去〖储元〗，并获得下列技能中的一项：〖仁德〗、〖制衡〗、〖乱击〗、〖放权〗。
skill_imperial_march.description_en: Awakening: During your Starting Phase, if you have at least 3 Reserve cards, reduce your max HP by 1, gain all Reserve cards, lose [Reserve Source], and gain one of: [Benevolence], [Balance of Power], [Volley], or [Abdicate].

skill_le_benevolence.description_cn: 出牌阶段，每名角色限一次，你可以交给一名其他角色任意张手牌。当你本阶段以此法给出第二张牌时，你可以视为使用一张基本牌（使用【杀】有次数限制）。
skill_le_benevolence.description_en: During your Action Phase, once per character: you may give another character any number of hand cards. When you give out your second card this phase via this method, you may treat it as using a Basic card (using [Kill] still counts toward the frequency limit).

skill_le_volley.description_cn: 你可以将两张花色相同的手牌当【万箭齐发】使用。你使用【万箭齐发】可以少选一个目标。
skill_le_volley.description_en: Play 2 cards of the same suit as [Raining Arrows]. You can choose 1 fewer target.

skill_le_abdicate.description_cn: 你可以跳过出牌阶段，然后弃牌阶段开始时，你可以弃置一张手牌并令一名其他角色执行一个额外的回合。
skill_le_abdicate.description_en: You may skip Action Phase; at Discard Phase, discard 1 card to grant another character an extra turn.

skill_cry_of_the_fallen_v1.description_cn: 锁定技，你攻击范围内已受伤的角色手牌上限-1；当你和这些角色拼点或【决斗】你赢时，你恢复一个装备栏。当你受到伤害后，若来源在你的攻击范围内且已受伤，你恢复一个装备栏。
skill_cry_of_the_fallen_v1.description_en: Locked: Injured characters within your attack range have their hand limit -1. When you win a showdown against or defeat an injured character in your attack range in a [Duel], restore 1 equipment slot. After you take damage from an injured character within your attack range, restore 1 equipment slot.

skill_usurp_the_edge_v1.description_cn: 当你于出牌阶段对其他角色造成伤害后,若其技能未因本技能而失效,你可以令其一个技能于下回合结束前失效,若如此做,你结束出牌阶段。
skill_usurp_the_edge_v1.description_en: After you deal damage to a character during your Action Phase, if their skills have not already been disabled by this skill, you may disable one of their skills until the end of their next turn. If you do, end your Action Phase.

skill_cry_of_the_fallen_v2.description_cn: 锁定技, 攻击范围内已受伤角色的手牌上限-1。若已受伤角色数不小于：1.你的手牌上限+1; 3.你摸牌阶段摸牌数+1;5.结束阶段,你废除一名其他角色随机一个装备栏。
skill_cry_of_the_fallen_v2.description_en: Locked: Injured characters within your attack range have their hand limit -1. If the number of injured characters in your attack range is at least: 1 — your hand limit +1; 3 — your Draw Phase draw count +1; 5 — during your End Phase, destroy one random equipment slot of another character.

skill_tranquil_domain.description_cn: 锁定技，每个技能每轮限一次，当一名角色发动除〖静域〗外的技能时，你摸一张牌。
skill_tranquil_domain.description_en: Locked: Once per round per skill — whenever a character activates any skill other than [Tranquil Domain], you draw 1 card.

skill_filtered_hearts.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以交给一名其他角色一张手牌并选择一项：1.令其摸X张牌；2.令其随机弃置X张手牌（X为游戏轮数且至多为5）。然后若其以此法摸到/弃置了与你交给其的牌牌名相同的牌，其下次发动技能时回复/失去1点体力。
skill_filtered_hearts.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Give another character 1 hand card and choose one — 1. They draw X cards; 2. They randomly discard X hand cards (X = the current round number, up to 5). If they draw or discard a card with the same name as the card you gave them this way, the next time they activate a skill they recover or lose 1 HP respectively.

skill_universal_way.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可以选择一名其他角色，令其复原武将牌，然后其可以获得其同名武将的随机一个不同名技能并选择失去一个其他技能。
skill_universal_way.description_en: Limited: During your Action Phase, choose another character — reset their General Card, then they may gain one randomly chosen skill from a different version of the same general that they do not already have, and choose to lose one of their other skills.

skill_mg_peerless.description_cn: 锁定技，你使用的【杀】需两张【闪】才能抵消；与你进行【决斗】的角色每次需要打出两张【杀】。若对方没有使用或打出【杀】或【闪】，则此【杀】或【决斗】对其造成的伤害+1。
skill_mg_peerless.description_en: Locked: Cancelling your [Kill] requires 2 [Dodge]; each [Kill] played against you in a [Duel] also requires 2. If the target uses no [Kill] or [Dodge] in response, the damage dealt by that [Kill] or [Duel] is increased by 1.

skill_mg_ruthless_dominance.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】对一名其他角色造成伤害后，你可获得其区域里至多等同于伤害数张牌，然后其摸等量张牌。然后双方展示获得的牌，若你与其因此获得了全部类别的牌，其选择一项：1.你视为对由其指定的另一名其他角色使用一张【决斗】；2.其获得〖无双〗直至其下回合结束。
skill_mg_ruthless_dominance.description_en: After your [Kill] deals damage to another character, you may take up to X cards from their zones (X = damage dealt), then they draw the same number. Both players then reveal the cards gained. If between the two of you all card categories are represented, that character chooses one: 1. You are treated as using [Duel] against another character they designate; 2. They gain 〖Peerless〗 until the end of their next turn.

skill_mg_humility.description_cn: 当一张锦囊牌对你生效时，若你武将牌上没有同名牌且你不是使用者，则你将之置于武将牌上，然后可将至多X张牌移出游戏直到本回合结束（X为你武将牌上的牌数且至多为5）；出牌阶段开始时，你可以使用一张武将牌上的牌。
skill_mg_humility.description_en: When a Tool card takes effect on you, if your character card has no card of the same name and you are not the User, place it on your character card. You may then Remove from the Game up to X cards until the end of this turn (X = number of cards on your character card, max 5). At the start of your Action Phase, you may Use 1 card from your character card.

skill_mg_linked_camps.description_cn: 其他角色的回合结束时，你可观看牌堆顶的X张牌，然后将这些牌交给任意角色（X为你本回合失去的牌数，且至多为5）。
skill_mg_linked_camps.description_en: At the end of another character's turn, you may look at the top X cards of the deck, then distribute them among any characters (X = number of cards you lost this turn, max 5).

skill_mg_self_harm.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以展示一张牌并将此牌交给一名其他角色，然后你失去1点体力（若此牌为【桃】或【酒】，改为失去2点体力）；当你失去1点体力后，你获得2点护甲。
skill_mg_self_harm.description_en: At the start of your Action Phase, you may reveal 1 hand card and give it to another character, then lose 1 HP (if the card is [Peach] or [Wine], lose 2 HP instead). Whenever you lose 1 HP, gain 2 Armor.

skill_mg_feigned_surrender.description_cn: 锁定技，摸牌阶段，你多摸X张牌；每回合你使用的前X张牌无距离次数限制且不能被响应（X为你已损失的体力值）。
skill_mg_feigned_surrender.description_en: Locked: During your Draw Phase, draw X additional cards. Each turn, the first X cards you use have no distance or count restrictions and cannot be responded to (X = your HP Lost).

skill_mg_mounted_archery.description_cn: 你的攻击范围+4。出牌阶段开始时，你可弃一张牌，若如此做，则此阶段你使用的牌其他角色只能使用或打出虚拟牌或与你弃置牌颜色相同的手牌响应。
skill_mg_mounted_archery.description_en: Your Attack Range is increased by 4. At the start of your Action Phase, you may discard 1 card; if you do, other characters may only Use or Play virtual cards or hand cards matching the color of the discarded card to respond to your cards this phase.

skill_mg_dispel_vexation.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可指定一名角色，令其选择一项：1.攻击范围内含有其的角色依次弃一张牌；2.其摸此时攻击范围内有其的角色数的牌；背水：此技能失效直至你杀死一名角色。
skill_mg_dispel_vexation.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose a character. They must choose one: 1. Each character who has them within their Attack Range discards 1 card one at a time; 2. They draw cards equal to the number of characters who have them within Attack Range. Back Against the Wall: This skill is disabled until you kill a character.

skill_le_heroic_mettle.description_cn: 你可以将牌面信息中有「【杀】」的牌当【决斗】使用，当此【决斗】指定目标后，若：你有「擎」，你可以弃任意枚「擎」，然后令目标角色弃置等量的牌；目标角色有「擎」，此牌伤害+1。
skill_le_heroic_mettle.description_en: You may use a card that references [Kill] in its text as [Duel]. After this [Duel]'s target is designated: if you have Pillar tokens, you may discard any number to force the target to discard an equal number of cards; if the target has Pillar tokens, this card deals +1 damage.

skill_trial_drug.description_cn: 每名角色出牌阶段限一次，其可以摸一张牌并令你获得一张【毒】，然后进行判定，若结果为：黑色，你减1点体力上限，其获得一张【毒】；红色，其可以将一张红色牌当【桃】使用。
skill_trial_drug.description_en: Once per character per Action Phase: a character may draw 1 card and give you 1 [Poison], then perform a Judgment. If Black: you reduce your Max HP by 1 and they gain 1 [Poison]. If Red: they may Use a red card as [Peach].

skill_aid_and_unravel.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当其他角色于回合外回复/失去体力后，你可以加1点体力上限/对其发动一次〖毒医〗。
skill_aid_and_unravel.description_en: Once per turn: After another character recovers HP outside their turn, you may increase your Max HP by 1. After another character loses HP outside their turn, you may activate 〖Poison Arts〗 against them once.

skill_poison_arts.description_cn: 每回合每种牌名限一次，你可以将一张【毒】当【杀】、【刮骨疗毒】或【以毒攻毒】使用。
skill_poison_arts.description_en: Once per card name per turn: You may Use 1 [Poison] as [Kill], [Bone Scrape], or [Antidote].

skill_refuse_treatment.description_cn: 锁定技，【毒】对你无效；当其他角色成为你使用的转化牌的目标后，其选择是否减1点体力上限并令此牌对其无效。
skill_refuse_treatment.description_en: Locked: [Poison] has no effect on you. When another character becomes the target of a converted card you Use, they may choose whether to reduce their Max HP by 1 to Nullify that card against themselves.

skill_scheme_and_rout.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定目标后，你可以选择一项：1.摸一张牌；2.弃置其一张牌。然后若此【杀】被【闪】抵消，其弃置你一张牌。
skill_scheme_and_rout.description_en: After your [Kill] designates a target, you may choose one: 1. Draw 1 card; 2. Discard 1 of their cards. Then if that [Kill] is cancelled by [Dodge], they discard 1 of your cards.

skill_mandate_of_heaven.description_cn: 当你成为【杀】的目标后，你可以：弃置两张牌（不足则全弃），摸两张牌。若全场体力值唯一最大的角色不为你，其可以如此做。
skill_mandate_of_heaven.description_en: When you become the target of [Kill], you may discard up to 2 cards (discard all if fewer) and draw 2 cards. If another character has the sole highest HP Value on the field, they may do the same.

skill_secret_edict.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以交给一名其他角色所有手牌，然后令其与另一名其他角色拼点：拼点赢的角色视为对没赢的角色使用一张【杀】。
skill_secret_edict.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Give all your hand cards to another character, then have them initiate a Point Duel with a third character. The winner is treated as using [Kill] against the loser.

skill_fated_end.description_cn: 当你对体力值大于等于你的其他角色造成伤害时，你可以弃置一张黑色手牌，令此伤害+1。当你受到体力值大于等于你的其他角色造成的伤害时，你可以弃置一张红色手牌，令此伤害-1。
skill_fated_end.description_en: When you deal damage to another character whose HP Value is greater than or equal to yours, you may discard one black hand card to increase that damage by 1. When you receive damage from another character whose HP Value is greater than or equal to yours, you may discard one red hand card to reduce that damage by 1.

skill_burning_resolve.description_cn: 锁定技，当一名其他角色于本局游戏内首次受到伤害后，你选择一项：1. 发动〖竭缘〗减少伤害无体力值限制；2. 发动〖竭缘〗增加伤害无体力值限制；3. 发动〖竭缘〗弃牌无颜色限制且可以弃置装备区里的牌。
skill_burning_resolve.description_en: Locked: After another character takes damage for the first time this game, choose one: 1. When activating 〖Fated End〗 to reduce damage, the HP Value restriction does not apply; 2. When activating 〖Fated End〗 to increase damage, the HP Value restriction does not apply; 3. When activating 〖Fated End〗, the discarded card has no color restriction and cards from your Equipment Zone may be discarded.

skill_good_aid.description_cn: 当一名角色于其出牌阶段内回复体力后，你可以选择一项：1. 摸一张牌；2. 令其摸两张牌。
skill_good_aid.description_en: When a character recovers HP during their Action Phase, you may choose one: 1. Draw 1 card; 2. Have them draw 2 cards.

skill_return_home.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若有至少一名因你发动过“良助”而令其摸牌的角色已受伤，则你加1点体力上限，然后回复1点体力，失去“良助”并获得“枭姬”。
skill_return_home.description_en: Awakening: Starting Phase, if at least one character who drew cards via 〖Good Aid〗 is currently Wounded, increase your Max HP by 1, recover 1 HP, lose 〖Good Aid〗, then gain 〖Fierce Lady〗.

skill_poignant_plea.description_cn: 每轮限一次，一名角色进入濒死状态时，你可以令另一名其他角色摸四张牌，然后弃置四张牌，若其以此法弃置的四张牌花色各不相同，则其视为对处于濒死状态的角色使用一张【桃】
skill_poignant_plea.description_en: Once per round: When a character enters the Verge of Death State, you may have another character draw 4 cards then discard 4. If the 4 discarded cards are all different suits, that character is treated as using [Peach] on the dying character.

skill_silent_memory.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以将一张手牌当你出牌阶段内使用过的第一张基本牌或普通锦囊牌使用，然后你可以将一张手牌当你出牌阶段使用过的第二张基本牌或普通锦囊牌使用。
skill_silent_memory.description_en: End Phase: You may Use 1 hand card as the first Basic or Non Time-Delay Tool card you Used this Action Phase. Then you may Use another hand card as the second.

skill_blood_sacrifice.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置一张红色牌，然后选择至多X名角色，横置这些角色并对其中一名角色造成1点火焰伤害（X为你已损失的体力值且至少为1）。
skill_blood_sacrifice.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 1 red card, choose up to X characters and place them into the Chain State, then deal 1 Fire damage to 1 of them (X = your HP Lost, minimum 1).

skill_tigers_roar.description_cn: 锁定技，当你造成火焰伤害后，受到此伤害的角色各摸一张牌，本回合你对这些角色使用牌没有次数限制。
skill_tigers_roar.description_en: Locked: After you deal Fire damage, each character who took that damage draws 1 card. This turn you have no count restriction when using cards targeting those characters.

skill_inherit_the_blade.description_cn: 觉醒技，结束阶段，若你于此回合内造成过3点或更多伤害，你增加1点体力上限并回复1点体力，失去“虎啸”，然后从场上、牌堆或弃牌堆中获得【青龙偃月刀】。
skill_inherit_the_blade.description_en: Awakening: End Phase, if you dealt ≥ 3 damage this turn, increase your Max HP by 1 and recover 1 HP, lose 〖Tiger's Roar〗, then take [Blue Dragon Crescent Blade] from the field, deck, or Discard Pile.

skill_arrogant_talent.description_cn: 当你于回合外需要使用或打出基本牌时，若你有/没有手牌，你可以观看牌堆顶两/四张牌，然后可以使用或打出其中的基本牌。
skill_arrogant_talent.description_en: When you need to Use or Play a Basic card outside your turn: if you have hand cards, look at the top 2 deck cards; if you have no hand cards, look at the top 4. You may then Use or Play any Basic card among them.

skill_militarism.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以弃置X张牌对你攻击范围内一名其他角色造成1点伤害（X为其体力值）。若其因此进入濒死状态且于濒死结算后存活，你失去1点体力且本回合本技能失效。
skill_militarism.description_en: During your Action Phase: Discard X cards to deal 1 damage to a character within your Attack Range (X = their HP Value). If they enter the Verge of Death State and survive, you lose 1 HP and this skill is Nullified for the rest of this turn.

skill_valiant_drive.description_cn: 其他角色的结束阶段，你可以弃置一张基本牌，令其选择一项：1.弃置一张装备牌，你摸一张牌；2.你对其造成1点伤害。
skill_valiant_drive.description_en: During another character's End Phase, you may discard 1 Basic card and have them choose one: 1. Discard 1 Equipment card; you draw 1 card; 2. Take 1 damage from you.

skill_resolute_sacrifice.description_cn: 与你距离不大于1的角色成为【杀】的目标后，你可以摸一张牌，然后若该角色不为你，你展示一张牌并交给该角色，若此牌为装备牌，其可以使用之。
skill_resolute_sacrifice.description_en: When a character within distance 1 of you becomes the target of [Kill], you may draw 1 card. If that character is not you, reveal 1 hand card and give it to them; if the card is an Equipment card, they may Use it.

skill_delayed_release.description_cn: 当一名角色的判定牌生效前，你可以令其观看你的手牌，并选择你装备区或手牌区的一张牌，然后你打出此牌代替判定牌
skill_delayed_release.description_en: When a Judgment Card is about to take effect, you may let the judging character look at your hand cards and choose 1 of your Equipment Zone or hand cards; you then Play that card to replace the Judgment Card.

skill_broad_support.description_cn: 每阶段限一次当你一次获得至少两张牌后，你可以交给至两名其他角色各一张牌
skill_broad_support.description_en: Once per phase: After you gain at least 2 cards at once, you may give up to 2 other characters 1 card each.

skill_sagely_wisdom.description_cn: 锁定技，当你于出牌阶段外失去红色牌后，你展示之并摸一张牌。
skill_sagely_wisdom.description_en: Locked: When you lose a red card outside your turn via discarding, reveal it and draw 1 card.

skill_close_quarters.description_cn: 你使用【杀】可以多指定一名距离为1的角色为目标。你对距离为1的角色使用【杀】需两张【闪】才能抵消。
skill_close_quarters.description_en: Your [Kill] may designate one additional character at distance 1 as a target. Cancelling your [Kill] against characters at distance 1 requires 2 [Dodge].

skill_swift_advance.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择一名其他角色，然后你本回合计算与其的距离视为1，若如此做，若你直到结束阶段未对其造成过伤害，结束阶段，你弃置一张牌。
skill_swift_advance.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose another character — your distance to them is treated as 1 for this turn. If you have not dealt damage to them by the end of your End Phase, discard 1 card.

skill_poison_wine.description_cn: 其他角色出牌阶段开始时，你可以弃置一张手牌，视为该角色使用一张【酒】，然后你对其造成1点伤害。
skill_poison_wine.description_en: At the start of another character's Action Phase, you may discard 1 hand card — that character is treated as having used [Wine], then you deal 1 damage to them.

skill_tragic_chaos.description_cn: 一名角色的回合结束时，你每于此回合内杀死过一名其他角色，你便摸三张牌。
skill_tragic_chaos.description_en: At the end of a character's turn, for each other character you killed this turn, draw 3 cards.

skill_alluring_step.description_cn: 攻击范围内包含你的角色出牌阶段开始时，你可以弃置一张牌，该角色此阶段获得“止息”，若你弃置的牌不为【杀】或黑色锦囊牌，本回合其与你的距离视为1。
skill_alluring_step.description_en: At the start of another character's Action Phase, if you are within their Attack Range, you may discard 1 card — they gain 〖Pause〗 this phase. If the discarded card is not [Kill] or a Black Tool card, their distance to you is treated as 1 this turn.

skill_tranquil_grace.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以获得场上的一张防具牌，若如此做，此阶段你不能使用或打出【杀】，或弃置场上的一张装备牌。
skill_tranquil_grace.description_en: At the start of your Action Phase, choose one: 1. Take an Armor card from the field — you cannot Use or Play [Kill] this phase; 2. Discard 1 Equipment card from the field.

skill_pause.description_cn: 锁定技，出牌阶段，你至多使用X张牌，X为你的体力值。你使用锦囊牌后，结束出牌阶段
skill_pause.description_en: Locked: During your Action Phase, you may Use at most X cards (X = your HP Value). After you Use a Tool card, end your Action Phase.

skill_erode.description_cn: 摸牌阶段，你可以多摸X张牌，若如此做，当你于本回合使用【杀】或普通锦囊牌时，你弃置一张牌(X为场上受伤的角色数)。
skill_erode.description_en: Draw Phase: You may draw X additional cards (X = number of Wounded characters on the field). If you do, whenever you Use [Kill] or a Non Time-Delay Tool card this turn, you must discard 1 card.

skill_sea_of_hatred.description_cn: 锁定技，当你受到【杀】造成的伤害时，若你没有手牌，此伤害+1。
skill_sea_of_hatred.description_en: Locked: When you take damage from [Kill] and have no hand cards, that damage is increased by 1.

skill_submit_to_fate.description_cn: 主公技，锁定技，其他吴势力角色于你回合内视为已受伤。
skill_submit_to_fate.description_en: Lord Skill — Locked: Other Wu faction characters are treated as Wounded during your turn.

skill_splendid_grace.description_cn: 出牌阶段内限一次，当你使用基本牌或普通锦囊牌时，你可以弃置一张同类别手牌，然后令此牌的效果结算两次。
skill_splendid_grace.description_en: Once per Action Phase: When you Use a Basic or Non Time-Delay Tool card, you may discard 1 hand card of the same type — that card's effect resolves twice.

skill_auspicious_divination.description_cn: 摸牌阶段开始时，你可以改为展示牌堆顶的一张牌，猜测牌堆顶的下一张牌点数大于或小于此牌，然后展示之，若猜对你可以继续猜测，最后你获得以此法展示的牌。
skill_auspicious_divination.description_en: At the start of your Draw Phase, you may instead reveal the top card of the deck and guess whether the next card is higher or lower in rank, then reveal it. If correct, you may repeat. Gain all cards revealed this way.

skill_ode_in_passing.description_cn: 当你死亡时，你可以令一名体力上限大于你的角色选择获得〖丰姿〗或〖吉占〗。
skill_ode_in_passing.description_en: When you die, you may have a character whose Max HP is greater than yours choose to gain either 〖Splendid Grace〗 or 〖Auspicious Divination〗.

skill_phoenix_soul.description_cn: 当你在回合内首次使用【杀】或【决斗】指定一个目标后，你可以选择一项：1.摸X张牌；2.令此牌伤害+X。（X为目标角色方片手牌数）
skill_phoenix_soul.description_en: The first time each turn you Use [Kill] or [Duel] and designate a target, choose one: 1. Draw X cards; 2. Increase that card's damage by X (X = the Diamonds hand cards in the target's hand).

skill_warrior_woman.description_cn: 你可以将一张非基本牌当无距离限制且不可响应的【杀】使用并获得一名目标角色的一张牌。若获得的牌不为基本牌，你可以失去点体力然后令所有角色的“镇南”视为未发动过。
skill_warrior_woman.description_en: You may Use 1 non-Basic card as [Kill] with no distance restriction that cannot be responded to, then gain 1 card from a target. If the gained card is not Basic, you may lose 1 HP to reset all 〖Pacify the South〗 activations for all characters.

skill_pacify_the_south.description_cn: 限定技，准备阶段，你可以弃置两张牌，视为使用一张由你指定任意目标的【南蛮入侵】。然后若你对指定目标:造成了伤害，其随机弃置一张牌:未造成伤害，你本回合对其使用牌无次数限制。
skill_pacify_the_south.description_en: Limited: Starting Phase: Discard 2 cards and be treated as using [Barbarians] on any characters you choose. For each who takes damage, they randomly discard 1 card. For each who takes no damage, you have no count restriction against them this turn.

skill_pledge_herself.description_cn: 限定技，当你进入濒死状态时，你可以令一名其他角色选择一项:1.其失去所有技能获得“征南”；2.其获得“镇南”。
skill_pledge_herself.description_en: Limited: When you enter the Verge of Death State, have another character choose one: 1. They lose all General Card skills and gain 〖Conquer the South〗; 2. They gain 〖Pacify the South〗. You then recover your HP to 1.

skill_overawe.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当你使用伤害类牌指定目标后，你可以猜测其中一个目标的手牌是否有基本牌、锦囊牌或装备牌。然后其展示手牌，若至少猜对:一项，此牌对其伤害+1；两项，你摸两张牌；三项，你获得“好雄”和“行殇”直到你下回合开始。
skill_overawe.description_en: Once per turn: After you Use a damage-dealing card and designate a target, guess whether a target's hand contains Basic cards, Tool cards, or Equipment cards — they reveal their hand. If ≥1 correct: +1 damage; ≥2 correct: draw 2 cards; all 3 correct: gain 〖Treacherous Hero〗 and 〖Reap the Fallen〗 until the start of your next turn.

skill_covert_watch.description_cn: 锁定技，准备阶段和结束阶段，你观看一名手牌数最少的其他角色的所有手牌。
skill_covert_watch.description_en: Locked: During your Starting Phase and End Phase, look at all hand cards of 1 character with the fewest hand cards.

skill_county_troops.description_cn: 每名角色的结束阶段，若其手牌数不大于1，其可以摸一张牌并交给你所有手牌，然后你交给其等量张牌。
skill_county_troops.description_en: During each character's End Phase, if their hand count is ≤ 1, they may draw 1 card then give you all their hand cards, after which you give them the same number of cards back.

skill_remove_affliction.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置X张牌令至多X名角色各回复1点体力（X为你已损失体力值），若弃置牌中有黑色牌，你失去1点体力。
skill_remove_affliction.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard X hand cards, then have up to X characters each recover 1 HP (X = your HP Lost). If any discarded card is Black, you lose 1 HP.

skill_mechanical_ingenuity.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以弃置任意张装备牌，然后你亮出牌堆頂两倍数量的牌，获得其中的锦囊牌。
skill_mechanical_ingenuity.description_en: At the start of your Action Phase, you may discard any number of Equipment cards, then reveal double that number of cards from the top of the deck and gain all Tool cards among them.

skill_exquisite_design.description_cn: 鎖定技，若你的装备区里没有防具牌，你视为装备著【八卦阵】；若你的装备区里没有坐骑牌，你的手牌上限+1；若你的装备区里没有宝物牌，你视为拥有“奇才”。
skill_exquisite_design.description_en: Locked: If you have no Armor equipped, you are treated as having [Eight Trigrams] equipped. If you have no Mount equipped, your Hand Limit is increased by 1. If you have no Treasure equipped, you are treated as having 〖Extraordinary Talent〗.

skill_fragrant_soul.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】造成伤害后，你获得1枚“梅影”；你可以弃1枚“梅影”以发动〖龙胆〗并摸一张牌。
skill_fragrant_soul.description_en: After your [Kill] deals damage, gain 1 「Plum Shadow」 token. You may spend 1 「Plum Shadow」 token to activate 〖Dragon's Courage〗 and draw 1 card.

skill_restore_han.description_cn: 限定技，准备阶段，若你拥有过“梅影”，你可以：弃所有“梅影”，从五张未登场的蜀势力武将牌中选择一张替换你的武将牌，并将体力上限调整为本局游戏中弃“梅影”的数量（至多为游戏人数），然后若你是体力值最低的角色，你回复1点体力。
skill_restore_han.description_en: Limited: Starting Phase, if you have ever had 「Plum Shadow」 tokens, discard all of them, choose 1 unchosen Shu general from 5 options to replace your General Card, and set your Max HP to the total tokens spent this game (max = number of players). If you then have the lowest HP Value, recover 1 HP.

skill_upright_service.description_cn: 出牌阶段结束时，你可以令手牌数不等于体力值的一名角色弃置一张手牌或摸一张牌。然后若其手牌数等于体力值，你摸一张牌，且可以交给该角色一张牌。
skill_upright_service.description_en: At the end of your Action Phase, you may have a character whose hand count does not equal their HP Value discard 1 or draw 1. If their hand count now equals their HP Value, you draw 1 card and may give them 1 card.

skill_decline_the_feast.description_cn: 当你成为一张普通锦囊牌的目标时，你可以为此牌增加一个目标或减少一个目标（目标数至少为一）
skill_decline_the_feast.description_en: When you become the target of a Non Time-Delay Tool card, you may add 1 target or remove 1 target from that card (minimum 1 target must remain).

skill_pray_and_pacify.description_cn: 当你使用装备牌时，你可以获得牌堆中一张锦囊牌，若此牌为：普通锦囊牌，你使用此牌指定唯一目标时可以多指定一个目标；延时锦囊牌，你下回合【羽化】观看的牌数+1（至多为5）。
skill_pray_and_pacify.description_en: When you Use an Equipment card, take 1 Tool card from the deck. If it is a Non Time-Delay Tool: your next Use of that card may designate 1 additional target. If a Time-Delayed Tool: 〖Transcend〗 views 1 extra card next turn (max 5).

skill_transcend.description_cn: 锁定技，弃牌阶段，你的锦囊牌和装备牌不计入手牌上限。准备阶段和结束阶段，你观看牌堆顶的一张牌并将其置于牌堆顶或牌堆底。
skill_transcend.description_en: Locked: During your Discard Phase, Tool and Equipment cards do not count toward your Hand Limit. During your Starting Phase and End Phase, look at the top 1 card of the deck and place it on the top or bottom.

skill_sp_heavens_envy.description_cn: 当你的判定牌生效后，你可以获得之。
skill_sp_heavens_envy.description_en: When your Judgment Card takes effect, you may keep it.

skill_devoted_counsel.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，你选择一名其他角色。该角色受到伤害后，你受到等量的无来源伤害；该角色回复体力后，你回复等量的体力。
skill_devoted_counsel.description_en: Locked: At the start of the game, choose another character. After they take damage, you take the same amount of damage with no source. After they recover HP, you recover the same amount.

skill_strategic_planning.description_cn: 当你受到1点伤害后，你可以进行判定，若结果为:红色，你一名角色摸一张牌，若其为“先辅”角色，改为摸两张；黑色，你弃置一名角色区域里的一张牌。
skill_strategic_planning.description_en: After you take 1 damage, you may perform a Judgment. If Red: have a character draw 1 card (if they are your 〖Devoted Counsel〗 target, draw 2 instead). If Black: discard 1 card from a character's zones.

skill_modest_elegance.description_cn: 当你成为锦囊牌的目标后，你可以将任意张手牌交给一名其他角色。
skill_modest_elegance.description_en: When you become the target of a Tool card, you may give any number of your hand cards to another character.

skill_sp_forge_alliance.description_cn: 出牌阶段结束时，你可以与一名角色拼点，若你赢，视为你使用【无中生有】；若你沒赢，视为其对你使用【过河拆桥】。
skill_sp_forge_alliance.description_en: At the end of your Action Phase, you may initiate a Point Duel with a character. If you win: be treated as using [Resupply]. If you lose: they are treated as using [Dismantle] on you.

skill_deploy_the_puppet.description_cn: 回合开始时，你可以令一名没有“傀”的其他角色获得“傀”。每轮开始时，你令体力值最小且没有“傀”的一名其他角色获得“傀”。
skill_deploy_the_puppet.description_en: At the start of your turn, you may give 1 「Puppet」 token to another character without one. At the start of each round, give 1 「Puppet」 token to the character with the lowest HP Value without one.

skill_bone_rot.description_cn: 锁定技，当有“傀”的角色受到伤害后，你摸一张牌。
skill_bone_rot.description_en: Locked: When a character with a 「Puppet」 token takes damage, draw 1 card.

skill_bow_and_deceive.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若你因〖骨疽〗而获得的牌数不小于7，你加1点体力上限，回复1点体力，然后令所有没有“傀”的其他角色获得“傀”，最后失去〖骨疽〗并获得〖蚕食〗。
skill_bow_and_deceive.description_en: Awakening: Starting Phase, if you have drawn ≥ 7 cards via 〖Bone Rot〗, increase your Max HP by 1, recover 1 HP, give 「Puppet」 tokens to all other characters without one, lose 〖Bone Rot〗, then gain 〖Consume〗.

skill_consume.description_cn: 当一名角色使用基本牌或普通锦囊牌指定你为唯一目标时，若其有“傀”，你可以取消之，然后其弃其“傀”；当你使用基本牌或普通锦囊牌仅指定一名角色为目标时，你可以多指定任意名有“傀”的角色为目标，然后其各弃其“傀”。
skill_consume.description_en: When a character with a 「Puppet」 token uses a Basic or Non Time-Delay Tool targeting only you, you may Remove that target and they lose their 「Puppet」. When you Use such a card targeting only 1 character, you may additionally target any number of characters with 「Puppet」 tokens — each loses their 「Puppet」.

skill_savage_cauldron.description_cn: 游戏开始时，你获得3枚“暴戾”标记(至多拥有3枚)。出牌阶段，你可以交给一名其他角色1枚“暴戾”标记，你对有此标记的角色造成的伤害+1，且其出牌阶段开始时，移去“暴戾”标记并随机执行- 项:1.受到1点火焰伤害且本回合不能对你使用【杀】:2.失去1点体力且本回合手牌上限-1:3.你随机获得其一张手牌和一张装备区里的牌。
skill_savage_cauldron.description_en: Game start: gain 3 「Savage」 tokens (max 3). During your Action Phase, you may give 1 「Savage」 token to another character — your damage against them is +1. At the start of their next Action Phase, they remove the token and one effect is randomly executed: 1. They take 1 Fire damage and cannot use [Kill] targeting you this turn; 2. They lose 1 HP and their Hand Limit is −1 this turn; 3. You randomly gain 1 of their hand cards and 1 of their equipped cards.

skill_kill_without_mercy.description_cn: 锁定技，其他角色进入濒死状态时，你获得1枚“暴戾”标记，然后若其体力值小于0，你获得使其进入濒死状态的牌。
skill_kill_without_mercy.description_en: Locked: When another character enters the Verge of Death State, gain 1 「Savage」 token. If that character's HP Value is below 0 at that point, also gain the card that caused them to enter the Verge of Death State.

skill_sacred_talisman.description_cn: 锁定技，当你的牌因弃置而进入弃牌堆后，你获得这些牌对应花色的1枚标记：黑桃 — “紫微”；梅花 — “后土”；红桃 — “玉清”；方块 — “勾陈”(每种标记有1枚)。游戏开始时，你获得以上四种标记。
skill_sacred_talisman.description_en: Locked: When your cards are placed into the Discard Pile via discarding, gain 1 corresponding token per suit (Spades: 「Purple Star」; Clubs: 「Earth Queen」; Hearts: 「Jade Clarity」; Diamonds: 「Curved Hook」; max 1 of each). At the start of the game, gain all four tokens.

skill_true_ritual.description_cn: 你可以于对应时机移去枚对标记并执行效果:“紫微”，当一名角色的判定牌生效前，将此牌的判定结果改为黑桃5或红桃5，“后土”，当你回合外需要使用【桃】时，将一张牌当【桃】使用:“玉清”，当你造成伤害时，令此伤害+1: “勾陈”，当你受到属性伤害后，从牌堆中随机获得三种不同类型的牌各一张。
skill_true_ritual.description_en: You may remove tokens at the following timings: 「Purple Star」 — before a Judgment takes effect, change its result to the 5 of Spades or 5 of Hearts; 「Earth Queen」 — outside your turn when you need [Peach], Use a hand card as [Peach]; 「Jade Clarity」 — when you deal damage, that damage is +1; 「Curved Hook」 — after you take Elemental damage, take 1 card each of 3 different types from the deck.

skill_illuminate.description_cn: 准备阶段或结束阶段，你可以观看牌堆顶的张牌(X为你的“法篆”标记数)。然后将这些牌以任意顺序置于牌堆顶或牌堆底。
skill_illuminate.description_en: During your Starting Phase or End Phase, look at the top X cards of the deck (X = your current token count), then return them to the top in any order.

skill_sp_repair_the_armor.description_cn: 游戏开始时，你获得3个“损”标记。当你失去一张装备牌后，移去1个“损”标记。出牌阶段限一次，你可以摸三张牌并可以使用一张【杀】。然后此阶段你使用下张手牌时(X为你的“损”标记数)，你弃置一张牌。若如此做，此阶段结束时，若你此阶段未以此法弃置过基本牌或锦囊牌，你可以视为使用一张无距离和次数限制的【杀】。
skill_sp_repair_the_armor.description_en: Game start: gain 3 「Damage」 tokens; you lose 1 token whenever you lose an Equipment card. Once per Action Phase: draw 3 cards and you may Use 1 [Kill]. Then when you Use your next hand card, discard X cards (X = your 「Damage」 tokens). If you do not discard a Basic or Tool card this way, you may be treated as using 1 [Kill] with no distance or count restriction.

skill_debate_by_example.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以展示一名其他角色一张手牌，然后你可以选择你的一张牌，你与其交换这两张牌，交换前的牌点数小的角色摸一张牌。
skill_debate_by_example.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Reveal 1 hand card from another character, then choose 1 of your own cards. You and that character exchange those two cards. The character whose card had the lower rank draws 1 card.

skill_sp_mourn_the_fallen.description_cn: 限定技，当其他角色死亡时，若你已受伤，你可以回复1点体力；若你未受伤，你可以增加1点体力上限。若如此做，你获得“展骥”。
skill_sp_mourn_the_fallen.description_en: Limited: When another character dies, if you are Wounded, recover 1 HP; if Unwounded, increase your Max HP by 1. Then gain 〖Display Talent〗.

skill_display_talent.description_cn: 鎖定技，当你于出牌阶段摸牌时，此次摸牌数+1。
skill_display_talent.description_en: Locked: When you draw cards during your Action Phase, draw 1 additional card.

skill_caltrop.description_cn: 出牌阶段内限一次，当你使用或打出本回合的第X张牌时，你可以摸X张牌（X为你的攻击范围）。
skill_caltrop.description_en: Once per Action Phase: When you Use or Play the Xth card of this turn, you may draw X cards (X = your current Attack Range).

skill_barbarian_heritage.description_cn: 锁定技，【南蛮入侵】对你无效。

skill_barbarian_heir.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将所有手牌当【南蛮入侵】使用。当一名角色受到【南蛮入侵】的伤害后，你摸一张牌。
skill_barbarian_heir.description_en: Once per Action Phase, you may use all your hand cards as [Barbarians]. Whenever a character takes damage from [Barbarians], draw 1 card.

skill_shadow_of_the_thicket.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当你对其他角色/其他角色对你使用牌指定为唯一目标后，若此牌不是使用者对目标角色使用的首张牌，你可以弃置一张牌，并获得此牌/令此牌对你无效。
skill_shadow_of_the_thicket.description_en: Once per turn: When you designate another character as the sole target of a card you use, or when another character designates you as the sole target of a card they use — if this is not the first card the User has used targeting that character this turn — you may discard 1 card to gain that card / have that card be Nullified against you.

skill_bond_of_battle.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若你已因「蛮」累计获得过大于七张牌，你加1点体力上限并回复1点体力，然后你可以选择一名男性角色，你与其获得技能〖系力〗，然后你失去技能〖蛮嗣〗。
skill_bond_of_battle.description_en: Awakening: During your Starting Phase, if you have gained more than 7 cards in total via the 「Barbarian」 effect, increase your Max HP by 1 and recover 1 HP. You may then choose one male character — both you and that character gain 〖Bond of Force〗. Then you lose 〖Barbarian Heir〗.

skill_bond_of_force.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当其他拥有〖系力〗的角色于其回合内对没有〖系力〗的角色造成伤害时，你可以弃置一张牌，令此伤害+1，然后你与其各摸两张牌。
skill_bond_of_force.description_en: Once per turn: When another character who also has 〖Bond of Force〗 deals damage during their turn to a character who does not have 〖Bond of Force〗, you may discard 1 card — that damage is increased by 1, then both you and that character draw 2 cards.

skill_salvage_from_crisis.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当你的牌被其他角色弃置或获得后，你可以从牌堆获得一张同名的牌（无同名牌或失去的牌数大于1则改为摸一张牌）。
skill_salvage_from_crisis.description_en: Once per turn: When another character discards or gains one of your cards, take a card of the same name from the deck (or draw 1 if none available or if more than 1 card was lost).

skill_frugal_restraint.description_cn: 每回合限两次，其他角色对你使用的牌置入弃牌堆时，你可以展示所有手牌（至少一张），若你的手牌花色与此牌均不同，你获得此牌。
skill_frugal_restraint.description_en: Twice per turn: When a card another character used on you is placed into the Discard Pile, you may reveal all hand cards (at least 1). If none share a suit with that card, gain it.

skill_tiger_cavalry.description_cn: 锁定技，你计算与其他角色的距离-1；当你于回合外受到伤害后，你判定，若结果为红色，你视为对伤害来源使用一张【杀】（无距离限制）。
skill_tiger_cavalry.description_en: Locked: Your distance to others is reduced by 1. When you take damage outside your turn, perform a Judgment; if Red, be treated as using [Kill] against the source with no distance restriction.

skill_bestow_the_talisman.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以摸一张牌，然后将一张手牌置于一名没有“箓”的角色的武将牌上（称为“箓”）；有“箓”的角色：不能使用或打出与其“箓”类别相同的牌；受到伤害后，或于弃牌阶段弃置至少两张与其“箓”类别相同的牌后，将其“箓”置入弃牌堆。
skill_bestow_the_talisman.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Draw 1 card, then place 1 hand card on a character without a 「Talisman」 as their token. A character with a 「Talisman」 cannot Use or Play cards of the same type. Their 「Talisman」 is discarded when they take damage or discard ≥ 2 same-type cards in their Discard Phase.

skill_read_the_tide.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以选择一项：1.严格递增；2.严格递减。当你本回合使用牌时，若你本阶段使用过的所有牌的点数满足此项，你摸一张牌。
skill_read_the_tide.description_en: At the start of your Action Phase, choose: 1. Strictly ascending; 2. Strictly descending. Whenever you Use a card this turn, if all cards Used this phase satisfy the chosen sequence, draw 1 card.

skill_yield_to_the_worthy.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当你于回合外使用或打出的牌置入弃牌堆时，你可以将之交给一名手牌比你多的角色。
skill_yield_to_the_worthy.description_en: Once per turn: When a card you Used or Played outside your turn is placed into the Discard Pile, you may give it to a character with more hand cards than you.

skill_soaring_dragon.description_cn: 转换技，每轮各限一次，你可以废除一个装备栏并视为使用一张，阳：普通锦囊牌；阴：基本牌。(每种牌名限一次)
skill_soaring_dragon.description_en: Convert Skill: Once per mode per round: Abolish 1 Equipment slot, then be treated as using 1 card not yet used this way via 〖Soaring Dragon〗 — Yang: a Non Time-Delay Tool; Yin: a Basic card.

skill_phoenixs_wing.description_cn: 限定技，一名角色进入濒死状态时，若其体力上限不小于你，你可以令其恢复所有已废除装备栏，然后该角色将体力回复至3点并将手牌摸至6-X(为其恢复的装备栏数)，若该角色为你，你重置“游龙”
skill_phoenixs_wing.description_en: Limited: When a character enters the Verge of Death State, if their Max HP is ≥ yours, restore all their Abolished Equipment slots, have them recover HP to 3, and draw cards until they have 6 minus X hand cards (X = slots restored). If that character is you, also restore all card names used via 〖Soaring Dragon〗.

skill_dignified_bearing.description_cn: 每名角色限一次，当一名角色受到伤害后，若其体力值：不小于你，你可以令其失去1点体力；不大于你，你可以令其回复1点体力。
skill_dignified_bearing.description_en: Once per character: After a character takes damage, if their HP Value is ≥ yours, you may have them lose 1 HP. If their HP Value is ≤ yours, you may have them recover 1 HP.

skill_silken_weave.description_cn: 当你需要使用或打出基本牌时，你可以弃置X张颜色相同的牌（X为此技能本轮发动次数），然后摸一张牌，视为使用或打出此基本牌。
skill_silken_weave.description_en: When you need to Use or Play a Basic card, you may discard X cards of the same color (X = times this skill has been activated this round), draw 1 card, then be treated as having Used or Played that Basic card.

skill_lament_in_verse.description_cn: 每回合每项限一次，当你成为其他角色使用牌的目标后，若其体力值:大于你，你可以摸三张牌；等于你，你可以摸两张牌；小于你，你可以摸一张牌。
skill_lament_in_verse.description_en: Once per HP category per turn: When you become the target of another character's card, if their HP Value is: greater than yours — draw 3; equal — draw 2; less — draw 1.

skill_poisoned_passing.description_cn: 锁定技，当你处于濒死状态时，其他角色不能对你使用【桃】；当你死亡时，你令一名其他角色获得“毒逝”。
skill_poisoned_passing.description_en: Locked: When you are in the Verge of Death State, others cannot Use [Peach] on you. When you die, another character of your choice gains 〖Poisoned Passing〗.

skill_lasting_dread.description_cn: 主公技，锁定技，“诗怨”于其他群势力角色的回合内改为每回合每项限两次。
skill_lasting_dread.description_en: Lord Skill — Locked: 〖Lament in Verse〗 activates twice per HP category per turn when triggered by other Qun faction characters during their turns.

skill_petty_spite.description_cn: 回合结束时，你可以视为对一名其他角色使用至多三张牌名不同的单目标普通锦囊牌，该角色于其下个回合结束时可以视为对你使用等量张【杀】。
skill_petty_spite.description_en: At the end of your turn, you may be treated as using up to 3 different-name single-target Non Time-Delay Tool cards on a character. At the end of their next turn, they may be treated as using the same number of [Kill] targeting you.

skill_steady_the_course.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当你造成或受到伤害后，你可以摸两张牌并展示之，若这两张牌的颜色不同，你弃置一张手牌。
skill_steady_the_course.description_en: Once per turn: After you deal or take damage, draw 2 cards and reveal them. If they are different colors, discard 1 of them.

skill_adorned_comb.description_cn: 游戏开始时，你可以将一张“宝梳”置于你的装备区。每回合开始时，你可以弃置一张牌，根据此牌类型将一张“宝梳”置于其宝物区（若场上已有则移动到其宝物区）：基本牌，琼梳；锦囊牌，犀梳；装备牌，金梳。“宝梳”进入非装备区时被销毁。
skill_adorned_comb.description_en: Game start: place a 「Precious Comb」 in your Equipment Zone. Each turn start: discard 1 card and place a 「Precious Comb」 in a character's Treasure Zone by card type: Basic → Jade Comb; Tool → Rhinoceros Comb; Equipment → Golden Comb. A 「Precious Comb」 is destroyed when it leaves the Equipment Zone.

skill_tearful_offering.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当你或装备区里有“宝梳”的角色的一张牌因弃置置入弃牌堆后，若你能使用此牌，你可以使用之（使用【杀】有次数限制）。
skill_tearful_offering.description_en: Once per turn: After a card belonging to you or a character with a 「Precious Comb」 is discarded, if you can Use it, you may do so (subject to [Kill] count limits).

skill_slander_and_frame.description_cn: 当你攻击范围内的角色使用【闪】时，你可以失去1点体力或弃置一张非基本牌令此【闪】无效，然后你获得之。
skill_slander_and_frame.description_en: When a character within your Attack Range Uses [Dodge], you may lose 1 HP or discard 1 non-Basic card to Nullify that [Dodge], then gain it.

skill_eldest_princess.description_cn: 名角色的结束阶段，若你本回合造成过伤害/受到过伤害，你可以令其摸两张牌/弃置两张牌。
skill_eldest_princess.description_en: During each character's End Phase: if you dealt damage this turn, you may have them draw 2 cards; if you took damage this turn, you may have them discard 2 cards.

skill_fall_from_favour.description_cn: 每轮开始时，你可以弃置任意名角色区域里的共计至多四张牌，若你弃置一名角色区域里的至少三张牌， “落宠可置牌数-1
skill_fall_from_favour.description_en: At the start of each round, you may discard a total of up to 4 cards from any characters' zones. If you discard ≥ 3 cards from one character, the maximum cards 〖Fall from Favour〗 can place decreases by 1.

skill_mournful_dust.description_cn: 锁定技，首轮或洗过牌的轮次内:当你因“落宠”弃置自己区域里的牌后，你摸两张牌:你跳过弃牌阶段；其余轮次内，你不能响应黑桃牌。
skill_mournful_dust.description_en: Locked: During Round 1 or any round where the deck was reshuffled: after discarding your own cards via 〖Fall from Favour〗, draw 2 and skip your Discard Phase. In all other rounds, you cannot respond to Spades cards.

skill_provide_resources.description_cn: 每轮限一次，其他角色的准备阶段，你可以交给其所有手牌。若如此做，当其本回合造成伤害后，若其手牌数不小于你，你可以摸两张牌。
skill_provide_resources.description_en: Once per round: During another character's Starting Phase, you may give them all your hand cards. If you do, when they deal damage this turn and their hand count is ≥ yours, you may draw 2 cards.

skill_fierce_integrity.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以弃置至多三张牌并摸等量张牌，然后你可以弃置伤害来源至多X张牌（X为你以此法弃置的红色牌数）。
skill_fierce_integrity.description_en: After you take damage, you may discard up to 3 cards and draw the same number, then discard up to X of the source's cards (X = Red cards discarded this way).

skill_quick_wit.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以观看牌堆底的一张牌，然后将之交给一名角色。
skill_quick_wit.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Look at the bottom card of the deck, then give it to any character.

skill_emergency_aid.description_cn: 当一名角色进入濒死状态时，你可以令该角色摸一张牌。
skill_emergency_aid.description_en: When a character enters the Verge of Death State, you may have them draw 1 card.

skill_defiant_song.description_cn: 你的第一个回合开始时，你选择一名其他角色：1.当其于其回合外获得手牌时，你摸等量的牌（每回合至多摸三张）；2.每轮限一次，当其进入濒死状态时，你可以令其将体力回复至1点；3.当其死亡时，你弃置所有牌，失去1点体力。
skill_defiant_song.description_en: At the start of your first turn, choose another character and bind 3 effects: 1. When they gain hand cards outside their turn, you draw the same number (max 3/turn); 2. Once/round: when they enter the Verge of Death State, you may have them recover HP to 1; 3. When they die: you discard all cards and lose 1 HP.

skill_steadfast_honour.description_cn: 当其他角色对你造成伤害时，若其不是〖抗歌〗选择的角色，你可以改为失去X点体力并选择一种花色，然后令〖抗歌〗选择的角色从弃牌堆中随机获得X张此花色的牌（X为此次伤害的伤害值）。
skill_steadfast_honour.description_en: When another character (not your 〖Defiant Song〗 target) deals damage to you, you may instead lose X HP and choose 1 suit; your 〖Defiant Song〗 target randomly gains X cards of that suit from the Discard Pile (X = damage value).

skill_barbarian_king.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以弃置任意张牌并依次执行前项(X 为你弃置的牌数):1.获得“叛侵”；2.摸一张牌；3. 回复1点体力；4.摸两张牌并失去“叛侵”
skill_barbarian_king.description_en: During your Action Phase, discard any number of cards (X = cards discarded) and execute steps in order up to X: 1. Gain 「Rebellion」; 2. Draw 1 card; 3. Recover 1 HP; 4. Draw 2 cards and lose 「Rebellion」.

skill_rebel_invasion.description_cn: 出牌阶段和弃牌阶段结束时，你可以将弃牌堆中你此阶段弃置的所有牌当一张【南蛮入侵】使用，若这些牌的数量不大于此牌指定的目标数，你执行“蛮王”最后一项，然后移除该选项
skill_rebel_invasion.description_en: At the end of your Action Phase or Discard Phase, you may Use all cards discarded from your zones this phase as [Barbarians]. If the number of targets ≤ the cards used, execute the last step of 〖Barbarian King〗 and remove that option.

skill_transform_to_wood.description_cn: 当你使用手牌后，若此牌与本回合上一张使用的牌颜色不同，你可以将之置于你的武将牌上，黑色牌称为“灵杉”，红色牌称为“玉树”。
skill_transform_to_wood.description_en: After you Use a hand card whose color differs from the last card you Used this turn, you may place it on your character card: Black → 「Spirit Fir」; Red → 「Jade Tree」.

skill_ancient_pact.description_cn: 锁定技，当一名角色的“灵杉”或“玉树”数量变化后，若两者相等或有一项为0，你摸一张牌。
skill_ancient_pact.description_en: Locked: After a character's 「Spirit Fir」 or 「Jade Tree」 count changes, if the two counts are equal or one is 0, draw 1 card.

skill_auspicious_bond.description_cn: 每轮各限一次，你可以将场上所有“灵杉”当【酒】使用，或将场上所有“玉树”当【桃】使用。
skill_auspicious_bond.description_en: Once per option per round: Use all 「Spirit Fir」 cards as [Wine], or use all 「Jade Tree」 cards as [Peach].

skill_bound_and_wild.description_cn: 限定技，准备阶段，你可以令一名其他角色获得你武将牌上发动过的一个技能，然后弃置所有手牌并视为对其使用一张无距离限制的【杀】。
skill_bound_and_wild.description_en: Limited: Starting Phase: Have another character gain 1 previously activated skill from your character card, then discard all hand cards and be treated as using a rangeless [Kill] against them.

skill_master_craftsman.description_cn: 游戏开始时，你获得牌堆中两张副类别不同的装备牌并置入你的装备区；出牌阶段，你可以将你装备区里的牌置入其他角色的装备区(替换原有装备)，若此牌为 “铸刃”装备，你摸两张牌。
skill_master_craftsman.description_en: Game start: take 2 Equipment cards of different sub-types from the deck and equip them. During your Action Phase, move any of your Equipment into another character's Equipment Zone (replacing existing); if it is a 「Forged Blade」, draw 2 cards.

skill_forge_the_blade.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置一张手牌并进行判定，若结果点数不大于你弃置牌的点数，你获得一张与你弃置牌花色相同的“铸刀”装备，若此牌已加入游戏或结果点数大于你弃置牌的点数，你获得一张【杀】(【天雷刃】须弃置【闪电】获得且跳过判定)。
skill_forge_the_blade.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 1 hand card and perform a Judgment. If result rank ≤ discarded rank, gain a 「Forged Blade」 weapon of the same suit. Otherwise (or if already in play), gain 1 [Kill].

skill_divine_craft.description_cn: 出牌阶段各限一次，你可以弃置一张武器牌/防具牌/坐骑牌或宝物牌，并进行锻造，然后将一张“神工”武器 /防具/完物置入一名角色的装备区(替换原有装备)；每回台结束时，若“神工”装备于本回合移出游戏，你摸一张牌。
skill_divine_craft.description_en: Once per Equipment type per Action Phase: Discard 1 Weapon/Armor/Mount/Treasure card and forge — place a 「Divine Craft」 Equipment of that type into a character's zone. At the end of each turn, if a 「Divine Craft」 Equipment left the game this turn, draw 1 card.

skill_inspired_design.description_cn: 游戏开始时，你获得牌堆中两张副类别不同的装备牌并置入你的装备区；摸牌阶段，你可以少摸一张牌，并获得牌堆或弃牌堆中一张任意副类别的装备牌
skill_inspired_design.description_en: Game start: take 2 Equipment cards of different sub-types from the deck and equip them. Draw Phase: you may draw 1 fewer card and instead take any 1 Equipment from the deck or Discard Pile.

skill_pacify_and_settle.description_cn: 当你使用牌时，你可以摸两张牌，然后弃置张牌 (X为你本回合发动“抚宁”的次数)。
skill_pacify_and_settle.description_en: When you Use a card, you may draw 2 cards then discard X cards (X = times 〖Pacify and Settle〗 has activated this turn).

skill_uphold_discipline.description_cn: 出牌阶段每种花色限一次，你可以展示所有手牌 (至少一张)，若花色均相同，你视为对一名其他角色使用一张【桃】或无次数限制的【杀】。
skill_uphold_discipline.description_en: Once per suit per Action Phase: Reveal all hand cards (at least 1). If they are all the same suit, be treated as using [Peach] on a character or [Kill] on a character with no count restriction.

skill_lone_chokehold.description_cn: 每名其他角色的回合内限一次，当你需要使用或打出【杀】或【闪】时，你可以展示所有手牌（无牌则跳过），若其中【杀】和【闪】的总数不超过1，你视为使用或打出之。
skill_lone_chokehold.description_en: Once per other character's turn: When you need to Use or Play [Kill] or [Dodge], reveal all hand cards (skip if empty). If the total of [Kill] and [Dodge] is ≤ 1, you may Use or Play one.

skill_await_and_strike.description_cn: 其他角色的回合结束时，若其于本回合内使用牌被响应过，你可以将手牌数调整至1，视为对其使用一张需X张【闪】抵消的【杀】，此【杀】造成的伤害+1（X为你以此法弃置牌数且至少为1）。若此【杀】造成伤害，此技能本轮失效。
skill_await_and_strike.description_en: At the end of another character's turn, if any of their cards were responded to this turn, you may adjust your hand to 1 and be treated as using [Kill] against them requiring X [Dodge] to cancel (X = cards discarded, min 1), with +1 damage. If it deals damage, this skill is Nullified this round.

skill_rise_and_fall_at_court.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定目标或成为【杀】的目标后，你可以弃置至多等于你体力上限的牌，若此【杀】对目标角色造成的伤害等于你弃置的牌数，你摸两倍的牌。
skill_rise_and_fall_at_court.description_en: After your [Kill] designates a target or you become a target of [Kill], you may discard up to X cards (X = your Max HP). If the damage that [Kill] deals equals the number discarded, draw twice that number.

skill_pure_discourse.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以与至多两名其他角色同时弃置一张牌，若类别均相同，你可以重复此流程，结束阶段，你可以获得其中每种颜色的牌各一张。
skill_pure_discourse.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Simultaneously discard 1 card with up to 2 other characters. If all are the same type, repeat. End Phase: gain 1 card of each color among all cards discarded this way.

skill_compulsory_review.description_cn: 限定技，准备阶段，你可以令一名于你上个回合结束后(第一轮为游戏开始后)对你造成过伤害的其他角色失去其武将牌上的一个技能(锁定技、觉醒技、限定技除外)，每轮结束时，其视为对你使用X张【杀】，若此【杀】造成伤害，其获得以此法失去的技能(X为其失去该技能的游戏轮数)。
skill_compulsory_review.description_en: Limited: Starting Phase: Choose a character who damaged you since your last turn (or game start on Round 1) — they lose 1 non-Locked/non-Awakening/non-Limited General Card skill. Each round end, they are treated as using X [Kill] against you (X = rounds elapsed since). If those [Kill] deal damage, they regain the skill.

skill_righteous_vendetta.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定目标或成为【杀】的目标后，你可以使用者的一张牌令此【杀】不能被响应，若使用者为你，此【杀】不计次数。
skill_righteous_vendetta.description_en: After your [Kill] designates a target or you become a [Kill] target, you may use 1 card from the User's zones to make that [Kill] unrespondable. If you are the User, it does not count toward your limit.

skill_aid_the_garrison.description_cn: 限定技，结束阶段，你可以令一名已受伤的角色回复 X点体力并摸X张牌(X为你本回合造成的伤害值且至多为5)。
skill_aid_the_garrison.description_en: Limited: End Phase: Choose a Wounded character — they recover X HP and draw X cards (X = total damage you dealt this turn, max 5).

skill_radiant_cloud.description_cn: 每轮每项限一次，你可以将一张牌当【火攻】使用，结算后选择一项，令目标可以:1.使用展示牌并重铸所有手牌；2.使用一张手牌并重铸展示牌: 3.摸一张牌。
skill_radiant_cloud.description_en: Once per option per round: Use any card as [Incendiary]. After resolution, choose one for the target: 1. They Use the revealed card and Reforge all hand cards; 2. They Use 1 hand card and Reforge the revealed card; 3. They draw 1 card.

skill_blunt_remonstrance.description_cn: 当一名角色失去最后的手牌后，你可以与其各摸一张牌，然后选择一项：1.弃置你或其场上一张牌；2.你本轮不能对其发动本技能。
skill_blunt_remonstrance.description_en: When a character loses their last hand card, you and they each draw 1 card, then choose one: 1. Discard 1 field card; 2. This skill cannot target that character again this round.

skill_prostrate_in_remorse.description_cn: 锁定技，当你装备区里的牌进入弃牌堆后，你将之当【闪电】使用或于本阶段结束时与手牌数最少的角色交换手牌。
skill_prostrate_in_remorse.description_en: Locked: When a card leaves your Equipment Zone into the Discard Pile, Use it as [Lightning] or swap all hand cards with the character with the fewest hand cards at the end of the current phase.

skill_preserve_youth.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以令一名角色将体力值或手牌数(每名角色每项限一次)调整至与其上个准备阶段相同 (至多摸至五张；若其未执行过准备阶段，则调整至与游戏开始时相同。
skill_preserve_youth.description_en: End Phase: Have a character (once per character per option) restore either their HP Value or hand count to what it was at their last Starting Phase (draw max 5; if no prior Starting Phase, restore to game-start values).

skill_lightning_calamity.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以令一名角色进行一次判定，若结果为黑桃2~9，则其受到2点雷电伤害，否则其摸两张牌
skill_lightning_calamity.description_en: Starting Phase: Have a character perform a Judgment. If Spades 2–9, they take 2 Lightning damage; otherwise they draw 2 cards.

skill_know_ones_fate.description_cn: 准备阶段与弃牌阶段结束时，你摸一张牌，然后可以将一张牌置于牌堆顶。
skill_know_ones_fate.description_en: At the end of your Starting Phase and Discard Phase, draw 1 card, then you may place 1 hand card on top of the deck.

skill_star_divination.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以亮出牌堆顶的三张牌，然后你可以根据其中红色牌的数量，令一名你指定的其他角色获得以下对应的效果：为3，其下个回合摸牌阶段多摸两张牌、出牌阶段使用【杀】的次数上限+1；为2，其下个回合出牌阶段使用【杀】的次数上限-1、跳过弃牌阶段；不大于1，其下个回合准备阶段弃置一张手牌。
skill_star_divination.description_en: End Phase: Reveal the top 3 cards. Based on the Red count, apply to a character for their next turn: 3 Red — Draw Phase +2, [Kill] limit +1; 2 Red — [Kill] limit −1, skip Discard Phase; ≤1 Red — discard 1 hand card at Starting Phase.

skill_weather_forecast.description_cn: 锁定技，结束阶段，你观看牌堆顶的三张牌并选择是否用你的手牌交换之，然后展示牌堆顶三张牌中的一张，令一名角色根据此牌花色获得技能直到你下次发动此技能：红桃-〖烈暑〗、方块-〖凝雾〗、黑桃-〖骤雨〗、梅花-〖严霜〗。
skill_weather_forecast.description_en: Locked: End Phase: Look at the top 3 deck cards and optionally swap any with hand cards, then reveal 1 and give a character the corresponding skill until next activation: Hearts — 〖Blazing Summer〗; Diamonds — 〖Freezing Fog〗; Spades — 〖Sudden Rain〗; Clubs — 〖Bitter Frost〗.

skill_prophetic_words.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以令一名角色展示一张手牌，然后展示牌堆顶的一张牌，若两张牌类别/花色/点数/牌名字数中任意项相同且展示牌堆顶的牌数小于3，重复此流程，最后你获得以此法展示的牌。
skill_prophetic_words.description_en: Starting Phase: Have a character reveal 1 hand card, then reveal the top deck card. If any property (type, suit, rank, or name length) matches and fewer than 3 deck cards have been revealed, repeat. Gain all revealed deck cards.

skill_blazing_summer.description_cn: 锁定技，其他角色的结束阶段，若其体力值全场最大，其失去1点体力。
skill_blazing_summer.description_en: Locked: At another character's End Phase, if they have the highest HP Value on the field, they lose 1 HP.

skill_freezing_fog.description_cn: 锁定技，当其他角色使用【杀】指定非相邻角色为唯一目标时，其进行判定，若结果点数大于此【杀】，此【杀】无效。
skill_freezing_fog.description_en: Locked: When another character Uses [Kill] targeting only 1 non-adjacent character, they perform a Judgment. If the result rank exceeds that [Kill]'s rank, the [Kill] is Nullified.

skill_sudden_rain.description_cn: 锁定技，防止其他角色造成的火焰伤害。当一名角色受到雷电伤害后，其相邻角色失去1点体力。
skill_sudden_rain.description_en: Locked: Prevent all Fire damage from other characters. When a character takes Lightning damage, their adjacent characters each lose 1 HP.

skill_bitter_frost.description_cn: 锁定技，其他角色的结束阶段，若其体力值全场最小，其失去1点体力。
skill_bitter_frost.description_en: Locked: At another character's End Phase, if they have the lowest HP Value on the field, they lose 1 HP.

skill_opportunistic_gain.description_cn: 每回合结束时，若与你势力相同的角色本回合执行过以下项，你可以执行另一项：1.摸一张牌；2.弃置一名角色一张手牌；3.视为使用一张【杀】；4.变更势力。
skill_opportunistic_gain.description_en: At the end of each turn, if a character sharing your faction executed one of these actions, you may execute a different one: 1. Draw 1 card; 2. Discard 1 of a character's hand cards; 3. Be treated as using [Kill] against a character; 4. Change your faction.

skill_conceal_the_heart.description_cn: 锁定技，摸牌阶段开始时，你展示[6]牌堆底三张牌并摸与其中红桃牌数等量张牌。当你每回合首次受到伤害时，你展示牌堆底三张牌并将其中任意张牌置入弃牌堆，然后此伤害-X（X为你以此法置入弃牌堆的红桃牌数）。
skill_conceal_the_heart.description_en: Locked: At the start of your Draw Phase, reveal the bottom 3 deck cards and draw a number of cards equal to the Hearts cards among them. The first time each turn you take damage, reveal the bottom 3 deck cards, discard any of them, and reduce that damage by X (X = Hearts cards discarded).

skill_gentle_subtlety.description_cn: 已受伤角色的弃牌阶段开始时，你可以令其弃置一张牌且其此阶段手牌上限+1，或令其摸一张牌且其此阶段手牌上限-1。
skill_gentle_subtlety.description_en: At the start of a Wounded character's Discard Phase, choose one: 1. They discard 1 card; their Hand Limit this phase is increased by 1. 2. They draw 1 card; their Hand Limit this phase is reduced by 1.

skill_tranquil_ease.description_cn: 出牌阶段各限一次，若你的手牌数为:奇数，你可以摸一张牌并置至少半数手牌；偶数，你可以弃置至少半数手牌并摸三张牌。
skill_tranquil_ease.description_en: Once per option per Action Phase: 1. If hand count is odd, draw 1 card then place at least half (rounded up) on top of the deck; 2. If even, discard at least half (rounded up) then draw 3 cards.

skill_harmonious_accord.description_cn: 每回合各限一次，当你的手牌数变为1后，你可以展示之并摸一张牌，然后令你本回合下次使用点数大于 /小于此牌点数的普通锦囊牌各多结算一次。
skill_harmonious_accord.description_en: Once per option per turn: When your hand count becomes 1, reveal it and draw 1. For the rest of this turn: your next Non Time-Delay Tool with a higher rank resolves once extra; your next one with a lower rank also resolves once extra.

skill_wild_and_arrogant.description_cn: 你使用【杀】可以多指定一个目标，其他角色使用【杀】可以多指定你为目标(有距离限制)。若你的手牌数为偶数，你摸一张牌令此【杀】对任意目标无效。
skill_wild_and_arrogant.description_en: Your [Kill] may designate 1 additional target. Others may also designate you as an extra [Kill] target (with range). If your hand count is even, draw 1 card to Nullify that [Kill] against any 1 of its targets.

skill_blazing_ambition.description_cn: 觉醒技，每回合结束后，若此回合恰好有包含你在内的三名角色成为过牌的目标，你执行一个额外回合并获得 “偕举”。
skill_blazing_ambition.description_en: Awakening: At the end of each turn, if exactly 3 characters (including you) were targeted by cards this turn, take an extra turn and gain 〖Rally Together〗.

skill_rally_together.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以令任意名于本回合成为过牌目标的角色各视为使用一张【杀】
skill_rally_together.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Have any number of characters who were targeted by cards this turn each be treated as using 1 [Kill].

skill_wild_boast.description_cn: 当你需要使用牌时，你可以观看牌堆底的X+1张牌，然后可以使用其中你需要的牌并弃置你前X个区域里的牌：1.判定区；2.装备区；3.手牌区。（X为本回合使用过牌的类型数）
skill_wild_boast.description_en: When you need to Use a card, look at the bottom X+1 deck cards (X = card types Used this turn), then Use any needed card from among them and discard X cards from your zones in order: 1. Judgment Zone; 2. Equipment Zone; 3. Hand.

skill_tactless_misstep.description_cn: 锁定技，你不能使用【无懈可击】。当你使用点数为字母的牌时，你令之无效并摸一张牌，然后你下次对手牌数小于你的角色使用牌无距离和次数限制。当你于一回合内使用了三张未造成伤害的伤害牌后，〖嚣翻〗于本回合内失效。
skill_tactless_misstep.description_en: Locked: You cannot Use [Nullification]. When you Use a letter-rank card (A/J/Q/K), Nullify it and draw 1; your next card against a character with fewer hand cards has no distance or count restriction. After using 3 non-damaging damage cards this turn, 〖Wild Boast〗 is Nullified for the rest of this turn.

skill_unruffled_calm.description_cn: 转换技，锁定技，当你使用：阳：最左侧的手牌时，你摸一张牌；阴：最右侧的手牌时，你摸一张牌。你以此法摸牌后本回合不能整理手牌。
skill_unruffled_calm.description_en: Convert Skill — Locked: When you Use the leftmost (Yang) or rightmost (Yin) card from your hand, draw 1 card. After drawing this way, you cannot reorder your hand this turn.

skill_store_the_hair.description_cn: 出牌阶段各限一次，你可以:1.将至少半数手牌置于武将牌上，称为“蓄发”牌，然后你可以将一张牌当“蓄发”牌中任意普通锦囊牌使用；2.移去至少半数“蓄发牌，然后你可以将一张牌当移去牌中的一张普通锦變牌使用
skill_store_the_hair.description_en: Once per option per Action Phase: 1. Place ≥ half your hand (rounded up) on your character card as 「Stored」 cards, then Use 1 hand card as any Non Time-Delay Tool in the 「Stored」 cards; 2. Remove ≥ half the 「Stored」 cards, then Use 1 hand card as any of the removed Non Time-Delay Tool cards.

skill_linked_verses.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以令一名其他角色获得弃牌堆中本回合你使用的至多两张颜色相同的牌，然后其下个结束阶段，你可获得弃牌堆中该回合其使用的至多两张另一种颜色的牌。
skill_linked_verses.description_en: End Phase: Have another character gain up to 2 same-color cards from the Discard Pile that you Used this turn. Then at the end of their next End Phase, you may gain up to 2 of the other color from the Discard Pile that they Used.

skill_longing_for_home.description_cn: 锁定技，因“联句”获得的牌称为“闾”；当你受到伤害后，你摸一张牌并称为“闾”。“闾”因弃置进入弃牌堆后，失去此牌的角色获得之。
skill_longing_for_home.description_en: Locked: Cards gained via 〖Linked Verses〗 are 「Lü」 cards. After you take damage, draw 1 card — it also becomes a 「Lü」 card. When a 「Lü」 card is placed into the Discard Pile via discarding, the character who lost it gains it back.

skill_overawe_and_pacify.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以弃置一张牌并进行判定，你本回合下次使用与判定牌类别相同的牌无距离限制且可以多指定一个目标，若弃置牌与判定牌类别相同，你摸一张牌。
skill_overawe_and_pacify.description_en: During your Action Phase, discard 1 card and perform a Judgment. Your next card of the same type this turn has no distance restriction and may target 1 additional character. If the discarded card matches the Judgment result's type, draw 1 card.

skill_appease_the_frontier.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当一张牌指定目标后，若此牌目标数不小于你的体力值，你可以令其中一名目标角色选择一项：1.交给你一张牌；2.令你回复1点体力。
skill_appease_the_frontier.description_en: Once per turn: When a card designates ≥ your HP Value targets, 1 of those targets may choose one: 1. Give you 1 card; 2. Let you recover 1 HP.

skill_profound_notes.description_cn: 转换技，每回合限一次，阳：你可以将一张牌移出游戏，视为使用任意基本牌；阴：你可以将一张牌移出游戏，视为使用仅指定唯一角色为目标的普通锦囊牌。若移出游戏的牌，不为装备牌，你弃置一张牌；为装备牌，你移去所有「玄注」牌并摸等量的牌。
skill_profound_notes.description_en: Convert Skill: Once per turn: Yang — Remove 1 hand card from the game and be treated as using any Basic card; Yin — Remove 1 hand card from the game and be treated as using any Non Time-Delay Tool targeting 1 character. In either case: if not Equipment, discard 1; if Equipment, Remove all 「Profound Notes」 cards and draw the same number.

skill_sp_blunt_remonstrance.description_cn: 锁定技，当你对其他角色使用的牌生效后，其本回合不能抵消牌，当你抵消牌后，你本回合不能成为牌的目标。
skill_sp_blunt_remonstrance.description_en: Locked: After a card you Use takes effect on another character, they cannot Negate cards this turn. After you Negate a card, you cannot be targeted by cards this turn.

skill_retire_the_blade.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将任意角色各一张牌置于牌堆顶，视为对其使用一张【五谷丰登】，然后视为对除其外的其他角色使用一张【万箭齐发】。
skill_retire_the_blade.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Place 1 card from each of any number of characters on top of the deck, then be treated as using [Harvest] targeting those characters, then be treated as using [Raining Arrows] against all other characters.

skill_light_karma.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时或当你首次受到伤害时，你选择一名未选择过的其他角色；每回合限一次，当 “轻缘”角色获得牌后，你获得一名“轻缘”角色一张手牌。
skill_light_karma.description_en: Locked: Game start or when you first take damage, choose an unselected other character. Once per turn: when that character gains cards, you may take 1 of their hand cards.

skill_mirror_self.description_cn: 你可以将一张本轮获得的红色牌当【闪】使用。
skill_mirror_self.description_en: You may Use a red card gained this round as [Dodge].

skill_respectful_service.description_cn: 每轮首位角色回合开始时，你可以令任意名其他角色各获得你一张牌，然后你摸X张牌（X为被获得牌的花色数）。
skill_respectful_service.description_en: At the start of the first character's turn each round, you may give any number of other characters 1 of your cards each, then draw X cards (X = number of different suits given).

skill_mutual_aid.description_cn: 当你的手牌数变为全场最少时，你可以于本回合结束时将手牌调整至与当前回合角色相同（至多摸至五张）。你以此法弃置至少两张牌后，回复1点体力。
skill_mutual_aid.description_en: When your hand count becomes the sole lowest, at the end of the current turn adjust your hand to match the current turn character's (draw max 5). If you discarded ≥ 2 cards this way, recover 1 HP.

skill_noble_offering.description_cn: 限定技，当你进入濒死状态时，你可以交给一名其他角色任意张牌，若你对其发动过“恭节”和“相胥”，你回复等量体力。
skill_noble_offering.description_en: Limited: When you enter the Verge of Death State, give any number of cards to any characters. If you activated both 〖Respectful Service〗 and 〖Mutual Aid〗 for any of them, recover HP equal to the cards given to them.

skill_lone_edge.description_cn: 锁定技，出牌阶段开始时，你选择至少一项：1.失去1点体力；2.废除一个装备栏。然后你摸X张牌，且你的攻击范围与使用【杀】的次数上限均改为X（X为你已废除的装备栏数与已损失的体力值之和，且至多为你的体力上限）。
skill_lone_edge.description_en: Locked: At the start of your Action Phase, choose at least one: 1. Lose 1 HP; 2. Abolish 1 Equipment slot. Then draw X cards, and your Attack Range and [Kill] count limit are each set to X (X = Abolished slots + HP Lost, max = your Max HP).

skill_change_the_stronghold.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以展示牌堆顶X张牌(为你的体力上限)，然后可以用任意张手牌交换其中等量张牌，若展示牌点数之和因此增加，你可以用所有手牌交换展示牌。
skill_change_the_stronghold.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Reveal the top X deck cards (X = your Max HP). You may exchange any number of hand cards for the same number of revealed cards. If the total rank of the revealed cards increases, you may exchange all hand cards for all revealed cards.

skill_keep_the_household.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当前回合角色失去其一个区域内的最后一张牌后，你可以令其摸两张牌且本回合手牌上限+2。
skill_keep_the_household.description_en: Once per turn: When the current turn character loses their last card from any one zone, have them draw 2 cards and increase their Hand Limit by 2 this turn.

skill_console_and_encourage.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以废除至多三个装备栏，令一名角色选择等量项：1.恢复一个被废除的装备栏；2.回复1点体力；3.弃置所有手牌，摸四张牌。
skill_console_and_encourage.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Abolish up to 3 Equipment slots in your zone. Have a character choose that many options: 1. Restore 1 of your Abolished slots; 2. Recover 1 HP; 3. Discard all hand cards then draw 4.

skill_chart_and_strike.description_cn: 当你使用非装备牌指定目标后，你可以展示所有手牌 (无牌则跳过)，然后若其中没有基本牌，你摸X张牌 (为此牌指定的目标数)。
skill_chart_and_strike.description_en: After a non-Equipment card designates a target, reveal all hand cards (skip if empty). If none are Basic, draw X cards (X = total targets designated by that card).

skill_sp_claim_the_province.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以将一张方块牌当【乐不思蜀】对自己使用，然后你回复点体力。若你的判定区里有牌，你对你攻击范围内的其他角色使用牌无距离和次数限制。
skill_sp_claim_the_province.description_en: During your Action Phase, Use a Diamonds card as [Acedia] on yourself, then recover X HP (X = cards in your Judgment Zone). While you have [Acedia] in your Judgment Zone, you have no distance or count restriction when using cards against other characters.

skill_unleash_chaos.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以选择一名角色，其视为使用一张可指定其攻击范围内任意名角色的【杀】，然后你弃置张牌(X为以此法受到伤害的角色数)。
skill_unleash_chaos.description_en: Starting Phase: Choose a character — they are treated as using [Kill] on any characters within their Attack Range you designate. You then discard X cards (X = characters who took damage).

skill_invite_calamity.description_cn: 锁定技，一名角色于你的回合内首次受到伤害后，其将一张手牌置于你的武将牌上，本回合结束时你获得这些牌。
skill_invite_calamity.description_en: Locked: The first time a character takes damage during your turn, they place 1 hand card on your character card. You gain all such cards at the end of your turn.

skill_gentle_benevolence.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择任意名角色，其每满足一项便摸一张牌:没有手牌；2.手牌数小于等于你
skill_gentle_benevolence.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose any number of characters. For each condition met, they draw 1 card: 1. They have no hand cards; 2. Their hand count is ≤ yours.

skill_restrain_the_baggage.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以交给一名角色两张牌，然后其交给你一张手牌。若此牌牌名与你交给其的牌中牌名相同，你可以选择一项：1.对其造成1点伤害；2.将场上一张牌移动至其对应的区域。
skill_restrain_the_baggage.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Give a character 2 of your cards, then they give you 1 hand card. If that card's name matches one of the cards you gave, choose one: 1. Deal 1 damage to them; 2. Move 1 field card to its zone.

skill_timid_defense.description_cn: 锁定技，当你受到伤害后，你摸三张牌，然后弃置X张牌（X为本回合受到过伤害的角色数）。
skill_timid_defense.description_en: Locked: After you take damage, draw 3 cards then discard X (X = characters who have taken damage this turn).

skill_measured_words.description_cn: 一名角色一次性失去了恰好两张手牌后，你可以与其从牌堆两端各摸一张牌并展示，若花色不同，此技能本回合失效。
skill_measured_words.description_en: When a character loses exactly 2 hand cards at once, you and that character each draw 1 card from opposite ends of the deck and reveal them. If the suits differ, this skill is Nullified for the rest of this turn.

skill_mirror_flower.description_cn: 锁定技，每轮开始时，你摸两张牌。回合开始时，你将“镜花”牌置于牌堆底。
skill_mirror_flower.description_en: Locked: Round start: draw 2 cards as 「Mirror Flower」 cards. Turn start: place all 「Mirror Flower」 cards at the bottom of the deck.

skill_water_moon.description_cn: 锁定技，回合结束时，你摸两张牌。每轮结束时，你将“水月”牌置于牌堆顶。
skill_water_moon.description_en: Locked: Turn end: draw 2 cards as 「Water Moon」 cards. Round end: place all 「Water Moon」 cards on top of the deck.

skill_weeping_thoughts.description_cn: 你的红色牌进入弃牌堆时，将之置于牌堆底。当你受到伤害后，你可以依次亮出牌堆底的牌直至不为红色或达到三张，使用其中的【桃】、【无中生有】与红色装备牌(可指定其他角色为目标)，然后摸等同于其中无法使用的红色牌数的牌。
skill_weeping_thoughts.description_en: When your red cards go to the Discard Pile, place them at the bottom of the deck instead. After you take damage, reveal cards from the bottom one at a time until non-Red or 3 revealed; Use any [Peach], [Resupply], or Red Equipment among them; draw cards equal to the Red cards you could not Use.

skill_skilled_weaving.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以弃置一张牌并亮出牌堆顶的两张牌，然后获得其中一张，此技能失效直到你失去以此法获得的牌。
skill_skilled_weaving.description_en: During your Action Phase, discard 1 card and reveal the top 2 deck cards, then gain 1 of them. This skill is Nullified until you lose the gained card.

skill_cunning_might.description_cn: 锁定技，你的黑色牌不计入手牌上限。若你的手牌数大于体力值，你对体力值小于等于你的角色使用黑色牌无距离限制，且其不能响应。
skill_cunning_might.description_en: Locked: Your Black cards do not count toward your Hand Limit. If your hand count exceeds your HP Value, your Black cards have no distance restriction against characters with HP Value ≤ yours and cannot be responded to.

skill_whip_mastery.description_cn: 锁定技，你使用【杀】造成伤害或受到【杀】的伤害后，你选择受伤角色至多X张手牌，这些牌视为无次数限制的【杀】，直到其使用非基本牌（X为其已损体力值）。然后若你或其手牌均为【杀】，你摸两张牌。
skill_whip_mastery.description_en: Locked: After your [Kill] deals damage or you take [Kill] damage, choose up to X of the Wounded character's hand cards — those cards are treated as [Kill] with no count restriction until they Use a non-Basic card (X = their HP Lost). If all their hand cards are [Kill], draw 2.

skill_phoenix_jade.description_cn: 锁定技，当黑桃牌离开一名角色装备区后，你回复1点体力。当你对其他角色造成伤害时，你弃置你或其场上一张黑桃牌，令此伤害+1。
skill_phoenix_jade.description_en: Locked: When a Spades Equipment leaves any character's Equipment Zone, recover 1 HP. When you deal damage to another character, discard 1 Spades field card from either zone to increase that damage by 1.

skill_sharp_observation.description_cn: 摸牌阶段开始时，你亮出牌堆顶三张牌，然后你可改为获得其中点数不大于8的牌，若如此做，你可获得一名其他角色随机一张牌。
skill_sharp_observation.description_en: At the start of your Draw Phase, reveal the top 3 deck cards. You may take all with rank ≤ 8; if you do, also randomly take 1 card from another character.

skill_deep_respect.description_cn: 弃牌阶段结束时，若你于此阶段内弃置过至少两张黑色牌，你可以选择一名其他角色，其下个出牌阶段使用的牌进入弃牌堆后，你获得之（每阶段限获得三次）。
skill_deep_respect.description_en: At the end of your Discard Phase, if you discarded ≥ 2 Black cards, choose a character — their cards going to the Discard Pile next Action Phase are given to you instead (max 3).

skill_chariot_wheel.description_cn: 出牌阶段，若你的装备区里没有宝物牌，你可以弃置一张黑色牌，然后将一张“舆”置入你的装备区；当你非因替换而失去装备区里的宝物牌后，你可以进行判定，若结果为黑色，随机将一张“舆”置入你的装备区。
skill_chariot_wheel.description_en: During your Action Phase, if you have no Treasure equipped, discard 1 Black card and place 1 「Chariot」 into your Equipment Zone.
