When you lose a Treasure for any reason other than replacement, perform a Judgment; if Black, place 1 「Chariot」 into your Equipment Zone.

skill_qiang_chieftain.description_cn: 锁定线，若你的装备区里有宝物牌，你与其他角色的距离-1。
skill_qiang_chieftain.description_en: Locked: If you have a Treasure equipped, your distance to other characters is reduced by 1.

skill_stack_of_eggs.description_cn: 你可以将X张牌当一张你本轮未使用过的基本牌使用（X为已横置的角色数且至少为1）。若你以此法失去最后的手牌，你摸两张牌，从本回合弃牌堆中获得一张普通锦囊牌，然后此技能失效直到你下次受到伤害后。
skill_stack_of_eggs.description_en: Use X cards as a Basic not yet used this round (X = Chained characters count, min 1). If you lose your last hand card this way, draw 2 and take 1 Non Time-Delay Tool from the Discard Pile; this skill is Nullified until you next take damage.

skill_overturn_the_nest.description_cn: 锁定锁定技，当你使用基本牌后，当前回合角色横置。每轮结束时，你与已横置的角色各摸一张牌，然后已横置的角色各弃置X张牌（X为已横置的角色数且至少为1）。
skill_overturn_the_nest.description_en: Locked: After you Use a Basic card, the current turn character is placed into the Chain State. Each round end: you and all Chained characters each draw 1 card; each Chained character discards X cards (X = total Chained, min 1).

skill_warrior_womans_might.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以展示所有手牌，若其中包含的类别数大于0，你获得弃牌堆中的一张【杀】，大于1，此阶段你使用牌无距离限制，大于2，此阶段你使用【杀】或普通锦囊牌可以增加至多两个目标。
skill_warrior_womans_might.description_en: Action Phase start: reveal all hand cards. Based on different types present: ≥1 — gain 1 [Kill] from Discard Pile; ≥2 — no distance restriction this phase; ≥3 — [Kill] and Non Time-Delay Tool cards may each add up to 2 targets.

skill_warrior_dress.description_cn: 觉醒技，每回合结束时，若你的体力值或手牌数为1. 你减1点体力上限并获得“神威”和“无双” 然后将体力回复至体力上限，并将手牌摸至体力上限。
skill_warrior_dress.description_en: Awakening: At the end of each turn, if your HP Value or hand count is 1, reduce Max HP by 1, gain 〖Divine Might〗 and 〖Peerless〗, recover HP to Max HP, draw to Max HP.

skill_sp_divine_might.description_cn: 锁定技，摸牌阶段，你多摸两张牌；你的手牌上限+2。
skill_sp_divine_might.description_en: Locked: During your Draw Phase, draw 2 additional cards. Your Hand Limit is increased by 2.

skill_jade_pendant.description_cn: 每轮限一次，当你需要使用基本牌时，你可以将手牌调整至与体力值相同，然后视为使用此牌。
skill_jade_pendant.description_en: Once per round: When you need to use a Basic Card, you may adjust your hand card count to equal your HP Value, then be treated as having used that card.

skill_gentle_favour.description_cn: 每局游戏限一次，当一名角色于一回合内体力值变为1后，你可以选择一项：1. 对其使用一张【桃】；2. 交给其一张装备牌，令其使用之。然后其复原武将牌。
skill_gentle_favour.description_en: Limited: When a character's HP Value becomes 1 during a turn, you may choose one: 1. Use a [Peach] on them; 2. Give them one Equipment Card and have them use it. Then that character's General Card is restored to its face-up position.

skill_wondrous_heart.description_cn: 锁定技，当你受到1点伤害后，若〖温宜〗可发动次数不为0，则你摸两张牌，否则你摸一张牌并令〖温宜〗可发动次数+1。
skill_wondrous_heart.description_en: Locked: After you receive 1 damage, if 〖Gentle Favour〗 has remaining activations, draw 2 cards. Otherwise, draw 1 card and increase 〖Gentle Favour〗's remaining activations by 1.

skill_wise_counsel.description_cn: 每轮限一次，一名角色的出牌阶段开始时，你可以展示其一张手牌。当其于此阶段内使用与此牌类别相同的牌后，其摸一张牌，然后弃置X张牌（X为此回合其使用此类别牌的次数-1）；此阶段结束时，若其此阶段以此法获得的牌数大于弃置的牌数，你与其各摸一张牌。
skill_wise_counsel.description_en: Once per round: At the start of a character's Action Phase, reveal 1 of their hand cards. When they Use a card of the same type this phase, they draw 1 then discard X cards (X = times they Used that type this phase −1). If cards gained this phase via this exceed discarded, you and they each draw 1.

skill_gentle_virtue.description_cn: 每回合各限一次，当你回复体力后，你可以令一名其他角色摸两张牌；当你一次获得至少两张牌后，你可以令一名其他角色回复1点体力。
skill_gentle_virtue.description_en: Once per option per turn: After you recover HP, have another character draw 2; after you gain ≥ 2 cards at once, have another character recover 1 HP.

skill_rally_support.description_cn: 当你于回合内使用牌结算完成进入弃牌堆时，你可以将之交给一名其他角色(每种牌名每回合限一次)。
skill_rally_support.description_en: When a card you Used during your turn is placed into the Discard Pile, you may give it to another character (once per card name per turn).

skill_self_scribe.description_cn: 锁定技，当你于回合内非因“自书”获得手牌后，你摸一张牌；其他角色的结束阶段，你将本回合获得的手牌置入弃牌堆。
skill_self_scribe.description_en: Locked: When you gain hand cards during your turn via methods other than 〖Self-Scribe〗, draw 1 card. At the end of another character's turn, place all hand cards you gained this turn into the Discard Pile.

skill_virtuously_wise.description_cn: 当其他角色于你回合外因弃置而失去基本牌后，你可以摸一张牌。
skill_virtuously_wise.description_en: When another character loses a Basic card via discarding outside your turn, you may draw 1 card.

skill_spear_dance.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以进行判定。若如此做，直到回合结束，你使用点数小于结果的【杀】无距离限制，且你使用点数大于结果的【杀】不计入次数限制。
skill_spear_dance.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Perform a Judgment. Until end of turn: your [Kill] with rank less than the result has no distance restriction; your [Kill] with rank greater than the result does not count toward your limit.

skill_lure_into_battle.description_cn: 锁定技，当其他角色于你的回合内失去牌后，你摸一张牌且你本回合的手牌上限+1，其本回合下次受到的伤害+1。然后结束阶段，若其本回合未受到过伤害，其摸X张牌（X为其本回合失去牌的次数且至多为3）。
skill_lure_into_battle.description_en: Locked: When another character loses cards during your turn, draw 1 card, your Hand Limit this turn +1, and their next damage taken this turn is +1. At your End Phase, if they took no damage this turn, they draw X cards (X = times they lost cards, max 3).

skill_assess_and_rebuke.description_cn: 转换技，出牌阶段限一次，你可以观看一名角色的手牌并展示其中一张，阳：你弃置此牌，其视为对你使用一张【火攻】，若此牌未造成过伤害，此技能视为未发动过；阴：其使用此牌，若此牌造成过伤害，此技能视为未发动过。
skill_assess_and_rebuke.description_en: Convert Skill: Once per Action Phase: Look at a character's hand and reveal 1 card. Yang: you discard that card and they are treated as using [Incendiary] on you — if the card has never dealt damage, this skill is treated as not activated. Yin: they Use that card — if it has dealt damage before, this skill is treated as not activated.

skill_stern_simplicity.description_cn: 锁定技，每回合结束时，若你本回合未受到过伤害，你摸X张牌（X为本回合展示过的牌数且至多为5）。
skill_stern_simplicity.description_en: Locked: At the end of each turn, if you took no damage this turn, draw X cards (X = cards revealed this turn, max 5).

skill_twin_blades.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以视为对一名其他角色使用一张【杀】，若其：不在你的攻击范围内，此【杀】不能被响应，你获得〖狩星〗直到回合结束；在你的攻击范围内，此【杀】伤害+1，你获得〖铩雪〗直到回合结束。
skill_twin_blades.description_en: Starting Phase: Be treated as using [Kill] against another character. If they are outside your Attack Range: that [Kill] cannot be responded to, gain 〖Hunt the Stars〗 until end of turn. If within range: that [Kill] deals +1 damage, gain 〖Slay the Snow〗 until end of turn.

skill_set_the_trap.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以弃置一张武器牌或失去一个其他技能，令一名其他角色弃置两张牌。
skill_set_the_trap.description_en: During your Action Phase, discard 1 Weapon card or lose 1 of your other skills, then have another character discard 2 cards.

skill_hunt_the_stars.description_cn: 你可以将X张牌当一张不计入次数的【杀】对一名攻击范围外的角色使用（X为你与其的距离）。
skill_hunt_the_stars.description_en: Use X cards as 1 [Kill] (not counting toward your limit) against a character outside your Attack Range (X = distance to them).

skill_slay_the_snow.description_cn: 当你对其他角色造成伤害后，你可以摸两张牌，然后弃置X张牌（X为你与其的距离）。
skill_slay_the_snow.description_en: After you deal damage to another character, draw 2 cards, then discard X cards (X = distance to them).

skill_uphold_righteousness.description_cn: 锁定技，一名角色的结束阶段，若你本回合使用或打出过基本牌，你视为使用其中一张或摸一张牌。
skill_uphold_righteousness.description_en: Locked: At a character's End Phase, if you Used or Played a Basic card this turn, be treated as using 1 of those Basic cards or draw 1 card.

skill_praise_of_shu.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以与一名角色拼点:若你赢，你重置“颂蜀”；没赢，你与其各摸两张牌。
skill_praise_of_shu.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Initiate a Point Duel with a character. If you win: reset 〖Praise of Shu〗 (may use again). If you lose: you and that character each draw 2 cards.

skill_thoughtful_debate.description_cn: 摸牌阶段，你可以改为亮出牌堆顶的四张牌，获得其中点数最大和最小的牌，然后你可以将剩余牌交给场上手牌数最少的角色
skill_thoughtful_debate.description_en: Draw Phase: You may instead reveal the top 4 deck cards, gain the highest- and lowest-rank cards among them, then optionally give the remaining cards to the character with the fewest hand cards.

skill_benevolent_rule.description_cn: 锁定技，当有伤害被减少或防止后，你摸两张牌。
skill_benevolent_rule.description_en: Locked: Whenever damage is reduced or prevented, draw 2 cards.

skill_submit_counsel.description_cn: 当你造成伤害时，你可以令此伤害+1，若如此做，你此回合下次造成的伤害-1且不能发动〖进谏〗；当你受到伤害时，你可以令此伤害-1，若如此做，你此回合下次受到的伤害+1且不能发动〖进谏〗。
skill_submit_counsel.description_en: When you deal damage, you may increase it by 1; if you do, your next damage dealt this turn is −1 and you cannot activate 〖Submit Counsel〗 again. When you take damage, you may reduce it by 1; if you do, your next damage taken this turn is +1 and you cannot activate 〖Submit Counsel〗 again.

skill_battle_cry.description_cn: 锁定技，你的回合内，每当有一种花色的牌本回合首次进入弃牌堆后，你摸一张牌。
skill_battle_cry.description_en: Locked: During your turn, the first time each suit of card enters the Discard Pile this turn, draw 1 card.

skill_force_surge.description_cn: 出牌阶段限零次，你可以弃置一张牌然后对一名其他角色造成点伤害。你的回合内，本回合进入弃牌堆的牌每次达到八的倍数张时(存活人数小于5时改为四的倍数)，此技能使用次数+1。
skill_force_surge.description_en: This skill starts with 0 uses per Action Phase. You may discard 1 card to deal 1 damage to a character. During your turn, each time the total cards in the Discard Pile this turn reaches a multiple of 8 (or 4 if fewer than 5 players), this skill gains 1 additional use.

skill_present_views.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以展示牌堆顶的三张牌并选择至多两项:1.弃置一张牌，然后令一名角色获得其中与你弃置牌花色相同的所有牌；2.使用其中一张牌。若你两项均执行，你重所有手牌，本局游戏“陈见”多展示一张牌(至多展示五张牌)。
skill_present_views.description_en: Starting Phase: Reveal the top 3 deck cards and choose up to 2 options: 1. Discard 1 card; have a character gain all revealed cards matching that card's suit; 2. Use 1 of the revealed cards. If both options are chosen, redraw all hand cards; 〖Present Views〗 reveals 1 extra card this game (max 5).

skill_pure_beauty.description_cn: 锁定技，当你成为其他角色使用牌的目标时，若你的装备区里包含与之花色相同的牌，你摸一张牌；其他角色弃置你装备区里的最后一张牌时，取消之。
skill_pure_beauty.description_en: Locked: When you become a card's target, if your Equipment Zone contains a card of the same suit, draw 1 card. When another character discards the last card from your Equipment Zone, Remove that target instead.

skill_know_the_ways.description_cn: 每轮限一次，当一名角色进入濒死状态时，你可以令伤害来源选择一项：1.交给[1]其两张颜色不同的牌；2.其回复1点体力。
skill_know_the_ways.description_en: Once per round: When a character enters the Verge of Death State, have the damage source choose one: 1. Give them 2 cards of different colors; 2. They recover 1 HP.

skill_aid_the_state.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以令一名角色将手牌调整至X张（X为其体力上限且至多为5），然后若其：未摸牌，其回复1点体力；摸牌且手牌数全场最多，你可以令其选择是否对你指定的另一名角色使用一张不计入次数且无距离次数限制的【杀】。
skill_aid_the_state.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Have a character adjust their hand count to X (X = their Max HP, max 5). If they did not draw, they recover 1 HP. If they drew and have the most hand cards, you may have them choose whether to use 1 [Kill] (no count restriction, no distance limit) against another character you designate.

skill_fortify_oneself.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置一张牌，然后获得场上一张装备牌。若你未因此获得其他角色的牌，你摸一张牌。
skill_fortify_oneself.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 1 card and take 1 Equipment card from the field. If you did not take another character's card, draw 1 card.

skill_exercise_authority.description_cn: 当你于回合内使用牌时，若你当前手牌数：大于X，你可以令此牌不能被响应；等于X，你可以对一名其他角色造成1点伤害；小于X，你可以摸两张牌，然后本回合此选项失效（X为你装备区里牌的数量且至少为1）。
skill_exercise_authority.description_en: When you Use a card during your turn, based on your current hand count vs X (X = cards in your Equipment Zone, min 1): greater → make that card unrespondable; equal → deal 1 damage to a character; less → draw 2 (then this option is disabled for the rest of the turn).

skill_sp_punish_the_wicked.description_cn: 当你使用锦囊牌仅指定其他角色为目标后，你可以弃置一名牌数不小于X的其他角色一张牌（X为你此阶段使用的牌数）。若此牌与你使用的锦囊牌颜色相同，你对其造成1点伤害。
skill_sp_punish_the_wicked.description_en: When you Use a Tool card targeting only other characters, you may discard 1 card from a character whose card count is ≥ X (X = cards you Used this phase). If that card matches the Tool's color, deal 1 damage to them.

skill_reckless_seizure.description_cn: 当一名角色受到非游戏牌造成的伤害后，若你为伤害来源或受伤角色，你可以摸一张牌，然后当前回合角色本回合非锁定技失效。
skill_reckless_seizure.description_en: When a character takes damage with no physical card as the source, if you are the source or the Wounded character, draw 1 card, then the current turn character's non-Locked skills are Nullified this turn.

skill_balance_power.description_cn: 出牌阶段或当你受到伤害后，你可以令一名其他角色摸或弃置X张牌（X为此技能本轮发动次数），然后若其手牌数与你不同或X大于3，你摸两张牌，此技能本回合失效。
skill_balance_power.description_en: During your Action Phase or after you take damage, have another character draw or discard X cards (X = times this skill has activated this round). If their hand count then differs from yours, or X > 3, draw 2 cards; this skill is Nullified for the rest of this turn.

skill_command_the_banner.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以选择一名其他吴势力角色，其下个出牌阶段开始时可以交给[12]你一张红色基本牌并发动一次X视为1的〖斡衡〗。
skill_command_the_banner.description_en: End Phase: Choose another Wu faction character. At the start of their next Action Phase, they may give you 1 red Basic card and activate 〖Balance Power〗 once with X treated as 1.

skill_shield_the_clan.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以令所有手牌数与你相同的角色各摸一张牌；若本回合有两次技能目标完全相同，此技能本回合生然后你回复1点体力。
skill_shield_the_clan.description_en: During your Action Phase, have all characters with the same hand count as you each draw 1 card. If this turn two skill activations had identical targets, this skill is Nullified this turn and you recover 1 HP.

skill_without_coercion.description_cn: 回合结束时，你可以与一名其他角色交换手牌，然后你展示手牌并将其中伤害类牌以任意顺序置于牌堆底。
skill_without_coercion.description_en: At the end of your turn, you may exchange hand cards with another character, then reveal your hand and place all damage-dealing cards at the bottom of the deck in any order.

skill_sp_remonstrate.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以观看一名其他角色的手牌，然后若其中有你可以使用的牌，你可以获得并使用其中一张。若此牌指定了其为目标，你与其各横置，然后其观看你的手牌。
skill_sp_remonstrate.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Look at another character's hand cards. If any can be Used by you, gain and Use 1 of them. If that card designates them as a target, you and they each enter the Chain State, then they look at your hand.

skill_hidden_counsel.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以令至多X名角色从你开始逆时针方向依次选择一项：1.移动场上一张牌；2.弃置所有手牌并摸两张牌；3.弃置装备区里的所有牌并回复1点体力。（X为你已损失的体力值）
skill_hidden_counsel.description_en: After you take damage, have up to X characters starting from you, going counter-clockwise, each choose one: 1. Move 1 field card; 2. Discard all hand and draw 2; 3. Discard all Equipment and recover 1 HP (X = your HP Lost).

skill_blunted_strike.description_cn: 当你使用伤害类牌时，你可令其中一名目标获得1枚 “钝”标记。有钝”标记的角色于其出牌阶段使用基本牌或锦囊牌指定唯一目标后，其移去1枚“钝”，令所有角色进行判定，然后将目标改为结果点数最大的角色(点数相同则由你选择)，若更改后的目标与原目标相同，则使用者失去1点体力并结束此阶段。
skill_blunted_strike.description_en: When you Use a damage-dealing card, you may give 1 target 1 「Blunted」 token. A character with a 「Blunted」 token, after Using a Basic or Tool card targeting only 1 character, removes the token — all characters perform a Judgment and the target changes to the character with the highest result rank (you choose on ties). If the new target is the same as the original, the user loses 1 HP and ends their Action Phase.

skill_counsel_the_state.description_cn: 出牌阶段每项限一次，你可以令一名角色:1.摸一张牌，然后弃置一半数量的手牌；2.弃一张牌，然后摸当前手牌数一半数量的牌(向上取整)。
skill_counsel_the_state.description_en: Once per option per Action Phase: Have a character: 1. Draw 1 card then discard half their hand (rounded down); 2. Discard 1 card then draw half their current hand count (rounded up).

skill_exploit_the_momentum.description_cn: 当你于回合内使用【杀】或锦囊牌指定一名其他角色为目标后，若此牌是你本回合使用的第X张牌(为你的手牌数)，你可对其中一名目标角色造成1点伤害。
skill_exploit_the_momentum.description_en: When you Use [Kill] or a Tool card targeting another character during your turn, if that card is the Xth card you Used this turn (X = your current hand count), you may deal 1 damage to 1 of its targets.

skill_pierce_to_the_bone.description_cn: 你可以将任意张牌置于牌堆底，视为使用一张需等量张【闪】抵消的【杀】。
skill_pierce_to_the_bone.description_en: Place any number of cards at the bottom of the deck and be treated as using 1 [Kill] that requires the same number of [Dodge] to cancel.

skill_wild_cry.description_cn: 锁定技，当你对其他角色造成伤害或受到其他角色的伤害时，若没有造成伤害的实体牌，此伤害+1，否则当前回合结束时，其将造成伤害的牌当【借刀杀人】或【过河拆桥】对你使用。
skill_wild_cry.description_en: Locked: When you deal damage to or take damage from another character, if there is no physical card as the source, that damage is +1; otherwise at the end of the current turn, they Use the card that caused the damage as [Proxy Attack] or [Dismantle] against you.

skill_settle_the_people.description_cn: 锁定技，每轮开始时，你获得至多等同于你体力值名其他多色各一张手牌。你失去点数最小的手牌后，你可以展示手牌将手牌摸至体力上限。
skill_settle_the_people.description_en: Locked: At the start of each round, take up to X hand cards from other characters of different factions (max 1 per faction, X = your HP Value). After you lose your lowest-rank hand card, reveal your hand and draw cards until you have your Max HP hand cards.

skill_refuse_counsel.description_cn: 主公技，出牌阶段限一次，你可令一名其他魏势力角色摸一张牌，若如此做，则本轮内其使用普通锦囊牌对你无效。
skill_refuse_counsel.description_en: Lord Skill: Once per Action Phase: Have another Wei faction character draw 1 card; if you do, their Non Time-Delay Tool cards have no effect on you this round.

skill_firm_standoff.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置你与一名其他角色共计三张牌。若有角色因此失去三张牌，其对另一名角色造成1点伤害
skill_firm_standoff.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard a total of 3 cards between you and another character. If any character loses 3 cards this way, they deal 1 damage to another character.

skill_clear_the_fields.description_cn: 当你的牌因弃置而进入弃牌堆，或当你受到伤害后，你的手牌上限+1。结束阶段，若你的手牌数小于手牌上限，你可以将手牌摸至手牌上限（至多摸五张），然后重置因此技能而增加的手牌上限数。
skill_clear_the_fields.description_en: When your cards are placed into the Discard Pile via discarding, or when you take damage, your Hand Limit increases by 1. End Phase: if your hand count is less than your Hand Limit, draw cards up to your Hand Limit (max 5 drawn), then reset the Hand Limit bonus gained via this skill.

skill_expansive_grace.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择一名其他角色，直到你下个回合开始前，其造成伤害时进行判定，若结果为:红色，受角色摸一张牌；黑色，此伤害。
skill_expansive_grace.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose another character — until the start of your next turn, when they deal damage, perform a Judgment: if Red, the Wounded character draws 1; if Black, that damage is reduced by 1.

skill_urge_enfeoffment.description_cn: 限定技，其他角色死亡后，你可以增加点体力上限并失去“弘仪”，然后回复1点体力并获得其武将牌上的所有技能；当你处于濒死状态时，你可以增加2点体力上限，然后回复4点体力
skill_urge_enfeoffment.description_en: Limited: After another character dies, you may increase your Max HP by 1, lose 〖Expansive Grace〗, recover 1 HP, and gain all skills from their General Card. When you enter the Verge of Death State, increase your Max HP by 2 and recover 4 HP.

skill_sp_loyal_service.description_cn: 每轮限一次，当一名角色因失去体力而进入濒死状态时，你可以令其回复1点体力并摸一张牌。
skill_sp_loyal_service.description_en: Once per round: When a character enters the Verge of Death State due to losing HP, you may have them recover 1 HP and draw 1 card.

skill_steadfast_guard.description_cn: 手牌数唯一最多的角色出牌阶段开始时，你可以失去1点体力并摸张牌。若其不为你，你观看其一半数量的手牌(向下取整)，然后你可以用至多张手牌替换其中等量的牌(为你已损失的体力值)。
skill_steadfast_guard.description_en: At the start of the Action Phase of the character with the sole most hand cards, you may lose 1 HP and draw X cards (X = your HP Lost). If that character is not you, look at half their hand (rounded down); you may then replace up to X of those cards with your hand cards.

skill_modest_and_yielding.description_cn: 锁定技，若你装备区里的牌均为黑色，你获得“帷幕”，红色，你获得“明哲”，否则出牌阶段开始时，你声明一种类别，本回合你使用该类别的牌无距离次数限制。
skill_modest_and_yielding.description_en: Locked: If all cards in your Equipment Zone are Black, gain 〖Iron Curtain〗. If all are Red, gain 〖Sagely Wisdom〗. Otherwise, at the start of your Action Phase, declare 1 card type — your cards of that type have no distance or count restriction this turn.

skill_value_frugality.description_cn: 锁定技，一名角色的结束阶段，若不大于你的体力值，你摸X张牌(X为你本回合失去过的牌数)
skill_value_frugality.description_en: Locked: At a character's End Phase, if their hand count is ≤ your HP Value, draw X cards (X = cards you lost this turn).

skill_sp_iron_curtain.description_cn: 锁定技，你不能成为黑色锦囊牌的目标。
skill_sp_iron_curtain.description_en: Locked: You cannot be the target of Black Tool cards.

skill_sp_sagely_wisdom.description_cn: 当你于回合外使用或打出红色牌时，或于回合外因弃置而失去一张红色牌后，你可以摸一张牌。
skill_sp_sagely_wisdom.description_en: When you Use or Play a red card outside your turn, or lose a red card via discarding outside your turn, you may draw 1 card.

skill_recruit_and_punish.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以令一名角色展示手牌，然后其依次将其中的【杀】交给由其下家开始的每名角色，然后其对最后一名角色造成点伤害(最后一名角色展示手牌，为其中【杀】的数量且至多为2)。
skill_recruit_and_punish.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Have a character reveal their hand, then they pass each [Kill] in order to each character starting from their Right Neighbor, then deal X damage to the last character (the last character reveals their hand; X = [Kill] count they passed, max 2).

skill_resolute_counsel.description_cn: 当与你距离为以内的角色受到伤害后，你可以选择一项:1.令其获得弃牌堆中的一张【杀】；2.令其将一张手牌交给另一名角色，然后其摸一张牌。
skill_resolute_counsel.description_en: When a character within distance X of you takes damage (X = your Max HP), choose one: 1. Have them gain 1 [Kill] from the Discard Pile; 2. Have them give 1 hand card to another character, then draw 1.

skill_brutal_excess.description_cn: 锁定技，准备阶段，你令你与一名其他角色各回复1点体力，然后视为对该角色依次使用【杀】、【决斗】与【火攻】。其每因此受到1点伤害，你摸两张牌。
skill_brutal_excess.description_en: Locked: Starting Phase: You and another character each recover 1 HP, then you are treated as using [Kill], [Duel], and [Incendiary] against them in sequence. For each 1 damage they take, you draw 2 cards.

skill_buddhist_teaching.description_cn: 锁定技，出牌阶段开始时，你将超出七张的手牌置于武将牌上。若此时你武将牌上有至少七张牌，其他角色依次选择一项：1.获得其中一张牌并令你回复1点体力：2.令你失去1点体力。
skill_buddhist_teaching.description_en: Locked: At the start of your Action Phase, place any hand cards over 7 on your character card. If ≥ 7 cards are on your character card, each other character chooses one: 1. Gain 1 of those cards and you recover 1 HP; 2. You lose 1 HP.

skill_lone_ferocity.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将所有手牌当一张无视防具的【杀】使用(至少一张)，若此【杀】造成伤害，你可以失去1点体力，然后将手牌摸至体力上限。
skill_lone_ferocity.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Use all hand cards (at least 1) as 1 [Kill] that ignores Armor. If it deals damage, you may lose 1 HP, then draw cards until you have your Max HP.

skill_defiant_rampage.description_cn: 锁定技，出牌阶段，若你对攻击范围内的角色造成伤害，此阶段你对其使用牌无次数限制。
skill_defiant_rampage.description_en: Locked: During your Action Phase, if you deal damage to a character within your Attack Range, you have no count restriction when using cards against them this phase.

skill_enforce_discipline.description_cn: 出牌阶段各限一次，你可以选择一项:1.将手牌摸至体力上限，若如此做，本回合你不能再对其他角色使用牌；2.将X张手牌交给一名其他角色(X为你的手牌数减体力值)。
skill_enforce_discipline.description_en: Once per option per Action Phase: 1. Draw cards until you have your Max HP; if you do, you cannot use cards targeting other characters this turn. 2. Give X hand cards to another character (X = your hand count minus your HP Value).

skill_self_restraint.description_cn: 锁定技，每回合好限一次，其他角色在其回合外获得手牌/回复体力后，你摸等量张牌/回复等量体力。
skill_self_restraint.description_en: Locked: Once per turn: After another character gains hand cards or recovers HP outside their turn, you draw the same number or recover the same amount.

skill_beneficent_aid.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以令一名角色摸两张牌或移动场上一张装备牌至其装备区内，然后若其手牌数大于等于存活人数，视为使用了一张【五谷丰登】(改为从该角色手牌中挑选)。
skill_beneficent_aid.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Have a character draw 2 cards or move 1 Equipment from the field into their zone. If their hand count is then ≥ the number of surviving players, be treated as using [Harvest] (drawing from their hand instead).

skill_shoot_from_afar.description_cn: 其他角色的准备阶段，若其装备区里有牌，你可以对其使用一张无距离限制且无视防具的【杀】。
skill_shoot_from_afar.description_en: During another character's Starting Phase, if they have cards in their Equipment Zone, you may Use 1 [Kill] against them with no distance restriction that ignores Armor.

skill_brocade_sail.description_cn: 弃牌阶段开始时，你可以将任意张手牌置于武将牌上，称为“铃”每种花色至多一张)，你可以将 “铃”当手牌使用或打出，若如此做，你摸一张牌。
skill_brocade_sail.description_en: At the start of your Discard Phase, you may place any hand cards on your character card as 「Bell」 tokens (max 1 per suit). You may Use or Play 「Bell」 tokens as hand cards; if you do, draw 1 card.

skill_slander_and_rebel.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将任意张手牌交给一名其他角色，然后其可以将至多等量的手牌当一张【决斗】使用，此牌造成伤害后，若其为受伤角色/伤害来源，你弃置所有手牌/其摸X张牌(为转化此【决斗】的牌数)。
skill_slander_and_rebel.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Give any number of hand cards to another character. They may Use up to that number of their own hand cards as 1 [Duel]. After that [Duel] deals damage: if they are the Wounded character, you discard all hand cards; if they are the source, they draw X cards (X = cards used to convert the [Duel]).

skill_conceal_and_lie.description_cn: 锁定技，一名角色结束阶段，你将手牌调整至三张。
skill_conceal_and_lie.description_en: Locked: At a character's End Phase, adjust your hand count to 3 (draw or discard as needed).

skill_heroic_advance.description_cn: 每轮各限一次，你/其他角色的出牌阶段开始时，你可以令当前回合角色摸X张牌（X为你已损失的体力值，至少为1且至多为3），然后本回合的弃牌阶段开始时，当前回合角色弃置所有非基本牌/基本牌。
skill_heroic_advance.description_en: Once per round per option: At the start of your or another character's Action Phase, have the current turn character draw X cards (X = your HP Lost, min 1, max 3). Then at the start of their Discard Phase this turn, they discard all non-Basic cards (Yang) or all Basic cards (Yin).

skill_pacify_the_frontier.description_cn: 锁定技，你的手牌上限等于你的体力上限。当牌不因使用进入弃牌堆时，你记录这些牌的花色，然后若你记录了四种花色且体力上限小于8，你清除记录的花色并加1点体力上限。
skill_pacify_the_frontier.description_en: Locked: Your Hand Limit equals your Max HP. When cards enter the Discard Pile via any means other than being Used, record their suits. When you have recorded all 4 suits and your Max HP < 8, clear the record and increase your Max HP by 1.

skill_brutal_assault.description_cn: 每轮各限一次，当至少两张基本牌/非基本牌一次性进入弃牌堆后，你可以减1点体力上限，将一张手牌当【决斗】/不计入次数且无次数限制的【杀】使用。
skill_brutal_assault.description_en: Once per round per option: When ≥ 2 Basic or ≥ 2 non-Basic cards enter the Discard Pile at once, you may reduce your Max HP by 1 and Use 1 hand card as [Duel] (Basic option) or as [Kill] with no count restriction (non-Basic option).

skill_cyclical_battle.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可将任意张牌当一张【决斗】使用(至多为5，且本回合张数不可重复)。若你以此法对唯一目标造成了伤害，你可摸X张牌，然后你本回合不能再对目标角色发动此技能(X为你本回合使用牌指定其为目标的次数)。
skill_cyclical_battle.description_en: During your Action Phase, Use any number of cards as 1 [Duel] (max 5, and the count used cannot repeat this turn). If you deal damage via this to the only target, draw X cards, then you cannot activate this skill against them again this turn (X = times you have targeted them this turn).

skill_decisive_strike.description_cn: 锁定技，当你于回合内首次使用所有手牌(仅包含手牌指定仅一名其他角色为目标时，令其弃置X张牌 (为本回合你使用牌指定其为目标的次数)。
skill_decisive_strike.description_en: Locked: The first time during your turn that you Use all your hand cards targeting only 1 other character, they discard X cards (X = times you targeted them this turn).

skill_breach_the_wall.description_cn: 游戏开始或回合开始时，若你的装备区里有【霹雳车】，你可以拜置一名其他角色的至多两张牌，若没有，将【霹雳车】置入你的装备区。
skill_breach_the_wall.description_en: Game start or turn start: if you have [Siege Engine] equipped, discard up to 2 cards from another character's zones. If you do not have [Siege Engine] equipped, place it into your Equipment Zone.

skill_craft_strategies.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将一张手牌当上一轮所有角色均未使用过的普通锦囊牌使用。
skill_craft_strategies.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Use 1 hand card as any Non Time-Delay Tool card that no character Used last round.

skill_watch_tower.description_cn: 锁定技，回合开始时，若你的装备区里有【大攻车】你执行一个额外的出牌阶段，若没有，将【大攻车】置入你的装备区。
skill_watch_tower.description_en: Locked: At the start of your turn, if you have [Great Siege Engine] equipped, perform an additional Action Phase. If not, place [Great Siege Engine] into your Equipment Zone.

skill_breach_the_fortification.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】造成伤害后，你可以修改【大攻车】 (每张【大攻车】至多修改五次)。
skill_breach_the_fortification.description_en: After your [Kill] deals damage, you may upgrade [Great Siege Engine] (max 5 upgrades per card).

skill_dismantle_the_engine.description_cn: 锁定技，当你失去装备区里的【大攻车】后，你摸X张牌(为此【大攻车】修改的次数)。
skill_dismantle_the_engine.description_en: Locked: When you lose [Great Siege Engine] from your Equipment Zone, draw X cards (X = upgrades on that card).

skill_conquer_the_south.description_cn: 当其他角色死亡后，你可以摸三张牌，然后你选择 “武圣”、“当先”、“制蛮”中未拥有的一个技能获得。
skill_conquer_the_south.description_en: When another character dies, draw 3 cards, then choose 1 skill you do not yet have from 〖Saint of War〗, 〖Lead the Charge〗, and 〖Suppress Tribes〗, and gain it.

skill_gather_the_fragrance.description_cn: 锁定技，你计算与其他角色的距离-X(X为存活的女性角色数)。
skill_gather_the_fragrance.description_en: Locked: Your distance to other characters is reduced by X (X = number of surviving Female characters).

skill_entrust_the_heir.description_cn: 一名角色死亡时，你可以令其选择其武将牌上的一个技能(限定技、觉醒技、主公技、隐匿技除外)，然后失去你上一次以此法获得的技能，获得此技能。
skill_entrust_the_heir.description_en: When a character dies, you may have them choose 1 skill from their General Card (excluding Limited, Awakening, and Lord skills). You lose the last skill you gained via this, then gain the chosen skill.

skill_usurp_authority.description_cn: 当你对一名其他角色造成伤害后，若其判定区没有牌，你可以将其一张牌置于其判定区。若此牌不是延时锦囊牌，则红色牌视为【乐不思蜀】，黑色牌视为【兵粮寸断】。结束阶段，若你本回合未造成过伤害，你可以摸一张牌。
skill_usurp_authority.description_en: After you deal damage to another character, if their Judgment Zone is empty, place 1 of their cards there. If it is not a Time-Delayed Tool, Red cards act as [Acedia] and Black cards act as [Starvation]. End Phase: if you dealt no damage this turn, draw 1 card.

skill_pepper_encounter.description_cn: 锁定技，每轮开始时，你进行次判定(X为你空置的装备栏数)，然后声明一种颜色并获得此颜色的判定牌。你的下个回合结束时，你执行一个额外的出牌阶段且你于此阶段内不能使用与声明颜色不同的牌，其他角色于此阶段内不能使用与你装备区里的牌颜色相同的牌直到有角色受到伤害时。
skill_pepper_encounter.description_en: Locked: Each round start, perform X Judgments (X = empty Equipment slots) and declare 1 color — gain the Judgment cards of that color. At the end of your next turn, perform an additional Action Phase where you cannot Use cards of the other color; other characters cannot Use cards matching the color of your equipped cards until someone takes damage.

skill_inner_instruction.description_cn: 锁定技，当其他角色于其回合内使用第一张非装备牌后，若此牌与“椒遇”声明颜色相同/不同，你交给/获得其一张牌，然后失去牌的角色摸一张牌。你以此法获得的牌不计入手牌上限直到你的回合结束。
skill_inner_instruction.description_en: Locked: When another character Uses their first non-Equipment card during their turn, if that card matches/does not match the color declared by 〖Pepper Encounter〗, you give them/gain from them 1 card; the character who lost a card draws 1. Cards you gain this way do not count toward your Hand Limit until the end of your turn.

skill_internal_war.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以摸两张牌或获得场上的一张牌，然后弃置一张牌。若弃置的牌:为基本牌，本回合你不能使用锦囊牌和装备牌且【杀】的使用次数+X且目标+1；为非基本牌，本回合你不能使用基本牌，且使用的普通锦囊牌的目标+1或-1，本回合前两次使用装备牌时摸张牌(X为手牌中因此技能不能使用的牌且至多为5)。
skill_internal_war.description_en: Action Phase start: draw 2 or take 1 field card, then discard 1. If Basic: cannot use Tool/Equipment this turn; [Kill] count +X and targets +1 (X = unusable hand cards, max 5). If non-Basic: cannot use Basic this turn; Non Time-Delay Tools +1 or −1 target; first 2 Equipment uses this turn draw X cards.

skill_ddz_confuse_and_disrupt.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择至多两名其他角色与你拼点，拼点牌亮出前，你可将拼点牌更改为任意点数；点数唯一最小者视为被其余角色各使用一张【杀】；点数唯一最大者摸等同于其体力值的牌，若你两者皆不符，此技能视为未发动过。
skill_ddz_confuse_and_disrupt.description_en: Once per Action Phase, you may choose up to two other characters to compete in a Point Duel with you. Before the dueling cards are revealed, you may change your card's rank to any rank. The character with the uniquely lowest rank is treated as receiving a [Kill] from each other participant. The character with the uniquely highest rank draws cards equal to their HP Value. If you qualify for neither condition, this skill is treated as not having been activated.

skill_ddz_lone_star.description_cn: 限定技，回合开始时，你可以亮出牌堆顶的九张牌并依次执行项（X为当前轮数）：1.获得其中任意张牌名相同的牌；2.获得其中任意张花色相同的牌；3.获得其中任意张类别相同的牌。
skill_ddz_lone_star.description_en: Limited: At the start of your turn, you may flip the top nine cards of the Draw Pile and execute the following steps in sequence (X equals the current round number): 1. Gain any cards among them that share the same name; 2. Gain any cards among them that share the same suit; 3. Gain any cards among them that share the same category.

skill_ddz_admire_the_valiant.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以重铸任意张牌，视为使用一张【决斗】。若如此做，此【决斗】结算过程中限次（X为你以此法重铸的牌数），你或目标角色可以弃置区域中的一张牌，视为打出一张普通【杀】。
skill_ddz_admire_the_valiant.description_en: Once per Action Phase, you may Reforge any number of cards to be treated as using a [Duel]. If you do, during this [Duel]'s resolution, up to X times (X equals the number of cards Reforged), you or the target character may discard one card from any zone to be treated as playing a normal [Kill].

skill_ddz_discourse_on_heroes.description_cn: 当你造成或受到伤害后，你可以展示手牌并弃置点数唯一最大的手牌，然后你摸三张牌且你本局游戏以此法弃置牌的点数须大于此牌。
skill_ddz_discourse_on_heroes.description_en: After you deal or receive damage, you may reveal your hand and discard the hand card with the uniquely highest rank, then draw 3 cards. Each card discarded this way for the rest of the game must have a rank higher than the previously discarded card.

skill_ddz_honed_together_admire_the_vali.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，你令本局「钦英」减少X个可用于弃置的类别的牌（X为全场友武将数）。
skill_ddz_honed_together_admire_the_vali.description_en: Locked: At the start of the game, [Admire the Valiant] loses X card categories that can be used as discards, where X equals the number of allied generals on the field.

skill_ddz_catch_the_pig.description_cn: 当一名角色使用【杀】结算结束后，若你与其距离以内，你将之置于你的武将牌上，称为「缚家」。你可以移去任意张「缚家」，摸等量的牌并视为使用一张【杀】，然后选择等量项：1.额外选择一名角色为目标；2.此牌对其中一名目标角色造成的伤害-1；3.此牌对其中一名目标角色造成的伤害+1。若此牌的目标和你选择的选项均相邻，则此【杀】不计入次数。
skill_ddz_catch_the_pig.description_en: After a character uses [Kill] and it finishes resolving, if that character is within a certain distance of you, place that [Kill] card on your General Card as a 「Bound Pig」 token. You may remove any number of 「Bound Pig」 tokens to draw that many cards and be treated as using a [Kill], then choose the same number of options: 1. Designate one additional target; 2. This [Kill] deals 1 less damage to one target; 3. This [Kill] deals 1 more damage to one target. If all targets and all chosen options are adjacent to each other, this [Kill] does not count toward your frequency limit.

skill_ddz_gracious_host.description_cn: 转换技，①农民回合结束后，你可以令地主执行一个额外回合；②农民回合结束后，其可以执行一个额外回合。
skill_ddz_gracious_host.description_en: Convert Skill: Yang — After a Peasant's turn ends, you may have the Landlord take an extra turn. Yin — After a Peasant's turn ends, that Peasant may take an extra turn.

skill_ddz_riding_the_flow.description_cn: 当你使用点数唯一最小的手牌时，若此牌的花色为红桃且点数大于X（X为你本回合发动此技能的次数），你可以展示手牌并将此花色的所有手牌置于武将牌上直至当前回合结束，然后你摸一张牌。
skill_ddz_riding_the_flow.description_en: When you use the hand card with the uniquely lowest rank, if that card is Hearts and its rank is greater than X (X equals the number of times you have activated this skill this turn), you may reveal your hand and place all Hearts hand cards on your General Card until the end of your current turn, then draw 1 card.

skill_ddz_demote.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以展示牌并弃置一张点数唯一最大的手牌，然后选择一名其他角色，令其展示手牌并弃置所有点数大于等于此牌的手牌。若其未因此弃置牌，重置此技能。
skill_ddz_demote.description_en: Once per Action Phase, you may reveal your hand and discard the hand card with the uniquely highest rank, then choose another character — that character reveals their hand and discards all hand cards whose rank is greater than or equal to the discarded card's rank. If that character does not discard any cards this way, Reset this skill.

skill_ddz_honed_together_riding_the_flow.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，你令本局「顺逸」添加X个可触发的花色（X为全场友武将数）。
skill_ddz_honed_together_riding_the_flow.description_en: Locked: At the start of the game, [Riding the Flow] gains X additional suits that can trigger it, where X equals the number of allied generals on the field.

skill_ddz_ornamental_fist.description_cn: 锁定技，你使用黑色牌指定其他角色为目标后，为此牌秘密选择一个效果：1.重拳，造成的伤害+1；2.轻拳，使用后你摸一张牌。然后你以外的目标角色依次猜测你选择的效果。
skill_ddz_ornamental_fist.description_en: Locked: After you use a black card and designate another character as a target, secretly choose one effect for that card: 1. Heavy Blow — damage dealt is increased by 1; 2. Light Blow — after resolving, draw 1 card. The target characters other than you then guess in sequence which effect you chose.

skill_ddz_triple_strike.description_cn: 锁定技，其他角色受到你的伤害后或猜错「花拳」的效果后，获得1枚「击倒」标记。一名角色获得至少3枚「击倒」标记后移除此标记并进入「击倒」状态。「击倒」状态的角色始终跳过出牌阶段。若角色于「击倒」状态，当有十张牌离开牌堆或进入弃牌堆后，其脱离「击倒」状态。
skill_ddz_triple_strike.description_en: Locked: After another character receives damage from you, or after a character guesses [Ornamental Fist]'s effect incorrectly, that character gains 1 「Knocked Down」 token. Once a character has 3 or more 「Knocked Down」 tokens, remove all tokens and that character enters the 「Knocked Down」 state. A character in the 「Knocked Down」 state always skips their Action Phase. A character exits the 「Knocked Down」 state after ten cards leave the Draw Pile or enter the Discard Pile.

skill_ddz_twin_jade.description_cn: 锁定技，你本局游戏首次使用【杀】/【闪】/【桃】/【酒】时，此牌伤害或回复值+1且不计入次数限制，结算后，你获得此牌。
skill_ddz_twin_jade.description_en: Locked: The first time you use [Kill], [Dodge], [Peach], or [Wine] in this game, that card's damage or HP recovery value is increased by 1 and does not count toward your frequency limit. After it resolves, you gain that card.

skill_ddz_sweep_all_before.description_cn: 你使用牌指定其他角色为唯一目标后，或成为其他角色使用牌的唯一目标后，你可以弃置使用者一张牌，令此牌伤害或回复值+1。然后若使用者的手牌最多或最少，你摸一张牌且此技能本回合失效。
skill_ddz_sweep_all_before.description_en: After you designate another character as the sole target of a card you use, or after you become the sole target of a card another character uses, you may discard one card from the User's zone — that card's damage or HP recovery value is increased by 1. If the User has the most or fewest hand cards on the field, you then draw 1 card and this skill cannot activate again this turn.

skill_ddz_twin_jade_discs.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择一项：1.摸X张牌，本回合手牌上限+X；2.弃置至多X张牌，分配并造成等量火焰伤害；3.视为使用X张火【杀】或【火攻】（X为存活角色数）。
skill_ddz_twin_jade_discs.description_en: Once per Action Phase, choose one: 1. Draw X cards and increase your Hand Limit by X this turn; 2. Discard up to X cards and distribute equal fire damage among characters; 3. Be treated as using X fire [Kill]s or [Incendiary]s (X equals the number of surviving characters).

skill_ddz_draw_the_blade.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，你将游戏外的【赤血青锋】置入手牌。【赤血青锋】因弃置进入弃牌堆后，你失去1点体力并获得之。你的手牌被其他角色获得后，若你手牌中有【赤血青锋】，你展示之并对其造成1点伤害；若其获得了【赤血青锋】，其展示之并对你造成1点伤害。
skill_ddz_draw_the_blade.description_en: Locked: At the start of the game, take [Crimson Edge] from outside the game into your hand. When [Crimson Edge] enters the Discard Pile via discarding, you lose 1 HP then regain it. After another character gains cards from your hand: if [Crimson Edge] remains in your hand, reveal it and deal 1 damage to that character; if they gained [Crimson Edge], they reveal it and deal 1 damage to you.

skill_ddz_prisoner_s_burden.description_cn: 你使用【杀】结算后，你可以交给一名目标角色一张手牌，然后获得其至多两张手牌。体力值小于你的角色使用【杀】结算后，若你为此【杀】目标，其可以交给你一张手牌，然后获得你至多两张手牌。
skill_ddz_prisoner_s_burden.description_en: After your [Kill] finishes resolving, you may give one hand card to a target of that [Kill], then gain up to two of their hand cards. After a character with fewer HP than you uses [Kill] and it finishes resolving, if you are a target of that [Kill], they may give you one hand card, then gain up to two of your hand cards.

skill_ddz_halting_speech.description_cn: 转换技，锁定技，你使用非装备牌时，①须弃置一张同类别牌令此牌额外结算一次，否则此牌无效；②此牌无次数限制。
skill_ddz_halting_speech.description_en: Convert Locked Skill: Yang — When you use a non-equipment card, you must discard a card of the same category to have it resolve an additional time; otherwise that card is Nullified. Yin — Cards you use have no frequency limit.

skill_ddz_hidden_radiance.description_cn: 限定技，回合开始时，你可以摸X张牌，视为使用一张【杀】并依次执行等量项：1.此【杀】目标数+1；2.此【杀】伤害+1；3.此【杀】不可被响应（X为当前轮数）。
skill_ddz_hidden_radiance.description_en: Limited: At the start of your turn, you may draw X cards (X equals the current round number), then be treated as using a [Kill] and execute X of the following in sequence: 1. This [Kill] may target 1 additional character; 2. This [Kill]'s damage is increased by 1; 3. This [Kill] cannot be responded to.

skill_ddz_soar.description_cn: 判定阶段开始时，若你的判定区有牌，你可以弃置两张手牌并弃置自己判定区的一张牌。每回合限一次。
skill_ddz_soar.description_en: At the start of your Judgment Phase, if you have cards in your Judgment Zone, you may discard 2 hand cards and discard one card from your own Judgment Zone. Once per turn.

skill_ddz_domineering.description_cn: 锁定技，准备阶段开始时，你摸一张牌，你使用【杀】的次数上限+1。
skill_ddz_domineering.description_en: Locked: At the start of your Starting Phase, draw 1 card and increase your [Kill] frequency limit by 1.

skill_resonance.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当你使用伤害牌时，你可以选择一项：1. 摸X张牌（X为你的体力上限）；2. 令此牌伤害+1，若此牌造成伤害，你获得之。
skill_resonance.description_en: Once per turn: When you use a damage card, choose one: 1. Draw X cards (X = your Max HP); 2. That card's damage is increased by 1 — if it deals damage, you gain that card.

skill_exhausting_drive.description_cn: 锁定技，回合结束时，若你本回合摸牌数和造成的伤害值均不小于你的体力上限，你失去1点体力。
skill_exhausting_drive.description_en: Locked: At the end of your turn, if both the number of cards you drew and the total damage you dealt this turn are each no less than your Max HP, you lose 1 HP.

skill_mortal_resolve.description_cn: 觉醒技，当你进入濒死状态时，你将体力回复至1点，加1点体力上限，然后获得〖困励〗并将〖铿锵〗描述中的「每回合限一次」改为「每回合每项限一次」。
skill_mortal_resolve.description_en: Awakening: When you enter the Verge of Death State, recover your HP to 1, increase your Max HP by 1, then gain 〖Unyielding Drive〗 and change 〖Resonance〗's restriction from "once per turn" to "once per option per turn".

skill_unyielding_drive.description_cn: 觉醒技，当你进入濒死状态时，你将体力回复至2点，加1点体力上限，然后失去〖匮饬〗。
skill_unyielding_drive.description_en: Awakening: When you enter the Verge of Death State, recover your HP to 2, increase your Max HP by 1, then lose 〖Exhausting Drive〗.

skill_sun_the_steeds.description_cn: 锁定技，你计算与其他角色的距离-X（X为场上的坐骑牌数且至少为1）。
skill_sun_the_steeds.description_en: Locked: When you calculate the distance to another character, subtract X (X = the number of Mount Cards currently equipped on the field; minimum 1).

skill_fuse_the_trail.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以亮出牌堆顶的X张牌（X为你距离1以内的角色数），获得其中的红色牌，并将其中任意张黑色牌置于等量名连续其他角色的武将牌上。当有「硝引」牌的角色受到伤害时，若为：火焰伤害，伤害来源可以弃置一张与「硝引」牌类型相同的牌并移去一张此类型的「硝引」牌，令此伤害+1；非火焰伤害，伤害来源可以获得一张「硝引」牌并将此伤害改为火焰伤害。
skill_fuse_the_trail.description_en: Starting Phase: You may flip the top X cards of the Draw Pile (X = number of characters within distance 1 of you), gain all red cards among them, and place any number of black cards face-up on the General Cards of an equal number of consecutive other characters as 「Fuse」 tokens. When a character with 「Fuse」 tokens receives damage: if it is fire damage, the damage source may discard a card of the same category as a 「Fuse」 token and remove one such token to increase that damage by 1; if it is not fire damage, the damage source may gain one 「Fuse」 token and change that damage to fire damage.

skill_fireworks.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将一张红色手牌当无次数限制的火【杀】使用；若目标角色有「硝引」牌，此【杀】可以改为指定所有有「硝引」牌的角色为目标。
skill_fireworks.description_en: Once per Action Phase, you may use a red hand card as a fire [Kill] with no frequency limit. If the target character has 「Fuse」 tokens, this [Kill] may instead target all characters who have 「Fuse」 tokens.

skill_lingering_note.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当一名角色于其回合外使用的【杀】进入弃牌堆后，你可以令除使用者以外的一名角色获得此【杀】，且此牌无次数限制。
skill_lingering_note.description_en: Once per turn: When a [Kill] used by a character outside their own turn enters the Discard Pile, you may have one character other than the User gain that [Kill]; that card has no frequency limit.

skill_delayed_step.description_cn: 一名角色的出牌阶段结束时，你可以摸X张牌（X为本阶段进入弃牌堆的【杀】的数量），然后你可以使用一张此次摸牌中的【杀】。
skill_delayed_step.description_en: At the end of a character's Action Phase, you may draw X cards (X = the number of [Kill] cards that entered the Discard Pile during that phase), then you may use one [Kill] from among the cards you just drew.

skill_fierce_gallop.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以摸至多X张牌（X为游戏人数，至多为5），然后选择一名其他角色，若你的手牌数：大于其，其本回合视为在你的攻击范围内且不能响应你使用的牌；等于其，你获得其一张牌且本回合下次对其造成的伤害+1；小于其，你失去2点体力并对其造成X点伤害，然后此技能改为「出牌阶段限两次」且「选择至多三名其他角色」直到回合结束。
skill_fierce_gallop.description_en: Once per Action Phase, you may draw up to X cards (X = number of players, max 5), then choose another character. If your hand card count is: greater than theirs — they are treated as being within your Attack Range this turn and cannot respond to cards you use; equal to theirs — gain one of their cards and the next damage you deal to them this turn is increased by 1; less than theirs — lose 2 HP and deal X damage to them, then this skill changes to "twice per Action Phase" and "choose up to three other characters" until the end of your turn.

skill_benevolent_valley.description_cn: 其他蜀势力角色出牌阶段限一次，其可以弃置一张基本牌并令你回复1点体力，然后你可以令其发动一次摸至多两张牌的〖烈骧〗。
skill_benevolent_valley.description_en: Once per Action Phase for other Shu faction characters: they may discard a Basic Card to restore 1 HP to you, then you may have them activate 〖Fierce Gallop〗 to draw up to 2 cards.

skill_commandeer.description_cn: 锁定技，准备阶段，你选择一名角色并选择一个区域，若其此区域里有装备牌，你获得其此区域里的所有牌。
skill_commandeer.description_en: Locked: During your Starting Phase, choose one character and one of their zones. If that zone contains Equipment Cards, you gain all cards in that zone.

skill_reconfigure.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以移去所有「器」并摸等量的牌（无则跳过），然后可以将任意张装备牌置于武将牌上，称为「器」。你拥有所有「器」的效果。
skill_reconfigure.description_en: Once per Action Phase, you may remove all 「Implement」 tokens and draw that many cards (skip if none), then place any number of Equipment Cards from your hand face-up on your General Card as 「Implement」 tokens. You gain the effects of all 「Implement」 tokens.

skill_swaying_dance.description_cn: 出牌阶段每种花色限一次，若你本阶段未对其他角色造成过伤害，你可以将一张手牌当一张有相同花色对应实体牌的伤害牌使用。
skill_swaying_dance.description_en: Once per suit per Action Phase: If you have not dealt damage to another character this phase, you may use a hand card as any damage card that has a corresponding physical card of the same suit.

skill_silk_blade.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当你造成伤害后，你可以进行判定，若结果为：红色，你可以令一名角色回复1点体力，然后若其未受伤，其摸一张牌；黑色，你对受伤角色的上家或下家造成1点伤害，若其未因此进入濒死状态，你可以再次进行判定并执行对应效果。
skill_silk_blade.description_en: Once per turn: After you deal damage, you may perform a Judgment. If the result is red, you may have a character recover 1 HP — if they are Unwounded, they draw 1 card. If the result is black, deal 1 damage to the Left or Right Neighbor of the damaged character — if they do not enter the Verge of Death State from this, you may perform another Judgment and apply the corresponding effect.

skill_xin_loyal_discernment.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择一名角色并选择一项直到你的下个回合开始：1. 该角色下次造成伤害后弃置两张牌，你摸一张牌；2. 该角色下次受到伤害后摸两张牌，你摸一张牌。
skill_xin_loyal_discernment.description_en: Once per Action Phase, choose a character and one option, lasting until the start of your next turn: 1. The next time that character deals damage, they discard 2 cards and you draw 1 card; 2. The next time that character receives damage, they draw 2 cards and you draw 1 card.

skill_xin_gifted_insight.description_cn: 摸牌阶段结束时，若你本阶段摸的牌：花色相同，本回合〖忠鉴〗的发动次数+1（不能选择相同的角色）；花色不同，你可以回复1点体力，然后本回合不能对自己使用牌。
skill_xin_gifted_insight.description_en: At the end of your Draw Phase, if the cards you drew this phase all share the same suit, 〖Loyal Discernment〗's activation limit increases by 1 this turn (the same character cannot be chosen again). If they have different suits, you may recover 1 HP, then you cannot use cards on yourself this turn.

skill_graceful_cicada.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择一名角色，令其摸X张牌（X为你与其的距离且至多为3），然后其可以使用一张无距离和次数限制的基本牌或普通锦囊牌（此牌目标的相邻角色也成为此牌目标）。
skill_graceful_cicada.description_en: Once per Action Phase, choose a character — they draw X cards (X = distance between you and them, max 3). They may then use one Basic Card or Non Time-Delay Tool Card with no distance or frequency restriction (the Left and Right Neighbors of that card's targets also become targets).

skill_crimson_lip.description_cn: 当你成为基本牌或普通锦囊牌的目标后，若你不为此牌唯一目标，你可以进行判定，若结果为：红色，你摸三张牌；黑色，你可以弃置一名其他角色的至多两张牌。
skill_crimson_lip.description_en: After you become the target of a Basic Card or Non Time-Delay Tool Card, if you are not the only target, you may perform a Judgment. If the result is red, draw 3 cards. If black, you may discard up to 2 cards from one other character's zone.

skill_rosy_tears.description_cn: 当你的红色牌进入弃牌堆后，你可以观看牌堆顶的三张牌，获得其中一张并可以将其他牌置于牌堆底，然后你本回合以此法观看的牌数-1。
skill_rosy_tears.description_en: After one of your red cards enters the Discard Pile, you may look at the top 3 cards of the Draw Pile, gain one of them and place the remaining cards at the bottom of the Draw Pile. Then, reduce by 1 the number of cards you may look at this way this turn.

skill_hidden_weave.description_cn: 出牌阶段，或当你受到伤害后，你可以进行一次判定，若结果为：红色，重置〖霞泪〗的观看牌数；黑色，你可以令一名非当前回合角色获得本回合进入弃牌堆的两张牌，然后本回合此技能失效。
skill_hidden_weave.description_en: During your Action Phase, or after you receive damage, you may perform a Judgment. If the result is red, reset 〖Rosy Tears〗's remaining look count for this turn. If black, you may have one character who is not the current turn's character gain 2 cards that entered the Discard Pile this turn, then this skill cannot activate again this turn.

skill_geomancy.description_cn: 当一名角色进行判定时或你受到伤害后，你可以观看牌堆顶与牌堆底的各一张牌，然后可以获得其中任意张牌且可以将其余牌以任意顺序置于牌堆顶。若你因此获得牌，本局游戏【闪电】对你生效的范围增加获得牌的花色点数。
skill_geomancy.description_en: When a character performs a Judgment, or after you receive damage, you may look at both the top and bottom card of the Draw Pile. You may gain any of those cards and place the remainder on top of the Draw Pile in any order. If you gain any cards this way, the trigger range of [Lightning] against you is permanently expanded by the suit and rank of each card gained.

skill_curse_of_exile.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，你将牌堆中的一张【闪电】置入判定区。每回合结束时，若弃牌堆中有【闪电】，你将其中一张置入判定区。
skill_curse_of_exile.description_en: Locked: At the start of the game, take one [Lightning] from the Draw Pile and place it into your Judgment Zone. At the end of each turn, if any [Lightning] cards are in the Discard Pile, place one of them into your Judgment Zone.

skill_painted_verse.description_cn: 每种牌名每回合限一次，你可以将两张手牌当任意一张基本牌或普通锦囊牌使用，若两张手牌的花色组合为本回合首次使用，你摸一张牌。
skill_painted_verse.description_en: Once per card name per turn: You may use two hand cards as any one Basic Card or Non Time-Delay Tool Card. If the suit combination of those two hand cards has not been used this way this turn, draw 1 card.

skill_tomb_portrait.description_cn: 每轮限一次，其他角色回合结束时，你可以依次使用与其于出牌阶段内使用的牌名相同的非装备牌（改为由其使用），若此牌与其使用时有相同的目标，你摸X张牌（X为相同的目标数）。
skill_tomb_portrait.description_en: Once per round: At the end of another character's turn, you may use in sequence the same non-Equipment Cards (by name) as those they used during their Action Phase — treated as used by them. For each such card that shares a target with the original use, draw X cards (X = the number of shared targets).

skill_palace_map.description_cn: 游戏开始时，你可以依次选择两种类别。当连续两张被使用的牌的类别与你选择类别的顺序相同时，你可以从牌堆中获得两张你选择的不同点数的牌。
skill_palace_map.description_en: At the start of the game, you may choose two card categories in sequence. Whenever two consecutively used cards match your chosen categories in order, you may take 2 cards of different ranks from the Draw Pile based on your chosen categories.

skill_lay_the_foundation.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将任意张牌置于武将牌上，称为「基」，然后令一名其他角色弃置所有与这些牌点数相同的牌。若有点数重复的「基」，你移去所有点数重复的「基」并摸等量的牌；若「基」中包含所有点数，你可以将所有「基」交给一名角色并令其回复体力至体力上限。
skill_lay_the_foundation.description_en: Once per Action Phase, you may place any number of cards from your hand face-up on your General Card as 「Foundation」 tokens, then have one other character discard all their cards whose ranks match any of those tokens. If any 「Foundation」 tokens share the same rank, remove all duplicates and draw that many cards. If the 「Foundation」 tokens collectively contain all 13 ranks, you may give all of them to one character and have that character recover HP up to their Max HP.

skill_ornate_garb.description_cn: 游戏开始时，你将牌堆中每种颜色各一张牌置入装备区。若你的装备区里有两种颜色的牌，你使用牌无距离限制。当你使用一张牌结算结束后，你可以将一张与之相同花色的非装备手牌置入装备区（替换原装备，且以此法置入装备区的牌将于离开你的装备区时置入弃牌堆）。当你的手牌数小于X时，你将手牌摸至X张（X为你装备区里牌的花色数）。
skill_ornate_garb.description_en: At the start of the game, place one card of each color from the Draw Pile into your Equipment Zone. If your Equipment Zone contains cards of both colors, you may use cards without distance restrictions. After a card you use finishes resolving, you may place a non-Equipment hand card of the same suit into your Equipment Zone (replacing the existing equipment; cards placed this way are placed into the Discard Pile when they leave your Equipment Zone). When your hand card count falls below X, draw up to X cards (X = the number of different suits among cards in your Equipment Zone).

skill_exceed_protocol.description_cn: 锁定技，当你成为【杀】的目标时，你须选择一项：1. 弃置一张装备区里的牌视为使用【闪】并失去此选项直到你的回合开始；2. 此【杀】伤害+1。
skill_exceed_protocol.description_en: Locked: When you become the target of a [Kill], you must choose one: 1. Discard one card from your Equipment Zone to be treated as using [Dodge] — you lose this option until the start of your turn; 2. That [Kill]'s damage is increased by 1.

skill_level_ground.description_cn: 游戏开始时或回合开始时，若你的装备区没有【霹雳车】，你可将其从牌堆置于装备区（顶替原装备）并摸一张牌；若你的装备区有【霹雳车】，你可移动之或视为使用一张【杀】。
skill_level_ground.description_en: At the start of the game or at the start of your turn: if your Equipment Zone does not have [Catapult], you may place one from the Draw Pile into your Equipment Zone (replacing the existing weapon) and draw 1 card. If your Equipment Zone already has [Catapult], you may move it to another character's Equipment Zone or be treated as using a [Kill].

skill_anticipate_intent.description_cn: 当前回合角色本回合首次对你使用牌时，你可以选择一项：1. 摸一张牌；2. 令此牌对你无效。然后你不能再对其发动此技能。
skill_anticipate_intent.description_en: When the current turn's character uses a card targeting you for the first time this turn, you may choose one: 1. Draw 1 card; 2. Have that card be Nullified against you. You may not activate this skill against that character again this turn.

skill_counsel_and_establish.description_cn: 出牌阶段限两次，你可以交给一名其他角色至多两张牌并令其可以使用一张手牌，若其未造成伤害，其对你造成1点伤害。
skill_counsel_and_establish.description_en: Twice per Action Phase, you may give up to 2 cards to another character and have them use one hand card. If they do not deal damage, they deal 1 damage to you.

skill_pure_governance.description_cn: 每回合每项限一次，当你的体力、手牌或装备区里的牌发生变化后，若对应的数值为1，你可以选择一项：1. 摸X张牌；2. 回复X点体力；3. 将牌堆中的X张装备牌置入装备区。若X为3，此技能视为未发动过且你使用当前手牌无次数限制。（X为你满足的条件数：体力值/手牌数/装备区里的牌数为1）
skill_pure_governance.description_en: Once per option per turn: After your HP, hand card count, or Equipment Zone card count changes, if the corresponding value is now 1, you may choose one: 1. Draw X cards; 2. Recover X HP; 3. Place X Equipment Cards from the Draw Pile into your Equipment Zone. If X equals 3, this skill is treated as not having been activated and you may use your current hand cards without frequency restrictions. (X = the number of conditions met: HP Value / hand card count / Equipment Zone card count equals 1)

skill_keen_insight.description_cn: 一名角色的结束阶段，若该角色为你，或本回合有角色进入过濒死状态，你可以观看牌堆顶的三张牌，然后你可以使用其中一张牌，最后随机获得剩余牌的其中一张。
skill_keen_insight.description_en: During a character's End Phase, if that character is you or any character entered the Verge of Death State this turn, you may look at the top 3 cards of the Draw Pile, use one of them, then randomly gain one of the remaining cards.

skill_shrewd_scheme.description_cn: 每回合各限一次，当你受到伤害后，你可以令一名其他角色的所有非锁定技失效直到回合结束；当你造成伤害后，你可以弃置一张牌并回复1点体力。
skill_shrewd_scheme.description_en: Once per trigger per turn: After you receive damage, you may Nullify all non-Locked skills of one other character until the end of the turn. After you deal damage, you may discard 1 card and recover 1 HP.

skill_sovereign_heart.description_cn: 限定技，当一名角色进入濒死状态时，你可以令其回复体力至与你体力值相同。若该角色为你，则回复至1点。
skill_sovereign_heart.description_en: Limited: When a character enters the Verge of Death State, you may have them recover HP equal to your current HP Value. If that character is you, recover to 1 HP instead.

skill_kindred_spirit.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时或结束时，你可以将至多体力上限张牌置于武将牌上，称为「翼」。「翼」被移去后，你将手牌调整至「翼」花色数的两倍张。
skill_kindred_spirit.description_en: At the start or end of your Action Phase, you may place up to your Max HP number of cards from your hand face-up on your General Card as 「Wing」 tokens. When 「Wing」 tokens are removed, adjust your hand card count to twice the number of different suits among the removed 「Wing」 tokens.

skill_know_or_not.description_cn: 每回合每项限一次，当你使用牌结算结束后，你可以移去至少X张「翼」（X为此技能本回合发动次数）并令一名角色执行一项：1. 将一张牌置为「翼」；2. 弃置两张牌；3. 失去1点体力。
skill_know_or_not.description_en: Once per option per turn: After a card you use finishes resolving, you may remove at least X 「Wing」 tokens (X = the number of times this skill has been activated this turn) and have one character choose one: 1. Place 1 card as a 「Wing」 token; 2. Discard 2 cards; 3. Lose 1 HP.

skill_jade_hero.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以移动场上的一张牌，然后弃置一张与此牌花色相同的手牌（若没有则展示所有手牌）。
skill_jade_hero.description_en: Once per Action Phase, you may move one card on the field, then discard one hand card of the same suit as the moved card (if you have none, reveal all your hand cards instead).

skill_warm_favor.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以选择一名角色，该角色可以视为使用X张基本牌（X为其装备区牌数且至少为1）。若其以此法使用了同名牌，其弃置装备区内的所有牌。
skill_warm_favor.description_en: During your End Phase, you may choose a character — they may be treated as using X Basic Cards (X = the number of cards in their Equipment Zone, minimum 1). If they use cards with the same name this way, they discard all cards in their Equipment Zone.

skill_spring_offering.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以展示一张牌，然后选择一项：1. 将此牌交给一名手牌数小于你的角色，然后你摸X张牌；2. 弃置此牌，然后弃置一名手牌数大于你的角色区域内至多X张牌（X为此牌牌名字数）。
skill_spring_offering.description_en: Once per Action Phase, you may reveal one card, then choose one: 1. Give this card to a character whose hand card count is less than yours, then draw X cards; 2. Discard this card, then discard up to X cards from one character's zone whose hand card count is greater than yours (X = the number of characters in this card's name).

skill_winter_bloom.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以展示牌堆中第一张装备牌，然后令一名手牌数等于你的角色使用之。
skill_winter_bloom.description_en: During your Starting Phase, you may reveal the first Equipment Card in the Draw Pile, then have one character whose hand card count equals yours use it.

skill_painted_face.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置任意张牌，然后你连续摸牌直到手牌中至少拥有与弃置牌花色数相同的花色数。
skill_painted_face.description_en: Once per Action Phase, you may discard any number of cards, then continuously draw cards until your hand contains at least as many different suits as the number of different suits among the discarded cards.

skill_splendid_attire.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以进行判定，根据判定结果获得对应效果直到你的回合开始：红色，每个回合结束时，你摸一张牌；黑色，当你受到伤害后，你摸两张牌。
skill_splendid_attire.description_en: During your End Phase, you may perform a Judgment. The result grants you an effect lasting until the start of your next turn: red — at the end of each turn, draw 1 card; black — after you receive damage, draw 2 cards.

skill_mourning_vigil.description_cn: 每回合限两次，当一名角色受到伤害后，若你与其距离小于等于[0]，你可以观看牌堆顶的[3]张牌，将其中至多[1]张交给受伤的角色，然后你获得其余至多[1]张并将剩余的牌放回牌堆顶。
skill_mourning_vigil.description_en: Twice per turn: After a character receives damage, if the distance between you and them is at most [0], you may look at the top [3] cards of the Draw Pile, give up to [1] of them to the damaged character, then gain up to [1] of the remainder and place any leftover cards back on top of the Draw Pile.

skill_self_preservation_vigil.description_cn: 当一名角色死亡时，你可以令「隅」中的一个数字+2（单项不能超过5），然后若你没有对死亡角色造成过伤害，你回复1点体力。
skill_self_preservation_vigil.description_en: When a character dies, you may increase one of 〖Mourning Vigil〗's values by 2 (no single value may exceed 5). If you did not deal damage to the dying character, recover 1 HP.

skill_tranquil_grace_vigil.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以令「隅」中的一个数字+1，若你未受伤，你再令「隅」中的一个数字+1（单项不能超过5）。
skill_tranquil_grace_vigil.description_en: During your Starting Phase, you may increase one of 〖Mourning Vigil〗's values by 1. If you are Unwounded, you may increase one of 〖Mourning Vigil〗's values by another 1 (no single value may exceed 5).

skill_colorful_wings.description_cn: 转换技，结束阶段，你可以令一名角色选择一项执行并于执行后移除该选项：阳：1. 回复1点体力；2. 摸X张牌；3. 复原武将牌；4. 随机执行一个已移除的阳选项；阴：1. 受到1点伤害；2. 弃置X张牌；3. 翻面并进入连环状态；4. 随机执行一个已移除的阴选项。（X为当前状态剩余选项数）
skill_colorful_wings.description_en: Convert Skill: During your End Phase, you may have a character choose one option to execute, then remove that option. Yang — 1. Recover 1 HP; 2. Draw X cards; 3. Restore their General Card to face-up position; 4. Randomly execute a previously removed Yang option. Yin — 1. Receive 1 damage; 2. Discard X cards; 3. Flip their General Card and enter the Chain State; 4. Randomly execute a previously removed Yin option. (X = the number of remaining options in the current mode)

skill_return_and_part.description_cn: 锁定技，你的首个回合开始时，你选择一名其他角色。该角色每轮的首个回合结束后，若其本回合未造成过伤害，你执行一个额外的回合。
skill_return_and_part.description_en: Locked: At the start of your first turn, choose one other character. After the end of that character's first turn in each round, if they dealt no damage that turn, you take an extra turn.

skill_thunderstrike_raid.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当你使用【杀】指定目标后，你可以选择一项：1. 弃置其X张手牌（X为你与其的距离）；2. 移动其场上的一张牌；若其体力值大于你或为全场最高，你可以背水。
skill_thunderstrike_raid.description_en: Once per turn: After you use [Kill] and designate a target, you may choose one: 1. Discard X of their hand cards (X = the distance between you and them); 2. Move one of their cards on the field. If their HP Value is greater than yours or is the highest on the field, you may instead choose Last Resort (execute all other options first, then accept the consequence).

skill_raise_the_standard.description_cn: 锁定技，当你受到伤害后，若有其他角色不在你的攻击范围内，则你的攻击范围+1，否则你从牌堆中获得一张【杀】。
skill_raise_the_standard.description_en: Locked: After you receive damage, if any other character is outside your Attack Range, your Attack Range increases by 1. Otherwise, take a [Kill] from the Draw Pile.

skill_detect_deception.description_cn: 每名角色的回合限一次，当一名角色的体力变化后，你可以观看牌堆顶的三张牌，然后获得其中一张牌。当与此牌牌名相同的牌于本轮内下次被使用时，你可以令此牌无效。
skill_detect_deception.description_en: Once per character's turn: After a character's HP changes, you may look at the top 3 cards of the Draw Pile, then gain one of them. The next time a card with the same name as the card you gained is used this round, you may Nullify it.

skill_stern_counsel.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以令一名角色亮出牌堆顶的一张牌，若此牌为伤害牌，则你对其造成X点火焰伤害，否则其选择一项：1. 获得此牌，然后重复此流程（亮出的牌数不能超过存活角色数）；2. 攻击范围-X直到其回合结束（X为亮出的牌数）。
skill_stern_counsel.description_en: Once per Action Phase, you may have a character flip the top card of the Draw Pile. If it is a damage card, deal X fire damage to them. Otherwise, they choose one: 1. Gain that card, then repeat this process (the number of cards flipped cannot exceed the number of surviving characters); 2. Their Attack Range is reduced by X until the end of their turn (X = the number of cards flipped).

skill_total_severance.description_cn: 锁定技，你计算与其他角色的距离-2。当你造成伤害后，若你的手牌数小于体力上限，你将手牌摸至体力上限，然后此技能本回合失效。
skill_total_severance.description_en: Locked: When you calculate the distance to another character, subtract 2. After you deal damage, if your hand card count is less than your Max HP, draw cards until you reach your Max HP, then this skill cannot activate again this turn.

skill_guard_and_connect.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当你成为其他角色使用牌的目标后，你可以与其各摸两张牌，然后交换一张手牌。若如此做，此牌结算结束后，你可以使用你因交换得到的牌；本回合结束时，若其因交换得到的牌在其手牌中，你对其造成1点伤害。
skill_guard_and_connect.description_en: Once per turn: After you become the target of a card another character uses, you may each draw 2 cards, then exchange 1 hand card with each other. If you do, after that card finishes resolving, you may use the card you received in the exchange. At the end of this turn, if the card they received from the exchange is still in their hand, deal 1 damage to them.

skill_parting_swallows.description_cn: 锁定技，当其他角色使用牌指定包括你在内的多名角色为目标后，你令此牌对其他目标无效并获得牌堆中点数小于此牌的每个点数的牌各一张，且当前回合结束时，你弃置这些牌。
skill_parting_swallows.description_en: Locked: When another character uses a card that designates multiple targets including you, Nullify that card against all other targets, and take one card of each rank smaller than that card's rank from the Draw Pile. At the end of the current turn, discard all cards gained this way.

skill_parting_words.description_cn: 每回合每种类型的牌限一次，当你使用指定唯一目标的手牌结算后，你可以选择一项：1. 摸一张牌；2. 随机获得弃牌堆中的一张牌；3. 与一名角色拼点，赢的角色对没赢的角色造成1点伤害。然后此次被选择的选项数值改为1，未选择的选项数值+1（至多为3）。
skill_parting_words.description_en: Once per card type per turn: After a hand card you use with exactly one target finishes resolving, you may choose one option: 1. Draw 1 card; 2. Randomly gain a card from the Discard Pile; 3. Conduct a Point Duel with one character — the winner deals 1 damage to the loser. Then, the chosen option's value resets to 1, and all unchosen options' values increase by 1 (maximum 3 each).

skill_wandering_fate.description_cn: 当你于回合外失去牌后，你可以随机将牌堆中一张基本牌或锦囊牌置于你的武将牌上，称为「妄」（每种牌名的牌限一张，且数量不能超过游戏人数）。
skill_wandering_fate.description_en: After you lose a card outside of your turn, you may randomly place one Basic Card or Tool Card from the Draw Pile face-up on your General Card as a 「Whim」 token (limited to one token per card name; the total number of tokens cannot exceed the number of players).

skill_bell_chime.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以获得至多X张「妄」（X为游戏轮数）。若如此做，且剩余的「妄」颜色均相同，你本回合对其他角色造成的伤害+1，且可以将武器或防具牌当【决斗】使用。
skill_bell_chime.description_en: At the start of your Action Phase, you may gain up to X 「Whim」 tokens (X = the current round number). If you do and all remaining 「Whim」 tokens share the same color, damage you deal to other characters this turn is increased by 1 and you may use Weapon or Armor Cards as [Duel].

skill_quick_shadow.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当你于摸牌阶段外获得牌后，你可以将这些牌中的至少一张交给一名其他角色，然后摸一张牌。若此时是你的回合内，你增加一张「妄」。
skill_quick_shadow.description_en: Once per turn: After you gain cards outside of your Draw Phase, you may give at least one of those cards to another character, then draw 1 card. If this occurs during your turn, add one 「Whim」 token.

skill_equal_rites.description_cn: 出牌阶段，当你使用牌指定目标后，若此阶段已使用的牌数量等于X，你可以令此牌效果额外执行X次（X为你手牌中的花色数）。
skill_equal_rites.description_en: During your Action Phase, after you use a card and designate its target, if the number of cards you have used this phase equals X, you may have that card's effect execute X additional times (X = the number of different suits in your hand).

skill_lavish_burial.description_cn: 每轮限一次，当你或你的回合内有其他角色进入濒死状态时，你可以获得不同花色的牌各一张。
skill_lavish_burial.description_en: Once per round: When you or another character enters the Verge of Death State during your turn, you may gain one card of each different suit.

skill_steadfast_guard_zhu.description_cn: 你可以横置一名角色，视为使用一张任意基本牌，然后此技能失效直到每轮结束时，或直到你从手牌中使用以此法使用的基本牌。
skill_steadfast_guard_zhu.description_en: You may place one character's General Card in horizontal position to be treated as using any Basic Card. This skill then cannot activate until the end of the round, or until you use a hand card of the same name as the Basic Card used this way.

skill_cut_off_the_path.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以重置一名角色并弃置其一张牌，然后若本回合下次进入弃牌堆的牌点数均大于此牌，你对其造成1点伤害。
skill_cut_off_the_path.description_en: During your Action Phase, you may Reset one character and discard one of their cards. If the next card to enter the Discard Pile this turn has a rank higher than the discarded card, deal 1 damage to them.

skill_fierce_peak.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以将牌堆顶的X张牌置于武将牌上直到此阶段结束（X为你的体力上限）。若如此做，当你使用牌结算结束后，若你的武将牌上有「激峭」牌，你获得其中一张，然后若其中剩余两种颜色牌的数量相等，你回复1点体力，否则你失去1点体力。
skill_fierce_peak.description_en: At the start of your Action Phase, you may place the top X cards of the Draw Pile face-up on your General Card until the end of this phase (X = your Max HP). If you do, after each card you use finishes resolving, if there are 「Fierce Peak」 cards on your General Card, gain one of them. Then, if the remaining cards of each color are equal in number, recover 1 HP; otherwise, lose 1 HP.

skill_ominous_doubt.description_cn: 限定技，当你处于濒死状态时，若徐氏：不在场，你可以将体力回复至3点并将武将牌替换为徐氏；在场，你可以将体力回复至1点并获得技能〖魂姿〗。
skill_ominous_doubt.description_en: Limited: When you are in the Verge of Death State, if Lady Xu is: not on the field — you may recover your HP to 3 and replace your General Card with Lady Xu's; on the field — you may recover your HP to 1 and gain the skill 〖Spirit Awakening〗.

skill_virtuous_charge.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以废除一个装备栏，亮出牌堆顶的三张牌并获得其中一张牌，然后可以令一名其他角色获得其中一张牌。若此前此装备栏有牌，你回复1点体力，此技能视为未发动过。
skill_virtuous_charge.description_en: Once per Action Phase, you may disable one equipment slot, flip the top 3 cards of the Draw Pile, gain one of them, then optionally have another character gain one of them. If that slot previously had a card in it, recover 1 HP and this skill is treated as not having been activated.

skill_valiant_spirit.description_cn: 你使用【杀】的次数上限+X（X为你装备区里的牌数）。当你受到或造成1点伤害后，你依次执行以下项：1. 可以恢复一个装备栏；2. 从牌堆或弃牌堆中随机使用一张装备牌。
skill_valiant_spirit.description_en: Your [Kill] frequency limit increases by X (X = the number of cards in your Equipment Zone). After you receive or deal 1 damage, execute in sequence: 1. You may restore one disabled equipment slot; 2. Randomly use an Equipment Card from the Draw Pile or Discard Pile.

skill_stabilize_and_secure.description_cn: 锁定技，当一种牌名的牌每回合第二次被使用后，若本回合没有角色进入过濒死状态，你与一名不为此牌目标的角色各摸一张牌（每回合每名角色限一次）。然后你选择一项，令一名手牌最多的其他角色：1. 受到你造成的1点伤害；2. 弃置其随机一种最多牌名的手牌。
skill_stabilize_and_secure.description_en: Locked: When a card of the same name is used for the second time in a turn, if no character has entered the Verge of Death State this turn, you and one character who is not a target of that card each draw 1 card (once per character per turn). Then choose one — the other character with the most hand cards: 1. Receives 1 damage from you; 2. Discards all their hand cards of whichever name they have the most of.

skill_pacify_and_settle_xun.description_cn: 当你的体力值每轮首次变化后，你可以将至少X张牌交给一名角色（X为你已损失的体力值）。若这些牌：颜色均相同，你回复1点体力；数量大于本回合受到过伤害的角色数，你将手牌调整至体力上限。
skill_pacify_and_settle_xun.description_en: After your HP Value changes for the first time each round, you may give at least X cards to one character (X = your HP Lost). If all given cards share the same color, recover 1 HP. If the number of cards given exceeds the number of characters who have received damage this turn, adjust your hand card count to your Max HP.

skill_uphold_the_code.description_cn: 宗族技，锁定技，当你于每名角色的回合内首次使用非伤害类锦囊牌后，你失去1点体力或一个锁定技，令一名同族角色获得此牌。
skill_uphold_the_code.description_en: Clan Skill. Locked: After you use a non-damage Tool Card for the first time during each character's turn, you lose 1 HP or lose one Locked Skill, and have one character of the same faction gain that card.

skill_cold_clarity.description_cn: 当你成为黑色非转化牌的目标后，你可以弃置一名角色一张牌。若弃置的牌为装备牌，则该黑色牌对你无效，否则你可以将该黑色牌视为列入下次〖酖毒〗可使用的牌中。
skill_cold_clarity.description_en: After you become the target of a black non-substitute card, you may discard one card from any character's zone. If the discarded card is an Equipment Card, that black card is Nullified against you. Otherwise, you may treat that black card as included in the list of cards available for the next activation of 〖Brew Poison〗.

skill_brew_poison.description_cn: 出牌阶段结束时，你可以展示至多五张基本牌或普通锦囊牌，然后你的下个回合开始时视为依次使用这些牌且无距离限制。你使用这些牌期间有角色回复体力或受到伤害后，你摸一张牌且以此法获得的牌不计入本回合手牌上限。
skill_brew_poison.description_en: At the end of your Action Phase, you may reveal up to 5 Basic Cards or Non Time-Delay Tool Cards. At the start of your next turn, you are treated as using those cards in sequence with no distance restrictions. While using these cards, whenever a character recovers HP or receives damage, draw 1 card; cards gained this way do not count toward your Hand Limit this turn.

skill_warm_sunshine.description_cn: 锁定技，你手牌中每有一个类别的非伤害牌，你的手牌上限便+1。
skill_warm_sunshine.description_en: Locked: For each category of non-damage cards in your hand, your Hand Limit increases by 1.

skill_radiant_grace.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当你成为【杀】的目标后，你可以重铸两张牌，然后若此【杀】对你造成伤害，你可令一名角色获得重铸牌。
skill_radiant_grace.description_en: Once per turn: After you become the target of a [Kill], you may Reforge 2 cards. Then, if that [Kill] deals damage to you, you may have one character gain the Reforged cards.

skill_receive_favor.description_cn: 一个回合结束时，若当前回合角色的手牌数小于等于你，你可与一名角色进行拼点。若你赢，你可使用拼点牌；若你没赢，被拼点角色可对你使用一张【杀】。
skill_receive_favor.description_en: At the end of a turn, if the current turn's character has hand cards fewer than or equal to yours, you may conduct a Point Duel with one character. If you win, you may use your Point Duel card. If you do not win, the character you dueled may use a [Kill] on you.

skill_buy_a_title.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以令一名其他角色声明2至4中一个数字，你可以交给其X张牌并回复1点体力，然后直到你的下回合开始：其他角色计算与你的距离+X，你的拼点牌点数+X且拼点赢时摸一张牌；否则你摸X张牌。（X为其声明的数字）
skill_buy_a_title.description_en: Once per Action Phase, you may have another character declare a number from 2 to 4. You may give them X cards and recover 1 HP — until the start of your next turn: other characters' distance to you increases by X, and your Point Duel card rank increases by X and you draw 1 card when you win a duel. If you do not give them cards, draw X cards instead. (X = the declared number)

skill_intercept_and_deflect.description_cn: 当其他角色使用牌指定距离其大于1的角色为唯一目标时，你可以与其拼点：若你赢，你令此牌无效并获得此牌；若你没赢，你成为此牌的额外目标，此技能本回合失效。
skill_intercept_and_deflect.description_en: When another character uses a card targeting a character at distance greater than 1 from them as the sole target, you may conduct a Point Duel with that character. If you win, Nullify that card and gain it. If you do not win, you become an additional target of that card and this skill cannot activate again this turn.

skill_captivating_beauty.description_cn: 出牌阶段，或当你受到伤害后，你令一名男性角色选择是否对你选择的另一名其他角色使用一张手牌，若其使用牌你摸两张牌，若其未使用牌或未造成伤害，你可以令其失去1点体力，然后此技能本阶段失效。
skill_captivating_beauty.description_en: During your Action Phase, or after you receive damage, have one male character choose whether to use a hand card on another character of your choice. If they use a card, draw 2 cards. If they do not use a card or do not deal damage, you may have them lose 1 HP, then this skill cannot activate again this phase.

skill_possessive_desire.description_cn: 回合开始时，你可以展示一张手牌令所有其他角色随机弃置一张相同花色的手牌，然后你可以选择其中一张获得。
skill_possessive_desire.description_en: At the start of your turn, you may reveal one hand card — all other characters randomly discard one hand card of the same suit. You may then choose one of those discarded cards to gain.

skill_jealous_slaughter.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以对任意名对你使用过牌的其他角色造成1点伤害并随机弃置其各一张手牌，然后直到你的下回合结束，当其进入濒死状态时，你获得其所有黑色牌。
skill_jealous_slaughter.description_en: Once per Action Phase, you may deal 1 damage to any number of other characters who have used cards targeting you, and randomly discard one of each of their hand cards. Until the end of your next turn, when any of them enters the Verge of Death State, gain all their black cards.

skill_self_binding.description_cn: 每轮限一次，其他角色的出牌阶段开始时，若其手牌数为全场最多，你可令其观看你的手牌。若如此做，本回合结束时，你回复1点体力并摸三张牌；本轮当其他角色使用牌指定你为目标后，你可以将所有手牌交给一名其他角色，令此牌无效。
skill_self_binding.description_en: Once per round: At the start of another character's Action Phase, if their hand card count is the highest on the field, you may have them look at your hand. If you do, at the end of this turn you recover 1 HP and draw 3 cards. For the rest of this round, whenever another character uses a card targeting you, you may give all your hand cards to one other character to Nullify that card.

skill_silk_dance.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，从你的上家或下家起选择任意名座位连续的其他角色，令这些角色依次选择一项：1. 令你摸一张牌；2. 其摸一张牌。选择完成后，若令你摸牌的角色数较多，你获得1枚「沙」标记；若自己摸牌的角色数较多，你对选择自己摸牌的角色各造成1点伤害。
skill_silk_dance.description_en: Once per Action Phase, starting from your Left or Right Neighbor, choose any number of consecutively seated other characters. Have each of them choose in sequence: 1. You draw 1 card; 2. They draw 1 card. After all choices are made, if more characters chose to let you draw, gain 1 「Sand」 token. If more chose to draw themselves, deal 1 damage to each character who chose to draw themselves.

skill_transform_to_duckweed.description_cn: 限定技，当一名其他角色死亡时，你可以获得其所有武将技能，然后你失去技能〖绡舞〗和所有「沙」标记并摸等量的牌；或当你死亡时，你可以令一名其他角色获得技能〖沙舞〗和你的所有「沙」标记。
skill_transform_to_duckweed.description_en: Limited: When another character dies, you may gain all of their general skills, then lose 〖Silk Dance〗 and all 「Sand」 tokens and draw that many cards. Alternatively, when you die, you may have another character gain 〖Sand Dance〗 and all your 「Sand」 tokens.

skill_sand_dance.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定目标后，你可以弃置两张手牌或移去1枚「沙」标记，对其造成1点伤害。然后若你移去了「沙」标记，你摸两张牌。
skill_sand_dance.description_en: After you use [Kill] and designate a target, you may discard 2 hand cards or remove 1 「Sand」 token to deal 1 damage to them. If you removed a 「Sand」 token, draw 2 cards.

skill_tearful_lament.description_cn: 其他角色的出牌阶段开始时，若其摸牌阶段内的摸牌数不等于2，则你摸X张牌，然后你可以令其本回合的手牌上限+X或-X（X为其本回合摸牌阶段内摸牌数与2的差值）。
skill_tearful_lament.description_en: At the start of another character's Action Phase, if the number of cards they drew during their Draw Phase was not 2, draw X cards, then you may increase or decrease their Hand Limit by X for this turn (X = the absolute difference between the number of cards they drew during their Draw Phase and 2).

skill_precious_comb.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以选择至多等同于你体力上限名角色，令这些角色各获得1枚「梳」标记并重置武将牌，你每少选择一名角色，每名目标角色便多获得1枚「梳」标记。有「梳」标记的角色摸牌阶段额外摸Y张牌（Y为其拥有的「梳」标记数），然后移去其所有「梳」标记。
skill_precious_comb.description_en: During your Starting Phase, you may choose up to your Max HP number of characters. Each chosen character gains 1 「Comb」 token and Resets their General Card. For each character fewer than the maximum you choose, each chosen character gains 1 additional 「Comb」 token. During a character's Draw Phase, if they have 「Comb」 tokens, they draw Y additional cards (Y = their number of 「Comb」 tokens), then remove all their 「Comb」 tokens.

skill_lead_the_garrison.description_cn: 若你当前回合未造成或受到过伤害，你可以将一张非基本牌当任意基本牌使用或打出。当你每回合首次造成或首次受到伤害后，你可以随机获得一张本回合进入弃牌堆的牌。
skill_lead_the_garrison.description_en: If you have neither dealt nor received damage this turn, you may use or play out a non-Basic Card as any Basic Card. After you deal or receive damage for the first time each turn, you may randomly gain one card that entered the Discard Pile this turn.

skill_stubborn_resistance.description_cn: 当你进入濒死状态时，你可以回复1点体力，然后获得1枚「抗」标记并摸两张牌。若如此做，此回合结束时，你重复选择一项直到你没有「抗」标记：1. 对本回合对你造成过伤害的角色使用一张【杀】（须合法）并移去1枚「抗」标记；2. 死亡。若本回合对你造成过伤害的角色于此流程中死亡，你移去所有「抗」标记。
skill_stubborn_resistance.description_en: When you enter the Verge of Death State, you may recover 1 HP, then gain 1 「Resist」 token and draw 2 cards. If you do, at the end of this turn, repeatedly choose one option until you have no 「Resist」 tokens: 1. Use a [Kill] on a character who dealt damage to you this turn (must be a legal use) and remove 1 「Resist」 token; 2. Die. If a character who dealt damage to you this turn dies during this process, remove all your 「Resist」 tokens.

skill_grand_strategy.description_cn: 当你每使用两张手牌结算后，你可以摸三张牌，然后弃置一种花色的所有手牌。若你的手牌未包含所有类别，你本回合使用的下一张牌若为：基本牌，则无次数及距离限制；锦囊牌，则不可响应。
skill_grand_strategy.description_en: After every two hand cards you use finish resolving, you may draw 3 cards, then discard all hand cards of one suit. If your hand does not contain all card categories, the next card you use this turn: if it is a Basic Card — it has no frequency or distance restrictions; if it is a Tool Card — it cannot be responded to.

skill_arrogant_pride.description_cn: 锁定技，当你的牌进入弃牌堆后，若此牌：造成过伤害，你本回合摸牌时摸牌数+1；因弃置进入弃牌堆，你本回合摸牌时摸牌数-1。
skill_arrogant_pride.description_en: Locked: After one of your cards enters the Discard Pile, if that card: dealt damage — your draw count increases by 1 the next time you draw cards this turn; entered the Discard Pile by being discarded — your draw count decreases by 1 the next time you draw cards this turn.

skill_launch_raid.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，若你手牌中没有能使用的伤害牌，你可以视为使用一张本回合未以此法使用过的伤害牌（无次数限制）。当此牌名的牌本阶段进入牌堆后，此技能视为未发动过。
skill_launch_raid.description_en: Once per Action Phase: If you have no usable damage cards in hand, you may be treated as using a damage card that has not been used this way this turn (no frequency limit). When a card of the same name enters the Draw Pile during this phase, this skill is treated as not having been activated.

skill_relentless_pursuit.description_cn: 连招技（黑色牌+伤害牌），你可以选择一名本回合未以此法选择过的其他角色并摸两张牌，然后你本回合：计算与其的距离视为1；对其使用牌结算后，可以弃置其至多X张牌（X为此牌满足的条件数：黑色牌、伤害牌）。
skill_relentless_pursuit.description_en: Combo Skill (black card + damage card): You may choose another character who has not been chosen this way this turn and draw 2 cards. This turn: the distance between you and that character is treated as 1; after a card you use against them finishes resolving, you may discard up to X of their cards (X = the number of conditions the combo cards satisfied: black card, damage card).
